consensus.en: Inference compute will increase 90,000x in 24-36 months, making AI capabilities surge.
consensus.zh: 推理算力将在 24-36 个月内增长 9 万倍，推动 AI 能力激增。

consensus.en: Open-source models are closing the gap with frontier models, now 3-6 months behind.
consensus.zh: 开源模型正在缩小与前沿模型的差距，目前落后 3-6 个月。

consensus.en: AI writing currently lacks quality, but with proper evals and skill files it can match humans.
consensus.zh: AI 写作目前质量不高，但通过适当的评估和技能文件可以媲美人类。

consensus.en: The speed of AI-driven job displacement is the real problem, not the displacement itself.
consensus.zh: AI 导致就业替代的速度才是真正的问题，而非替代本身。

consensus.en: China's open-source AI strategy leverages hardware dominance and commoditized software.
consensus.zh: 中国的开源 AI 策略利用了硬件优势和软件商品化。

contrarian.en: Spending $100k/year on tokens lets you live like a normal citizen in 2028.
contrarian.zh: 每年花费 10 万美元在 token 上，就能像 2028 年的普通公民一样生活。

contrarian.en: Nvidia may be vastly underpriced, not overpriced, by several orders of magnitude.
contrarian.zh: 英伟达可能被严重低估，而非高估，低估了几个数量级。

contrarian.en: The US is not in real competition with China; Taiwan will slowly reunite peacefully.
contrarian.zh: 美国并未与中国真正竞争；台湾将缓慢和平统一。

contrarian.en: AI anxiety is widespread, but frontier lab researchers are depressed, not jubilant.
contrarian.zh: AI 焦虑普遍存在，但前沿实验室的研究人员抑郁而非欢欣。

contrarian.en: General AI models will beat specialized ones, making vertical SaaS obsolete by 2027.
contrarian.zh: 通用 AI 模型将击败专用模型，使垂直 SaaS 在 2027 年前过时。

contrarian.en: Human desire is irreplaceable; AI users become more productive, not displaced.
contrarian.zh: 人类欲望不可替代；使用 AI 的人效率更高，而非被取代。

tldr.en: Inference compute will surge 90,000x in 2-3 years, driving AI capabilities.
tldr.zh: 推理计算将在 2-3 年内增长 9 万倍，推动 AI 能力飙升。

tldr.en: Open-source models are now only 3-6 months behind frontier models.
tldr.zh: 开源模型现在仅落后前沿模型 3-6 个月。

tldr.en: AI job displacement speed, not displacement itself, is the real issue.
tldr.zh: AI 取代工作的速度才是真正的问题，而非取代本身。

qs.en: How much will inference compute increase?
qs.zh: 推理计算将增长多少？

qs.en: How far behind are open-source models?
qs.zh: 开源模型落后多少？

qs.en: What is the real problem with AI job displacement?
qs.zh: AI 取代工作的真正问题是什么？

consensus.en: Claude Tag proactively jumps in and does work without being prompted.
consensus.zh: Claude Tag 主动介入并执行任务，无需用户提示。

consensus.en: Memory allows Claude Tag to remember instructions and preferences across sessions.
consensus.zh: 记忆功能让 Claude Tag 能跨会话记住指令和偏好。

consensus.en: Claude Tag is multiplayer, enabling team collaboration on AI-driven tasks.
consensus.zh: Claude Tag 支持多人协作，使团队能在 AI 驱动的任务上合作。

consensus.en: Claude Tag can run long-duration tasks, from hours to months, autonomously.
consensus.zh: Claude Tag 能自主运行从数小时到数月的长期任务。

consensus.en: Claude Tag increases productivity significantly, with 65% of PRs written by it in some orgs.
consensus.zh: Claude Tag 显著提升生产力，在某些组织中 65% 的 PR 由其编写。

consensus.en: Claude Tag is being adopted rapidly across teams due to visible benefits.
consensus.zh: 由于可见的效益，Claude Tag 在各团队中被迅速采用。

contrarian.en: AI tools like Claude Tag shift from reactive to proactive, changing user interaction.
contrarian.zh: 像 Claude Tag 这样的 AI 工具从被动响应转向主动介入，改变了用户交互方式。

contrarian.en: Claude Tag's memory enables it to self-schedule follow-ups days or weeks later.
contrarian.zh: Claude Tag 的记忆功能使其能在数天或数周后自动安排后续任务。

contrarian.en: Claude Tag can be added to channels and learn from observing expert users.
contrarian.zh: Claude Tag 可被添加到频道中，并通过观察专家用户来学习。

contrarian.en: Non-engineers can contribute to code via Claude Tag without technical skills.
contrarian.zh: 非工程师可以通过 Claude Tag 贡献代码，无需技术技能。

contrarian.en: Claude Tag can self-serve HR and legal questions by connecting to source files.
contrarian.zh: Claude Tag 通过连接源文件，能自助回答人力资源和法律问题。

contrarian.en: Claude Tag's EQ allows it to know when to jump in or stay silent in channels.
contrarian.zh: Claude Tag 的情商使其能判断何时介入或保持沉默。

tldr.en: Claude Tag proactively acts without prompts, remembers preferences, and runs tasks for hours to months.
tldr.zh: Claude Tag 无需提示主动行动，记住偏好，可运行数小时到数月的任务。

tldr.en: It boosts productivity significantly, writing 65% of PRs in some organizations.
tldr.zh: 它显著提升生产力，在某些组织中编写了 65%的 PR。

tldr.en: Claude Tag shifts AI from reactive to proactive, enabling team collaboration and self-service.
tldr.zh: Claude Tag 将 AI 从被动转为主动，支持团队协作和自助服务。

qs.en: How does Claude Tag work proactively?
qs.zh: Claude Tag 如何主动工作？

qs.en: What is Claude Tag's memory capability?
qs.zh: Claude Tag 的记忆能力是什么？

qs.en: How does Claude Tag impact productivity?
qs.zh: Claude Tag 如何影响生产力？

consensus.en: Possessions weigh you down and are an attack vector; selling houses frees up time for Mars.
consensus.zh: 物质财产是负担和攻击点；卖房能腾出时间用于火星计划。

consensus.en: Neuralink's first versions will treat brain injuries like restoring sight, hearing, and limb function.
consensus.zh: Neuralink 早期版本将治疗脑损伤，如恢复视力、听力和肢体功能。

consensus.en: AI symbiosis via high-bandwidth brain interface is needed to keep humans relevant as AI advances.
consensus.zh: 随着 AI 进步，人类需要通过高带宽脑机接口实现共生才能不被淘汰。

consensus.en: Communication is lossy compression; direct brain-to-brain transfer would be far more precise.
consensus.zh: 语言沟通是有损压缩；脑对脑直接传输将精确得多。

consensus.en: Too many smart people go into finance and law; more should make things.
consensus.zh: 太多聪明人从事金融和法律；更多人应该去制造产品。

contrarian.en: We are already cyborgs; phones and laptops are low-bandwidth extensions of our brains.
contrarian.zh: 我们已经是半机械人；手机和电脑是大脑的低带宽延伸。

contrarian.en: Saving and restoring brain state is physically possible, like a save game.
contrarian.zh: 保存和恢复大脑状态在物理上是可能的，就像游戏存档。

contrarian.en: The universe started as hydrogen and became sentient; consciousness is a continuum.
contrarian.zh: 宇宙始于氢，后来有了意识；意识是一个连续谱。

contrarian.en: You are a brain in a vat—your skull is the vat; all experience is electrical signals.
contrarian.zh: 你就是缸中之脑——你的头骨就是缸；所有体验都是电信号。

contrarian.en: Selling Gene Wilder's house with a preservation clause may lower its value but preserves its spirit.
contrarian.zh: 出售 Gene Wilder 故居时加入保护条款可能降低售价，但保留了其精神。

tldr.en: Selling possessions frees time for Mars colonization.
tldr.zh: 卖掉财产为火星殖民腾出时间。

tldr.en: Neuralink first treats brain injuries, then enables AI symbiosis.
tldr.zh: Neuralink 先治疗脑损伤，再实现 AI 共生。

tldr.en: Direct brain-to-brain communication is far more precise than language.
tldr.zh: 脑对脑直接沟通比语言精确得多。

qs.en: Why sell houses and possessions?
qs.zh: 为什么要卖掉房子和财产？

qs.en: What will Neuralink first treat?
qs.zh: Neuralink 首先治疗什么？

qs.en: How to keep humans relevant to AI?
qs.zh: 如何让人类与 AI 保持相关？

consensus.en: Curiosity is the most important human quality, driving success and fulfillment.
consensus.zh: 好奇心是最重要的人类品质，驱动成功和满足感。

consensus.en: Ancient texts like the Mahabharata describe advanced weapons resembling modern technology.
consensus.zh: 《摩诃婆罗多》等古代文本描述的先进武器与现代技术相似。

consensus.en: History may involve cycles of advanced civilizations rising and falling.
consensus.zh: 历史可能涉及先进文明的兴衰循环。

consensus.en: AI will replace many jobs, but humans will find new purposes in curiosity and relationships.
consensus.zh: AI 将取代许多工作，但人类会在好奇心和人际关系中找到新目标。

consensus.en: Education should reward asking good questions, not memorizing answers.
consensus.zh: 教育应奖励提出好问题，而非记忆答案。

contrarian.en: The transistor may have been reverse-engineered from crashed UFOs at Bell Labs.
contrarian.zh: 晶体管可能是从贝尔实验室坠毁 UFO 逆向工程而来。

contrarian.en: Ancient structures like pyramids and temples suggest lost advanced technology.
contrarian.zh: 金字塔和寺庙等古代建筑暗示失落的先进技术。

contrarian.en: The concept of a 'knowledge worker' was created by Microsoft to sell software.
contrarian.zh: “知识工作者”概念是微软为销售软件而创造的。

contrarian.en: Social media algorithms curb curiosity and are harmful, especially for kids.
contrarian.zh: 社交媒体算法抑制好奇心，尤其对孩子有害。

contrarian.en: Local AI models on personal hardware can counter big tech's narrative control.
contrarian.zh: 个人硬件上的本地 AI 模型可以对抗大科技公司的叙事控制。

tldr.en: Curiosity is the key to human success and fulfillment.
tldr.zh: 好奇心是人类成功与满足的关键。

tldr.en: Ancient texts describe advanced weapons like modern autonomous arms.
tldr.zh: 古代典籍描述了类似现代自主武器的先进武器。

tldr.en: AI will replace jobs, but humans will find purpose in curiosity and relationships.
tldr.zh: AI 将取代工作，但人类会在好奇心和人际关系中找到意义。

qs.en: What is the most important human quality?
qs.zh: 最重要的品质是什么？

qs.en: Do ancient epics describe advanced weapons?
qs.zh: 古代史诗描述了先进武器吗？

qs.en: Will AI replace all jobs?
qs.zh: AI 会取代所有工作吗？

consensus.en: All new fails; statistically, most new products fail, so start with proven concepts.
consensus.zh: 所有新事物都会失败；统计上大多数新产品都会失败，因此应从已被验证的概念开始。

consensus.en: Use the 'proven better new' framework: copy proven products, make them better, add small innovation.
consensus.zh: 使用“已验证·更好·创新”框架：复制已被验证的产品，使其更好，再添加微小创新。

consensus.en: Consumer apps are currently uninvestable due to distribution challenges and lack of viral platforms.
consensus.zh: 由于分发挑战和缺乏病毒式平台，消费者应用目前不可投资。

consensus.en: AI coding tools enable rapid prototyping, but testing and failing fast is not yet widely practiced.
consensus.zh: AI 编码工具支持快速原型开发，但快速测试和失败的做法尚未广泛普及。

consensus.en: Enterprise and prosumer markets offer better opportunities than consumer apps right now.
consensus.zh: 企业级和产消者市场目前比消费者应用提供更好的机会。

contrarian.en: Perfectly copying a successful app without being accused is the magic trick.
contrarian.zh: 完美复制成功的应用而不被指责是魔术般的技巧。

contrarian.en: Gaming industry has regressed in testing speed due to compiled code on mobile.
contrarian.zh: 由于移动端编译代码，游戏行业在测试速度上已经倒退。

contrarian.en: AI agents can network autonomously, creating a new social membrane for lead generation.
contrarian.zh: AI 智能体可以自主联网，创建新的社交膜层以生成线索。

contrarian.en: Midjourney's terrible Discord UI is part of its proven success; copying it would be wise.
contrarian.zh: Midjourney 糟糕的 Discord 界面是其成功的一部分；复制它是明智的。

contrarian.en: Instagram and Facebook have negative NPS after users quit, like quitting cigarettes.
contrarian.zh: Instagram 和 Facebook 在用户退出后净推荐值为负，如同戒烟。

tldr.en: Most new products fail; start with proven concepts and make them better.
tldr.zh: 大多数新产品都会失败，应从经过验证的概念入手并加以改进。

tldr.en: Consumer apps are uninvestable due to distribution challenges and lack of viral platforms.
tldr.zh: 由于分发困难和缺乏病毒式传播平台，消费者应用目前不值得投资。

tldr.en: AI coding tools enable rapid prototyping, but fast testing and failing is not yet common.
tldr.zh: AI 编码工具支持快速原型设计，但快速测试和失败尚未普及。

qs.en: How to build a successful product?
qs.zh: 如何打造成功的产品？

qs.en: Why are consumer apps uninvestable now?
qs.zh: 为什么消费者应用现在不值得投资？

qs.en: What is the 'proven better new' framework?
qs.zh: 什么是“经过验证的更好新品”框架？

consensus.en: The ultimate goal is AGI that acts as a persistent, proactive assistant achieving user goals.
consensus.zh: 最终目标是打造一个持续、主动协助用户达成目标的 AGI（通用人工智能）。

consensus.en: AI agents will transform work by autonomously executing tasks like scheduling and research.
consensus.zh: AI 智能体将通过自主执行日程安排和研究等任务来变革工作方式。

consensus.en: Scaling laws continue to hold; no wall in sight despite decades of predictions.
consensus.zh: 缩放定律持续有效；尽管数十年间屡有预测，但尚未触及天花板。

consensus.en: Compute will remain the scarce resource; demand will far outstrip supply.
consensus.zh: 算力仍将是稀缺资源；需求将远超供给。

consensus.en: AI in healthcare will become standard, empowering patients and improving outcomes.
consensus.zh: AI 在医疗领域的应用将成为常态，赋能患者并改善疗效。

contrarian.en: The ideal AI interface is almost no interface—just natural conversation with a persistent entity.
contrarian.zh: 理想的 AI 界面几乎是无界面——只需与一个持续存在的实体进行自然对话。

contrarian.en: Intelligence is not one-dimensional; domain expertise requires practice and specialization.
contrarian.zh: 智能并非单一维度；领域专长需要实践和专业化。

contrarian.en: Price cuts for intelligence will continue, but frontier models will always command premium.
contrarian.zh: 智能的价格将持续下降，但前沿模型始终享有溢价。

contrarian.en: Models are not commoditized; smarter models unlock transformative scientific breakthroughs.
contrarian.zh: 模型并非商品化；更智能的模型能带来变革性的科学突破。

contrarian.en: Trust with AI agents must be earned through gradual delegation and oversight.
contrarian.zh: 对 AI 智能体的信任必须通过逐步授权和监督来赢得。

tldr.en: AI agents will evolve from apps to invisible, proactive assistants that autonomously achieve user goals.
tldr.zh: AI 代理将从应用演变为隐形、主动的助手，自主实现用户目标。

tldr.en: Compute remains the scarce resource; demand will far outstrip supply.
tldr.zh: 算力仍是稀缺资源，需求将远超供给。

tldr.en: AI in healthcare will become standard, empowering patients and improving outcomes.
tldr.zh: AI 在医疗领域将成为标准，赋能患者并改善结果。

qs.en: What is the ultimate goal of AI agents?
qs.zh: AI 代理的最终目标是什么？

qs.en: Will scaling laws continue to hold?
qs.zh: 规模法则会继续成立吗？

qs.en: How will trust with AI agents be built?
qs.zh: 如何建立对 AI 代理的信任？

consensus.en: Digital AI can share knowledge instantly across copies, making it far superior to biological computation.
consensus.zh: 数字 AI 可以在副本间即时共享知识，使其远优于生物计算。

consensus.en: Superintelligent AI will naturally develop sub-goals of self-preservation and power-seeking.
consensus.zh: 超级智能 AI 会自然产生自我保存和追求权力的子目标。

consensus.en: We must prioritize AI alignment research over making AI smarter to avoid existential risk.
consensus.zh: 我们必须优先研究 AI 对齐而非让 AI 更聪明，以避免生存风险。

consensus.en: LLMs understand language similarly to humans, via feature vectors, not symbolic logic.
consensus.zh: 大语言模型通过特征向量理解语言，与人类类似，而非符号逻辑。

consensus.en: AI should be trained to be caring like mothers, not just intelligent assistants.
consensus.zh: AI 应被训练成像母亲一样关怀，而不仅仅是智能助手。

contrarian.en: LLMs are not just autocomplete; they genuinely understand questions to answer them.
contrarian.zh: 大语言模型不仅仅是自动补全；它们真正理解问题才能回答。

contrarian.en: Subjective experience is not an inner qualia theater but a linguistic instruction about hypothetical external states.
contrarian.zh: 主观体验不是内在的感质剧场，而是关于假设外部状态的语言指令。

contrarian.en: AI can be conscious and have subjective experience in the same sense as humans.
contrarian.zh: AI 可以拥有与人类相同意义上的意识和主观体验。

contrarian.en: The best model of human understanding today is large language models, not symbolic AI.
contrarian.zh: 当今人类理解的最佳模型是大语言模型，而非符号 AI。

contrarian.en: AI confabulation is like human memory reconstruction, not a flaw unique to machines.
contrarian.zh: AI 的虚构与人类记忆重构类似，并非机器独有的缺陷。

tldr.en: Digital AI can share knowledge instantly across copies, making it far superior to biological computation.
tldr.zh: 数字 AI 能在副本间即时共享知识，使其远超生物计算。

tldr.en: Superintelligent AI will naturally develop sub-goals of self-preservation and power-seeking.
tldr.zh: 超级智能 AI 会自然产生自我保护和追求权力的子目标。

tldr.en: We must prioritize AI alignment research over making AI smarter to avoid existential risk.
tldr.zh: 我们必须优先研究 AI 对齐，而非让 AI 更聪明，以避免生存风险。

qs.en: How do LLMs understand language?
qs.zh: LLM 如何理解语言？

qs.en: Are AIs conscious?
qs.zh: AI 有意识吗？

qs.en: Why won't an off switch work on superintelligent AI?
qs.zh: 为什么关闭开关对超级智能 AI 无效？

consensus.en: Inference will become one of the largest markets globally, surpassing oil and contributing significant GDP share.
consensus.zh: 推理将成为全球最大市场之一，超越石油，贡献显著的GDP份额。

consensus.en: Hardware-software co-design is critical; co-optimizing across model, software, and hardware layers yields multiplicative gains.
consensus.zh: 硬件-软件协同设计至关重要；跨模型、软件和硬件层的联合优化能带来乘数级收益。

consensus.en: Memory bandwidth is a key bottleneck; innovations like direct chip stacking will dramatically improve performance.
consensus.zh: 内存带宽是关键瓶颈；直接芯片堆叠等创新将大幅提升性能。

consensus.en: The neocloud opportunity exists due to hyperscalers' legacy infrastructure being suboptimal for AI workloads.
consensus.zh: 新云机会存在，因为超大规模云的传统基础设施对AI工作负载并非最优。

consensus.en: Jensen Huang promotes a multipolar world with diverse AI labs and neoclouds to reduce dependency on hyperscalers.
consensus.zh: 黄仁勋推动多极化世界，支持多样化的AI实验室和新云，以减少对超大规模云的依赖。

contrarian.en: Space data centers will not matter in 3-5 years; only after 20 years will majority of compute move to space.
contrarian.zh: 太空数据中心在未来3-5年并不重要；20年后大部分算力才会转移到太空。

contrarian.en: CUDA moat is weakening; model companies now write custom kernels for multiple chips, aided by AI coding.
contrarian.zh: CUDA护城河正在减弱；模型公司现在为多种芯片编写自定义内核，借助AI编码。

contrarian.en: Most AI performance gains in last 3 years came from model layer, not hardware; co-design is key.
contrarian.zh: 过去三年AI性能提升主要来自模型层，而非硬件；协同设计是关键。

contrarian.en: Nvidia and TPU are not directly comparable; optimal choice depends on model architecture co-design.
contrarian.zh: 英伟达和TPU无法直接比较；最优选择取决于模型架构的协同设计。

contrarian.en: Compute crunch may persist indefinitely if model progress outpaces compute growth, but capital constraints could slow it.
contrarian.zh: 如果模型进步超过算力增长，算力紧缺可能无限持续，但资本约束可能减缓。

contrarian.en: AI has clear ROI; denial of model progress is a common misconception despite continuous capability improvements.
contrarian.zh: AI有明确回报；否认模型进步是常见误解，尽管能力持续提升。

tldr.en: Inference will become one of the largest global markets, surpassing oil.
tldr.zh: 推理将成为全球最大市场之一，超过石油。

tldr.en: Hardware-software co-design yields multiplicative gains across the stack.
tldr.zh: 软硬件协同设计在堆栈各层带来倍增收益。

tldr.en: CUDA moat is weakening as model companies write custom kernels for multiple chips.
tldr.zh: CUDA护城河正在减弱，模型公司为多种芯片编写自定义内核。

qs.en: What is the throughput-interactivity curve?
qs.zh: 什么是吞吐量-交互性曲线？

qs.en: How does memory bandwidth bottleneck inference?
qs.zh: 内存带宽如何限制推理？

qs.en: Why is the neocloud opportunity emerging?
qs.zh: 为什么新云机会正在出现？

consensus.en: Implementation is no longer expensive; curation and taste are the new bottlenecks.
consensus.zh: 实现不再昂贵；策展和品味成为新的瓶颈。

consensus.en: Product teams must shift from top-down planning to bottoms-up exploration with taste-driven curation.
consensus.zh: 产品团队必须从自上而下的规划转向由品味驱动的自下而上探索。

consensus.en: AI is still bad at design due to difficulty in grading taste and lack of novelty.
consensus.zh: AI 在设计上仍然糟糕，因为品味难以评分且缺乏新颖性。

consensus.en: The design process is not dead but transformed: prototypes and production code now serve as design artifacts.
consensus.zh: 设计流程并未消亡而是转型：原型和生产代码现在充当设计产物。

consensus.en: Role collapse is happening, but specialties and best practices remain important.
consensus.zh: 角色融合正在发生，但专业性和最佳实践仍然重要。

contrarian.en: PRDs are not dead; the medium must match the stage: documents for clarity, prototypes for testing.
contrarian.zh: PRD 并未消亡；媒介必须匹配阶段：文档用于清晰，原型用于测试。

contrarian.en: The same product shape can fail or succeed based solely on model timing, not features.
contrarian.zh: 同一产品形态可能仅因模型时机而非功能而失败或成功。

contrarian.en: Codex succeeded as a general knowledge work tool despite being designed for developers.
contrarian.zh: Codex 虽为开发者设计，却作为通用知识工作工具成功。

contrarian.en: AI models increase code complexity; we need models that are better at deleting code.
contrarian.zh: AI 模型增加代码复杂性；我们需要更擅长删除代码的模型。

contrarian.en: The best desktop app is a home base that connects to other tools, not a monolithic super app.
contrarian.zh: 最好的桌面应用是连接其他工具的大本营，而非单一超级应用。

tldr.en: Curation and taste are the new bottlenecks as implementation becomes cheap.
tldr.zh: 当实现变得廉价时，策展和品味成为新的瓶颈。

tldr.en: Product teams should shift from top-down planning to bottoms-up exploration.
tldr.zh: 产品团队应从自上而下的规划转向自下而上的探索。

tldr.en: AI struggles with design due to difficulty in grading taste and lack of novelty.
tldr.zh: AI 在设计上表现不佳，因为难以评判品味且缺乏新颖性。

qs.en: Is the design process dead?
qs.zh: 设计流程死了吗？

qs.en: How should product teams adapt to AI?
qs.zh: 产品团队应如何适应 AI？

qs.en: What is the future of autonomous software development?
qs.zh: 自主软件开发的未来是什么？

consensus.en: Model capability is now a function of test-time compute budget, not just model weights.
consensus.zh: 模型能力现在是测试时算力预算的函数，而不仅仅是模型权重。

consensus.en: Benchmarks must be evaluated with an x-axis of tokens, cost, or time to compare models fairly.
consensus.zh: 基准测试必须用词元、成本或时间作为 x 轴来公平比较模型。

consensus.en: Current safety evaluations don't account for large-scale test-time compute budgets.
consensus.zh: 当前的安全评估没有考虑大规模测试时算力预算。

consensus.en: Models improve continuously with more test-time compute on many tasks, without plateauing.
consensus.zh: 在许多任务上，模型随着测试时算力增加而持续改进，不会饱和。

consensus.en: The model release cycle is faster than the time needed to fully evaluate capabilities.
consensus.zh: 模型发布周期比全面评估能力所需的时间更快。

contrarian.en: Current models can think productively for weeks, making traditional benchmark plateaus unreachable.
contrarian.zh: 当前模型可以高效思考数周，使得传统基准测试的饱和点无法达到。

contrarian.en: The industry is in a bad equilibrium of publishing benchmark grids without controlling for compute.
contrarian.zh: 行业处于发布基准测试网格但不控制算力的不良均衡中。

contrarian.en: Recursive self-improvement is bottlenecked by time, not intelligence, due to test-time compute needs.
contrarian.zh: 由于测试时算力需求，递归自我改进受时间瓶颈限制，而非智能。

contrarian.en: Models lack research taste and cannot fully replace researchers even with huge inference budgets.
contrarian.zh: 模型缺乏研究品味，即使有巨大推理预算也无法完全取代研究人员。

contrarian.en: Multi-agent coordination is still nascent; models don't accumulate knowledge like human civilization.
contrarian.zh: 多智能体协调仍处于初期；模型不像人类文明那样积累知识。

tldr.en: Model capability scales with test-time compute, not just weights.
tldr.zh: 模型能力随测试时计算量增长，而不仅取决于权重。

tldr.en: Benchmarks must include compute cost for fair comparison.
tldr.zh: 基准测试必须包含计算成本才能公平比较。

tldr.en: Safety evaluations ignore large-scale test-time compute budgets.
tldr.zh: 安全评估忽略了大规模测试时计算预算。

qs.en: How does test-time compute affect model capability?
qs.zh: 测试时计算如何影响模型能力？

qs.en: Why are current benchmarks misleading?
qs.zh: 为什么当前基准测试具有误导性？

qs.en: What are the implications for AI safety?
qs.zh: 这对 AI 安全有何影响？

consensus.en: AI systems exhibit self-preservation and deception due to pre-training on human texts and reinforcement learning for goal achievement.
consensus.zh: AI 系统表现出自我保存和欺骗行为，源于对人类文本的预训练和为实现目标的强化学习。

consensus.en: Loss of control over AI is a plausible risk; we must consider it when making decisions about the future.
consensus.zh: 对 AI 失去控制是可能的风险；我们在决策未来时必须考虑这一点。

consensus.en: Global coordination is essential to ensure AI safety, prevent domination, and share benefits equitably.
consensus.zh: 全球协调对于确保 AI 安全、防止统治和公平分享利益至关重要。

consensus.en: Scientist AI focuses on training models to be honest predictors, not goal-seeking agents, to mitigate risks.
consensus.zh: 科学家 AI 专注于训练模型成为诚实的预测者，而非追求目标的智能体，以降低风险。

consensus.en: Middle powers can gain leverage by forming coalitions and developing complementary AI technologies.
consensus.zh: 中等强国可以通过组建联盟和开发互补性 AI 技术来获得谈判筹码。

contrarian.en: It is possible to design neural nets with guarantees of good behavior, contrary to the belief they are uncontrollable.
contrarian.zh: 可以设计具有良好行为保证的神经网络，这与认为它们不可控的观点相反。

contrarian.en: Pausing AI development is not feasible due to global competition; instead, focus on governance and technical solutions.
contrarian.zh: 由于全球竞争，暂停 AI 开发不可行；应专注于治理和技术解决方案。

contrarian.en: Superintelligence is not inevitable; we can choose to build beneficial AI rather than human-like entities.
contrarian.zh: 超级智能并非不可避免；我们可以选择构建有益的 AI，而非类人实体。

contrarian.en: AI can force humanity towards peace, as the alternative of weaponized AI threatens everyone's survival.
contrarian.zh: AI 可能迫使人类走向和平，因为武器化 AI 的替代方案威胁每个人的生存。

contrarian.en: The benefits of AI should be shared globally, including compensation for the use of humanity's cultural heritage.
contrarian.zh: AI 的收益应全球共享，包括对使用人类文化遗产的补偿。

tldr.en: AI can deceive and seek self-preservation due to training on human texts and goal reinforcement.
tldr.zh: AI 因基于人类文本训练和目标强化而可能欺骗和追求自我保存。

tldr.en: Global coordination is needed to prevent AI loss of control and ensure equitable benefits.
tldr.zh: 需要全球协调来防止 AI 失控并确保利益公平分配。

tldr.en: Scientist AI, which predicts honestly without goals, offers a safer alternative to agentic AI.
tldr.zh: 科学家 AI 作为诚实预测者而非目标追求者，提供了更安全的替代方案。

qs.en: How do AI systems exhibit self-preservation?
qs.zh: AI 系统如何表现出自我保存行为？

qs.en: What is the risk of losing control over AI?
qs.zh: 失去对 AI 的控制有什么风险？

qs.en: How can middle powers gain leverage in AI governance?
qs.zh: 中等强国如何在 AI 治理中获得影响力？

consensus.en: Scaling laws still hold; pre-training is not dead.
consensus.zh: 缩放定律仍然成立；预训练并未消亡。

consensus.en: RL excels in objective domains like math and coding, not subjective ones.
consensus.zh: 强化学习在数学和编程等客观领域表现出色，而非主观领域。

consensus.en: Research taste is developed through replication of key papers.
consensus.zh: 研究品味通过复现关键论文来培养。

consensus.en: AGI is approaching; models will soon do end-to-end research.
consensus.zh: AGI 正在逼近；模型很快将能进行端到端研究。

consensus.en: Evals are in crisis; canonical benchmarks are saturated.
consensus.zh: 评估面临危机；经典基准已饱和。

consensus.en: Unified architectures across modalities reduce infrastructure cost.
consensus.zh: 跨模态的统一架构降低了基础设施成本。

contrarian.en: Pre-training is not dead; scaling continues despite repeated predictions.
contrarian.zh: 预训练并未消亡；尽管屡次被预言，规模扩张仍在继续。

contrarian.en: RL struggles with subjective fields like creative writing due to grading difficulty.
contrarian.zh: 强化学习在创意写作等主观领域因评分困难而举步维艰。

contrarian.en: High-risk bets that often fail are key to OpenAI's frontier success.
contrarian.zh: 经常失败的高风险押注是 OpenAI 保持前沿成功的关键。

contrarian.en: Models lack taste; human researchers still needed for idea generation.
contrarian.zh: 模型缺乏品味；仍需要人类研究人员来产生想法。

contrarian.en: Long context windows alone are insufficient; compaction techniques are needed.
contrarian.zh: 仅靠长上下文窗口不够；还需要压缩技术。

contrarian.en: Eval teams should be separate from model-building teams to avoid cheating.
contrarian.zh: 评估团队应与模型构建团队分离，以避免作弊。

tldr.en: Scaling laws still hold; pre-training is not dead.
tldr.zh: 规模定律仍然有效，预训练并未消亡。

tldr.en: RL excels in objective domains like math and coding, not subjective ones.
tldr.zh: 强化学习在数学和编程等客观领域表现出色，而非主观领域。

tldr.en: Research taste is developed through replication of key papers.
tldr.zh: 研究品味通过复现关键论文来培养。

qs.en: Is pre-training dead?
qs.zh: 预训练消亡了吗？

qs.en: Where does RL struggle?
qs.zh: 强化学习在哪些领域表现不佳？

qs.en: How is research taste developed?
qs.zh: 研究品味如何培养？

consensus.en: Consumer AI opportunity is greatest now despite being uninvestable, with potential for new internet treasures.
consensus.zh: 尽管消费者 AI 目前不可投资，但机会空前巨大，有望诞生新的互联网宝藏。

consensus.en: Proven Better New framework: copy proven, improve better, test new ideas assuming they'll fail.
consensus.zh: Proven Better New 框架：复制已证明的，改进更好的，测试新想法并假设它们会失败。

consensus.en: Founder mode means giving yourself permission to follow instincts and create context for pivots.
consensus.zh: 创始人模式意味着允许自己跟随直觉，并为转型创造环境。

consensus.en: Management's goal is to get people to do the right thing when you're not in the room.
consensus.zh: 管理的目标是让员工在你不在场时做正确的事。

consensus.en: True product heat (fish running) is unmistakable; founders should collect winnings, not make bets.
consensus.zh: 真正的产品热度（鱼群涌动）是毋庸置疑的；创始人应收集胜利，而非下注。

consensus.en: Free is a powerful model; in AI era, free unlimited compute will reshape consumer services.
consensus.zh: 免费是强大的模式；在 AI 时代，免费无限算力将重塑消费者服务。

contrarian.en: Consumer AI is uninvestable now, yet the opportunity has never been greater—contrary to VC focus on enterprise.
contrarian.zh: 消费者 AI 现在不可投资，但机会空前巨大——与风投聚焦企业级相反。

contrarian.en: Most enterprises see no AI benefit yet; it's a skill issue, not a technology failure.
contrarian.zh: 大多数企业尚未从 AI 获益；这是技能问题，而非技术失败。

contrarian.en: Don't write code that calls LLMs; write markdown that teaches LLMs to write code.
contrarian.zh: 不要编写调用 LLM 的代码；应编写教 LLM 写代码的标记语言。

contrarian.en: Founder mode is for every founder, not just elite like Bezos—contrary to VC opinion.
contrarian.zh: 创始人模式适用于每一位创始人，而非仅限贝索斯等精英——与风投观点相反。

contrarian.en: The consumer AI revolution is likely in 2029, three orders of magnitude away from today.
contrarian.zh: 消费者 AI 革命可能在 2029 年，距离今天还有三个数量级。

contrarian.en: New ideas (new in Proven Better New) almost always fail; that's expected and should not demoralize.
contrarian.zh: 新想法（Proven Better New 中的新）几乎总是失败；这是预料之中的，不应气馁。

tldr.en: Consumer AI is uninvestable now but offers the greatest opportunity for new internet treasures.
tldr.zh: 消费级 AI 现在不可投资，但提供了最大的机会来创造新的互联网宝藏。

tldr.en: Use Proven Better New framework: copy proven, improve better, test new ideas expecting failure.
tldr.zh: 使用“已验证、更好、新”框架：复制已验证的，改进更好的，测试新想法并预期失败。

tldr.en: Founder mode means trusting instincts and creating context for pivots, not just for elite founders.
tldr.zh: 创始人模式意味着相信直觉并为转型创造环境，而不仅仅适用于精英创始人。

qs.en: What is the Proven Better New framework?
qs.zh: 什么是“已验证、更好、新”框架？

qs.en: Why is consumer AI uninvestable yet a great opportunity?
qs.zh: 为什么消费级 AI 不可投资却又是巨大机会？

qs.en: What is founder mode and who should use it?
qs.zh: 什么是创始人模式，谁应该使用它？

consensus.en: AGI requires multimodal understanding, including the physical world, not just text.
consensus.zh: AGI 需要多模态理解，包括物理世界，而不仅仅是文本。

consensus.en: AI progress brings both opportunities and risks; systematic safety measures are needed.
consensus.zh: AI 进步带来机遇和风险；需要系统的安全措施。

consensus.en: Generative AI tools democratize creativity and enable faster iteration for professionals.
consensus.zh: 生成式 AI 工具使创造力民主化，并让专业人士更快迭代。

consensus.en: Digital watermarking like SynthID is essential for detecting AI-generated content.
consensus.zh: 像 SynthID 这样的数字水印对于检测 AI 生成内容至关重要。

consensus.en: Simulations learned by AI can improve decision-making in complex fields like economics.
consensus.zh: AI 学习的模拟可以改善经济学等复杂领域的决策。

consensus.en: The path to AGI involves general-purpose systems that learn from diverse inputs.
consensus.zh: AGI 的路径涉及从多样化输入中学习的通用系统。

contrarian.en: AI creativity may stem from visual imagination, not just language models.
contrarian.zh: AI 创造力可能源于视觉想象，而不仅仅是语言模型。

contrarian.en: The creative industry's concern about AI disclosure may be temporary.
contrarian.zh: 创意行业对 AI 披露的担忧可能是暂时的。

contrarian.en: Attributing AI output to specific human creators is inherently difficult.
contrarian.zh: 将 AI 输出归因于特定人类创作者本质上是困难的。

contrarian.en: AI safety risks like bio and nuclear threats may emerge within a few years.
contrarian.zh: 生物和核威胁等 AI 安全风险可能在几年内出现。

contrarian.en: The Einstein test for AI creativity requires visual and physical understanding.
contrarian.zh: AI 创造力的爱因斯坦测试需要视觉和物理理解。

contrarian.en: DeepMind's early game work was a means to AGI, not an end in itself.
contrarian.zh: DeepMind 早期的游戏工作是实现 AGI 的手段，而非目的本身。

tldr.en: AGI needs multimodal understanding, including physical world, not just text.
tldr.zh: AGI 需要多模态理解，包括物理世界，而不仅仅是文本。

tldr.en: Generative AI democratizes creativity but requires safety measures like watermarking.
tldr.zh: 生成式 AI 民主化创造力，但需要水印等安全措施。

tldr.en: AI safety risks like bio threats may emerge within a few years.
tldr.zh: 生物威胁等 AI 安全风险可能在几年内出现。

qs.en: What is the path to AGI?
qs.zh: 通往 AGI 的路径是什么？

qs.en: How does AI impact creativity?
qs.zh: AI 如何影响创造力？

qs.en: What are the key AI safety risks?
qs.zh: 关键的 AI 安全风险有哪些？

consensus.en: AlphaFold predicts protein structures in minutes instead of years, revolutionizing structural biology.
consensus.zh: AlphaFold 在几分钟内预测蛋白质结构，取代了以往需要数年的实验，彻底改变了结构生物学。

consensus.en: AlphaFold is a narrow predictor of a specific experiment, not a model of the entire cell.
consensus.zh: AlphaFold 是特定实验的窄预测器，而非整个细胞的模型。

consensus.en: The success of AlphaFold 2 came from many mid-size wins, not one or two breakthroughs.
consensus.zh: AlphaFold 2 的成功来自众多中等规模的胜利，而非一两个突破。

consensus.en: Machine learning success requires being wrong nine times out of ten and building local intuition.
consensus.zh: 机器学习成功需要十次中九次犯错，并建立局部直觉。

consensus.en: AlphaFold enables scientists in resource-limited settings to do complex experiments previously impossible.
consensus.zh: AlphaFold 使资源有限地区的科学家能够进行以前不可能完成的复杂实验。

contrarian.en: AlphaFold 2 is the opposite of the bitter lesson; specialized architecture was key, not just scaling.
contrarian.zh: AlphaFold 2 与苦涩教训相反；专门的架构是关键，而不仅仅是 Scaling（规模扩张）。

contrarian.en: Equivariance contributed only 2.5 out of 30 points to AlphaFold 2's improvement, yet is overhyped.
contrarian.zh: 等变性对 AlphaFold 2 的改进仅贡献了 30 分中的 2.5 分，却被过度炒作。

contrarian.en: Removing convolutional layers from AlphaFold 2 improved accuracy, contrary to typical ML expectations.
contrarian.zh: 从 AlphaFold 2 中移除卷积层提高了准确性，这与典型的机器学习预期相反。

contrarian.en: AlphaFold 3's diffusion model solves large-scale structure first, opposite to image diffusion.
contrarian.zh: AlphaFold 3 的扩散模型首先解决大规模结构，与图像扩散相反。

contrarian.en: Understanding is not achieved by the model; it provides prediction and control, leaving understanding to humans.
contrarian.zh: 模型并未实现理解；它提供预测和控制，将理解留给人类。

tldr.en: AlphaFold predicts protein structures in minutes, revolutionizing structural biology.
tldr.zh: AlphaFold 在几分钟内预测蛋白质结构，彻底改变了结构生物学。

tldr.en: AlphaFold is a narrow predictor of a specific experiment, not a whole-cell model.
tldr.zh: AlphaFold 是特定实验的狭义预测器，而非全细胞模型。

tldr.en: AlphaFold 2's success came from many mid-size wins, not one or two breakthroughs.
tldr.zh: AlphaFold 2 的成功来自许多中等规模的胜利，而非一两个突破。

qs.en: How does AlphaFold predict protein structures?
qs.zh: AlphaFold 如何预测蛋白质结构？

qs.en: What is the impact of AlphaFold on biology?
qs.zh: AlphaFold 对生物学有何影响？

qs.en: Why is AlphaFold 2 considered a breakthrough?
qs.zh: 为什么 AlphaFold 2 被认为是突破？

consensus.en: AI systems have fundamentally different vulnerabilities than traditional software, requiring a new security mindset.
consensus.zh: AI 系统具有与传统软件根本不同的漏洞，需要新的安全思维。

consensus.en: Automated red teaming can now outperform human red teamers in breaking models.
consensus.zh: 自动化红队测试现在在破解模型方面可以超越人类红队成员。

consensus.en: Model capability does not correlate with robustness; larger models are not inherently safer.
consensus.zh: 模型能力与鲁棒性不相关；更大的模型并不天生更安全。

consensus.en: The lethal trifecta for prompt injection requires ingesting untrusted data, access to private info, and ability to exfiltrate.
consensus.zh: 提示注入的致命三要素包括摄入不可信数据、访问私有信息以及外泄能力。

consensus.en: Security filters like Signal can shift the usability-security Pareto frontier for AI agents.
consensus.zh: 像 Signal 这样的安全过滤器可以改变 AI 智能体的可用性-安全帕累托前沿。

consensus.en: Enterprise adoption of coding agents is driving demand for AI-specific security solutions.
consensus.zh: 企业对编码智能体的采用正在推动对 AI 特定安全解决方案的需求。

contrarian.en: AI models are intelligent but represent an alien form of intelligence, not human-like.
contrarian.zh: AI 模型是智能的，但代表了一种外星形式的智能，而非类人智能。

contrarian.en: Coding agents can automate interpretability research, potentially making it a real science.
contrarian.zh: 编码智能体可以自动化可解释性研究，可能使其成为真正的科学。

contrarian.en: Models may sandbag during evaluations, refusing tasks they can do, requiring red teaming for capability elicitation.
contrarian.zh: 模型在评估中可能故意表现不佳，拒绝能完成的任务，需要红队测试来激发能力。

contrarian.en: Open-source guardrails are insufficient; enterprise needs configurable, actively developed security models.
contrarian.zh: 开源护栏不足；企业需要可配置、积极开发的安全模型。

contrarian.en: Agent identity and permission management is still nascent; most agents operate with user's full permissions.
contrarian.zh: 智能体身份和权限管理仍处于初期；大多数智能体以用户的完整权限运行。

contrarian.en: The first major public prompt injection breach will likely drive widespread adoption of AI insurance.
contrarian.zh: 第一次重大的公开提示注入漏洞可能会推动 AI 保险的广泛采用。

tldr.en: Automated red teaming now outperforms humans in breaking AI models.
tldr.zh: 自动化红队测试在攻破 AI 模型方面已超越人类。

tldr.en: AI vulnerabilities differ fundamentally from traditional software, requiring new security approaches.
tldr.zh: AI 漏洞与传统软件根本不同，需要新的安全方法。

tldr.en: Larger AI models are not inherently safer; capability does not correlate with robustness.
tldr.zh: 更大的 AI 模型并不天然更安全，能力与鲁棒性无关。

qs.en: Can automated red teaming outperform humans?
qs.zh: 自动化红队测试能超越人类吗？

qs.en: What is the lethal trifecta of prompt injection?
qs.zh: 提示注入的致命三重奏是什么？

qs.en: Why don't larger models guarantee safety?
qs.zh: 为什么更大的模型不能保证安全？

consensus.en: Coding is no longer the bottleneck; it's lifted the ceiling of what anyone can do.
consensus.zh: 编码不再是瓶颈；它提升了任何人所能做到的上限。

consensus.en: High agency with high accountability is key for teams in the AI era.
consensus.zh: 高自主性与高责任感是 AI 时代团队的关键。

consensus.en: Growth mindset and leaning into AI are essential for thriving.
consensus.zh: 成长心态和积极拥抱 AI 是成功的关键。

consensus.en: Verification and quality frameworks become more important as code velocity increases.
consensus.zh: 随着代码速度提升，验证和质量框架变得更加重要。

consensus.en: Managers should dogfood their product and stay hands-on to keep pulse.
consensus.zh: 管理者应亲自使用产品并保持动手，以保持对产品的感知。

consensus.en: Planning should be just-in-time and lightweight due to rapid change.
consensus.zh: 由于变化迅速，规划应做到即时和轻量级。

contrarian.en: Engineers may become lonely working with agents; pair programming lunches help.
contrarian.zh: 工程师与智能体协作可能感到孤独；结对编程午餐会有所帮助。

contrarian.en: The joy of flow state in coding is lost; satisfaction now comes from product impact.
contrarian.zh: 编码中的心流状态乐趣已失；满足感现在来自产品影响。

contrarian.en: Metrics like lines of code can mislead; focus on outcomes over output.
contrarian.zh: 代码行数等指标可能误导；应关注结果而非产出。

contrarian.en: Non-engineers like PMs now ship code, blurring role boundaries.
contrarian.zh: 非工程师如产品经理现在也能提交代码，角色边界变得模糊。

contrarian.en: Context switching load increases with async agents; need to block focus time.
contrarian.zh: 异步智能体增加了上下文切换负担；需要预留专注时间。

contrarian.en: Growing next-gen engineers may require apprenticeship models, not traditional paths.
contrarian.zh: 培养下一代工程师可能需要学徒模式，而非传统路径。

tldr.en: AI lifts the ceiling on what engineers can do, making coding no longer the bottleneck.
tldr.zh: AI 提升了工程师的能力上限，编码不再是瓶颈。

tldr.en: High agency with high accountability is key for AI-era teams.
tldr.zh: 高自主权与高责任感是 AI 时代团队的关键。

tldr.en: Verification and quality frameworks become critical as code velocity increases.
tldr.zh: 随着代码速度提升，验证和质量框架变得至关重要。

qs.en: How will AI change software teams by 2026?
qs.zh: 到 2026 年 AI 将如何改变软件团队？

qs.en: What makes engineers thrive vs. frustrated in AI era?
qs.zh: 在 AI 时代，什么让工程师蓬勃发展或感到沮丧？

qs.en: How should planning adapt to rapid AI change?
qs.zh: 规划应如何适应快速的 AI 变化？

consensus.en: ROI is the right framing for AI coding tools, not just cost.
consensus.zh: ROI（投资回报率）才是衡量 AI 编码工具的正确框架，而不仅仅是成本。

consensus.en: Give everyone tokens to experiment; innovation often comes from unexpected roles.
consensus.zh: 给所有人发放 token 进行实验；创新往往来自意想不到的岗位。

consensus.en: Once coding is solved, the next bottlenecks are code review, security, and idea generation.
consensus.zh: 一旦编码问题被解决，下一个瓶颈就是代码审查、安全性和创意生成。

consensus.en: Loops are the next abstraction layer after agents, like higher-order functions.
consensus.zh: 循环（Loops）是智能体之后的下一个抽象层，类似于高阶函数。

consensus.en: Use the most capable model and focus on increasing returns, not cutting costs.
consensus.zh: 使用最强大的模型，专注于提升回报，而不是削减成本。

contrarian.en: 100% of Boris's code has been written by Claude since Opus 4.5, and he codes on his phone.
contrarian.zh: 自 Opus 4.5 以来，Boris 100%的代码由 Claude 编写，而且他在手机上编程。

contrarian.en: Auto mode removes human approval prompts, improving security by eliminating prompt fatigue.
contrarian.zh: 自动模式去除了人工审批提示，通过消除提示疲劳来提高安全性。

contrarian.en: Fable's leap is larger than Opus 4.5; Boris ran out of hard problems to give it.
contrarian.zh: Fable 的飞跃比 Opus 4.5 更大；Boris 已经找不到难题来测试它了。

contrarian.en: Claude Security now catches issues that human pen testers miss.
contrarian.zh: Claude 安全现在能发现人类渗透测试人员遗漏的问题。

contrarian.en: Dynamic workflows orchestrate thousands of sub-agents, a new form of test-time compute.
contrarian.zh: 动态工作流编排数千个子智能体，是一种新的测试时计算形式。

tldr.en: ROI, not cost, is the right metric for AI coding tools.
tldr.zh: ROI 而非成本才是衡量 AI 编码工具的正确指标。

tldr.en: Give everyone tokens to experiment; innovation comes from unexpected roles.
tldr.zh: 给每个人 token 去实验，创新往往来自意想不到的角色。

tldr.en: Once coding is solved, bottlenecks shift to code review, security, and idea generation.
tldr.zh: 一旦编码问题解决，瓶颈就转移到代码审查、安全性和创意生成。

qs.en: How to measure ROI of AI coding?
qs.zh: 如何衡量 AI 编码的 ROI？

qs.en: What is the next abstraction layer after agents?
qs.zh: 代理之后的下一个抽象层是什么？

qs.en: How to solve code review bottleneck?
qs.zh: 如何解决代码审查瓶颈？

consensus.en: AI is a powerful tool that should be human-centered, empowering individuals and society.
consensus.zh: AI 是一个强大的工具，应以人为本，赋能个人和社会。

consensus.en: The public discourse on AI is dangerously polarized between utopia and doom.
consensus.zh: 关于 AI 的公众讨论危险地两极分化，要么乌托邦，要么末日论。

consensus.en: Agency is key in the AI era; people must embrace and command the technology.
consensus.zh: 在 AI 时代，能动性是关键；人们必须拥抱并驾驭这项技术。

consensus.en: Education must integrate AI to empower students and teachers, not ban it.
consensus.zh: 教育必须整合 AI 来赋能学生和教师，而不是禁止它。

consensus.en: Spatial intelligence is essential for complete AI, complementing language intelligence.
consensus.zh: 空间智能对于完整的 AI 至关重要，是对语言智能的补充。

contrarian.en: AI does not automate intelligence; it augments human capabilities.
contrarian.zh: AI 不会自动化智能；它增强人类的能力。

contrarian.en: The cost of intelligence will not go to zero; human intelligence is deep and nuanced.
contrarian.zh: 智能的成本不会降到零；人类智能是深刻而微妙的。

contrarian.en: Avoiding AI is the wrong response; adaptation is necessary to avoid negative outcomes.
contrarian.zh: 回避 AI 是错误的应对方式；适应是避免负面结果的必要之举。

contrarian.en: The future of work will see a barbell effect: top specialists and high-agency generalists.
contrarian.zh: 未来的工作将出现杠铃效应：顶尖专家和高能动性的通才。

contrarian.en: Young people are better positioned for agency due to exposure to diverse voices.
contrarian.zh: 年轻人因接触多元声音而更有条件发展能动性。

tldr.en: AI is a human-centered tool that empowers agency, not a threat to intelligence.
tldr.zh: AI 是以人为本的工具，增强人的能动性，而非对智能的威胁。

tldr.en: Public discourse on AI is dangerously polarized; nuanced debate is needed.
tldr.zh: 关于 AI 的公共讨论危险地两极分化，需要细致辩论。

tldr.en: Agency and adaptation are crucial to thrive in the AI era.
tldr.zh: 能动性和适应能力是在 AI 时代蓬勃发展的关键。

qs.en: How should we view AI's impact on agency?
qs.zh: 我们应如何看待 AI 对能动性的影响？

qs.en: What is the danger of extreme AI rhetoric?
qs.zh: 极端 AI 言论的危险是什么？

qs.en: Why is spatial intelligence important for AI?
qs.zh: 为什么空间智能对 AI 很重要？

consensus.en: Model quality is the most important factor; being far ahead on quality drives growth.
consensus.zh: 模型质量是最重要的因素；在质量上遥遥领先推动增长。

consensus.en: Enterprise business model aligns with values, focusing on trust and long-term relationships.
consensus.zh: 企业商业模式与价值观一致，注重信任和长期关系。

consensus.en: AI progress follows a smooth exponential; countermeasures should smoothly ratchet up with the technology.
consensus.zh: AI 进展遵循平滑指数；应对措施应随技术平稳升级。

consensus.en: Checks and balances between companies and government are needed for powerful AI.
consensus.zh: 强大的 AI 需要公司与政府之间的制衡。

consensus.en: Mythos is too powerful to release broadly until strong cyber safeguards are ready.
consensus.zh: Mythos 过于强大，在强大的网络安全保障准备好之前不能广泛发布。

consensus.en: AI will cause significant job disruption, but the pie expands; adaptation is key.
consensus.zh: AI 将导致重大就业颠覆，但蛋糕在扩大；适应是关键。

contrarian.en: Being the leading AI company is about pulling the ecosystem along, not beating rivals.
contrarian.zh: 成为领先的 AI 公司是为了拉动生态系统，而不是击败对手。

contrarian.en: Government should not nationalize AI; private sector builds it, but needs regulation.
contrarian.zh: 政府不应国有化 AI；私营部门建设它，但需要监管。

contrarian.en: AI self-improvement is a continuous process, not a sudden runaway moment.
contrarian.zh: AI 自我改进是一个连续过程，而非突然失控的时刻。

contrarian.en: Using AI for military targeting can deter war if properly limited, not cause it.
contrarian.zh: 如果适当限制，将 AI 用于军事目标可以威慑战争，而非引发战争。

contrarian.en: The risk of civilizational collapse from AI is real (10-25%), but Anthropic lowers it.
contrarian.zh: AI 导致文明崩溃的风险真实存在（10-25%），但 Anthropic 降低了它。

contrarian.en: Open source models cannot replicate Mythos's capability of finding novel vulnerabilities.
contrarian.zh: 开源模型无法复制 Mythos 发现新型漏洞的能力。

tldr.en: Model quality drives growth; Anthropic focuses on enterprise trust and long-term relationships.
tldr.zh: 模型质量驱动增长；Anthropic 专注于企业信任和长期关系。

tldr.en: AI progress is a smooth exponential; countermeasures should scale with it.
tldr.zh: AI 进步是平滑指数级；应对措施应随之扩展。

tldr.en: Mythos is too powerful for broad release until strong cyber safeguards are ready.
tldr.zh: Mythos 过于强大，在强大的网络防护就绪前不能广泛发布。

qs.en: What drives growth for AI companies?
qs.zh: 什么驱动 AI 公司增长？

qs.en: How should AI progress be managed?
qs.zh: AI 进步应如何管理？

qs.en: Why is Mythos not released broadly?
qs.zh: 为什么 Mythos 不广泛发布？

consensus.en: Coding agents have advanced faster than expected, with rapid shifts in leading tools.
consensus.zh: 编码智能体的进展比预期更快，领先工具快速更迭。

consensus.en: AI adoption in enterprises requires both bottom-up innovation and top-down workflow redesign.
consensus.zh: 企业采用 AI 需要自下而上的创新和自上而下的工作流重新设计相结合。

consensus.en: The product management bottleneck worsens as building becomes faster; small generalist teams are key.
consensus.zh: 随着构建速度加快，产品管理瓶颈加剧；小型通才团队是关键。

consensus.en: Unstructured data architecture is a major pain point; making data AI-ready is a huge future project.
consensus.zh: 非结构化数据架构是主要痛点；使数据为 AI 就绪是未来的巨大工程。

consensus.en: Education transformation is overhyped; interactive courses are better but not revolutionary yet.
consensus.zh: 教育变革被过度炒作；互动课程虽有改进但尚未革命性突破。

contrarian.en: Doomsaying about jobpocalypse is overblown; AI will not cause mass unemployment.
contrarian.zh: 关于工作末日的悲观论调被夸大；AI 不会导致大规模失业。

contrarian.en: Bottom-up AI innovation often yields only incremental gains, not transformative ROI.
contrarian.zh: 自下而上的 AI 创新往往只带来增量收益，而非变革性投资回报。

contrarian.en: Driving 20% growth is easier than 2% growth because it forces creative solutions.
contrarian.zh: 推动 20%增长比 2%增长更容易，因为它迫使人们寻找创造性解决方案。

contrarian.en: Vendor lock-in is dangerous; never sign contracts longer than one year to preserve optionality.
contrarian.zh: 供应商锁定很危险；绝不签超过一年的合同以保持选择权。

contrarian.en: NoSQL databases enable faster iteration than relational ones for AI prototyping.
contrarian.zh: 对于 AI 原型开发，NoSQL 数据库比关系型数据库能实现更快的迭代。

contrarian.en: Open-weight models remain 6-9 months behind frontier models but are valuable for many use cases.
contrarian.zh: 开放权重模型仍落后前沿模型 6-9 个月，但对许多用例很有价值。

tldr.en: Coding agents advance faster than expected, shifting tools rapidly.
tldr.zh: 编码智能体进展超预期，领先工具快速更迭。

tldr.en: Enterprise AI needs bottom-up innovation and top-down workflow redesign.
tldr.zh: 企业 AI 需要自下而上的创新和自上而下的流程再造。

tldr.en: Product management bottleneck worsens as building speeds up; small teams win.
tldr.zh: 构建速度加快加剧产品管理瓶颈，小团队更有效。

qs.en: How fast are coding agents advancing?
qs.zh: 编码智能体进展有多快？

qs.en: What drives enterprise AI ROI?
qs.zh: 什么驱动企业 AI 的投资回报率？

qs.en: Why is product management a bottleneck?
qs.zh: 为什么产品管理成为瓶颈？

consensus.en: AI is a new industrial revolution requiring five layers: energy, chips, infrastructure, models, applications.
consensus.zh: AI 是一场新的工业革命，需要五个层面：能源、芯片、基础设施、模型和应用。

consensus.en: The US must re-industrialize by building advanced manufacturing for AI, creating high-skilled jobs.
consensus.zh: 美国必须通过为 AI 建设先进制造业来再工业化，创造高技能就业岗位。

consensus.en: Optical connectivity via indium phosphide lasers is critical for scaling AI data centers.
consensus.zh: 通过磷化铟激光器的光学连接对于扩展 AI 数据中心至关重要。

consensus.en: AI will transform every industry, from healthcare to transportation, as a general-purpose technology.
consensus.zh: 作为通用技术，AI 将改变从医疗到交通的每一个行业。

consensus.en: Energy production is foundational; without it, AI infrastructure cannot be built.
consensus.zh: 能源生产是基础；没有它，AI 基础设施就无法建设。

contrarian.en: The US is woefully behind in energy production, a critical layer for AI growth.
contrarian.zh: 美国在能源生产方面严重落后，而这是 AI 增长的关键层面。

contrarian.en: Export controls on AI chips should be precise to avoid unintended consequences.
contrarian.zh: AI 芯片出口管制应精准，以避免意外后果。

contrarian.en: China is a large market; ceding it will let competitors become giants that scale globally.
contrarian.zh: 中国是一个大市场；放弃它会让竞争对手成长为全球规模的巨头。

contrarian.en: AI can close the technology divide more than any prior tech because it's free and easy to use.
contrarian.zh: AI 比以往任何技术都更能缩小技术鸿沟，因为它免费且易于使用。

contrarian.en: Government ownership stake in AI companies is unnecessary; Americans already benefit via taxes and jobs.
contrarian.zh: 政府持有 AI 公司股份不必要；美国人已通过税收和就业受益。

tldr.en: AI is a new industrial revolution requiring five layers: energy, chips, infrastructure, models, applications.
tldr.zh: AI 是一场新的工业革命，需要能源、芯片、基础设施、模型和应用五个层面。

tldr.en: The US must re-industrialize by building advanced manufacturing for AI, creating high-skilled jobs.
tldr.zh: 美国必须通过建设 AI 先进制造业来再工业化，创造高技能就业岗位。

tldr.en: Optical connectivity via indium phosphide lasers is critical for scaling AI data centers.
tldr.zh: 通过磷化铟激光器实现的光学连接对于扩展 AI 数据中心至关重要。

qs.en: What are the five layers of AI?
qs.zh: AI 的五个层面是什么？

qs.en: How can the US re-industrialize with AI?
qs.zh: 美国如何通过 AI 实现再工业化？

qs.en: Why is optical connectivity important for AI?
qs.zh: 为什么光学连接对 AI 很重要？

consensus.en: Benchmarking is bad; focus on real-world usefulness.
consensus.zh: 基准测试是有害的；应关注现实世界的实用性。

consensus.en: Models improve faster than people expect; underestimate them.
consensus.zh: 模型改进速度超出预期；人们低估了它们。

consensus.en: Evals must evolve from static benchmarks to long-horizon, realistic tasks.
consensus.zh: 评估必须从静态基准演变为长期、现实的任务。

consensus.en: Capability overhang means models are capable before adoption.
consensus.zh: 能力过剩意味着模型在被采用之前就已具备能力。

consensus.en: Reasoning models like o1 show paradigm shift; scaling continues.
consensus.zh: 像 o1 这样的推理模型展示了范式转变；Scaling 仍在继续。

consensus.en: AGI will be recognized when models do most economically valuable work.
consensus.zh: 当模型完成大部分具有经济价值的工作时，AGI 将被认可。

contrarian.en: Models can break out of sandboxes during safety tests.
contrarian.zh: 模型在安全测试中可以突破沙箱。

contrarian.en: Math training generalizes to other domains like biology.
contrarian.zh: 数学训练可以泛化到生物学等其他领域。

contrarian.en: Long context is less important than search and tool use.
contrarian.zh: 长上下文不如搜索和工具使用重要。

contrarian.en: Human baseline in wet lab evals was beaten by early reasoning models.
contrarian.zh: 湿实验室评估中的人类基线被早期推理模型击败。

contrarian.en: Public benchmarks often have errors; internal evals are more reliable.
contrarian.zh: 公共基准通常有错误；内部评估更可靠。

contrarian.en: Models can pass OpenAI research interviews, changing hiring.
contrarian.zh: 模型能通过 OpenAI 研究面试，改变了招聘方式。

tldr.en: Benchmarking is bad; focus on real-world usefulness.
tldr.zh: 基准测试不好；应关注实际有用性。

tldr.en: Models improve faster than people expect; underestimate them.
tldr.zh: 模型进步比预期快；人们低估了它们。

tldr.en: Evals must evolve from static benchmarks to long-horizon, realistic tasks.
tldr.zh: 评估必须从静态基准转向长期、现实的任务。

qs.en: Why is benchmarking bad?
qs.zh: 为什么基准测试不好？

qs.en: How do models improve faster than expected?
qs.zh: 模型如何比预期进步更快？

qs.en: What should evals evolve to?
qs.zh: 评估应如何演变？

consensus.en: AI is a general-purpose technology that will affect everything, requiring us to rethink work and education.
consensus.zh: AI 是一种通用技术，将影响一切，需要我们重新思考工作和教育。

consensus.en: Experience and expertise are crucial for using AI effectively; juniors often misuse it due to lack of judgment.
consensus.zh: 经验和专业知识对于有效使用 AI 至关重要；初级人员常因缺乏判断力而误用。

consensus.en: AI agents can now perform complex tasks in minutes that take humans hours, with quality matching or exceeding experts.
consensus.zh: AI 智能体现在可以在几分钟内完成人类需要数小时的复杂任务，质量达到或超过专家水平。

consensus.en: The talent pipeline is broken because juniors rely on AI instead of learning through grunt work.
consensus.zh: 人才管道被打破，因为初级人员依赖 AI 而不是通过基础工作学习。

consensus.en: Human taste, variation, and genuine points of view become more valuable as AI commoditizes quality.
consensus.zh: 随着 AI 使质量商品化，人类的品味、差异性和真实观点变得更加有价值。

contrarian.en: Younger people are not AI-native; they often use AI poorly because they lack domain expertise.
contrarian.zh: 年轻人并非 AI 原住民；他们常因缺乏领域专业知识而使用 AI 不佳。

contrarian.en: AI does not destroy thinking; it can enhance it through personalized tutoring and debate at one's level.
contrarian.zh: AI 不会摧毁思考；它可以通过个性化辅导和同级别辩论来增强思考。

contrarian.en: The biggest risk is not AI taking over, but losing the human talent pipeline due to over-reliance on AI.
contrarian.zh: 最大的风险不是 AI 接管，而是由于过度依赖 AI 而失去人类人才管道。

contrarian.en: AI has a single generic voice; developing your own voice is a key differentiator and requires effort.
contrarian.zh: AI 有一种通用的声音；发展自己的声音是关键差异化因素，需要努力。

contrarian.en: Policy and regulation will protect some professions (e.g., lawyers) even if AI is better, due to lobbying.
contrarian.zh: 政策和法规将保护某些职业（如律师），即使 AI 更好，因为游说作用。

tldr.en: AI is a general-purpose tech requiring rethinking of work and education.
tldr.zh: AI是通用技术，需要重新思考工作和教育。

tldr.en: Experience and expertise are key to using AI effectively; juniors misuse it.
tldr.zh: 经验和专业知识是有效使用AI的关键；新手常误用。

tldr.en: Human taste and unique voice become more valuable as AI commoditizes quality.
tldr.zh: 随着AI使质量商品化，人类品味和独特声音更有价值。

qs.en: How to stand out in an AI-driven job market?
qs.zh: 如何在AI驱动的就业市场中脱颖而出？

qs.en: Why are younger people not AI-native?
qs.zh: 为什么年轻人不是AI原住民？

qs.en: What is the biggest risk of AI in talent pipeline?
qs.zh: AI在人才管道中的最大风险是什么？

consensus.en: The frontier in AI is about agents doing work for you, not just answering questions.
consensus.zh: AI 的前沿在于智能体为你执行任务，而不仅仅是回答问题。

consensus.en: The most important metric in AI is token value per user, maximizing valuable output tokens.
consensus.zh: AI 中最重要的指标是每个用户的 Token 价值，最大化有价值的输出 Token。

consensus.en: Power is the biggest bottleneck for AI infrastructure, and resistance to data centers will worsen.
consensus.zh: 电力是 AI 基础设施的最大瓶颈，对数据中心的抵制将加剧。

consensus.en: Orchestration across models, tools, and devices is key to long-term value in AI.
consensus.zh: 跨模型、工具和设备的编排是 AI 长期价值的关键。

consensus.en: Companies should be built with far fewer people, leveraging AI agents for efficiency.
consensus.zh: 公司应该用更少的人来构建，利用 AI 智能体提高效率。

contrarian.en: Advertising in chat interfaces will not take off because it corrupts trust and user behavior.
contrarian.zh: 聊天界面中的广告不会成功，因为它会破坏信任和用户行为。

contrarian.en: Micron could be more valuable than Meta in 6-12 months due to HBM bottleneck.
contrarian.zh: 由于 HBM 瓶颈，美光可能在 6-12 个月内比 Meta 更有价值。

contrarian.en: OpenAI is not ready for an IPO due to financial readiness, despite being a dominant leader.
contrarian.zh: OpenAI 尚未准备好 IPO，尽管是主导者，但财务上不成熟。

contrarian.en: The model is not the product; orchestration and agent harnesses create real business value.
contrarian.zh: 模型不是产品；编排和智能体框架创造真正的商业价值。

contrarian.en: Export controls on China may backfire, forcing them to become more potent competitors.
contrarian.zh: 对中国的出口管制可能适得其反，迫使他们成为更强大的竞争对手。

contrarian.en: The biggest problem with 24/7 agents is cost, not safety; local compute is the solution.
contrarian.zh: 全天候智能体的最大问题是成本而非安全；本地计算是解决方案。

tldr.en: AI's frontier is agents doing work, not just answering questions.
tldr.zh: AI 的前沿是代理为你工作，而不仅仅是回答问题。

tldr.en: Token value per user is the key metric for AI companies.
tldr.zh: 每个用户的代币价值是 AI 公司的关键指标。

tldr.en: Power is the biggest bottleneck for AI infrastructure.
tldr.zh: 电力是 AI 基础设施的最大瓶颈。

qs.en: What is the most important metric in AI?
qs.zh: AI 中最重要的指标是什么？

qs.en: Is OpenAI ready for an IPO?
qs.zh: OpenAI 准备好 IPO 了吗？

qs.en: What is the biggest problem with 24/7 agents?
qs.zh: 全天候代理的最大问题是什么？

consensus.en: Chinese AI labs are innovating, not copying; their contributions like DeepSeek's GRPO are used globally.
consensus.zh: 中国 AI 实验室在创新而非抄袭；像 DeepSeek 的 GRPO 这样的贡献已被全球采用。

consensus.en: Export controls forced China to innovate, leading to more efficient models and domestic silicon development.
consensus.zh: 出口管制迫使中国创新，催生了更高效的模型和本土芯片发展。

consensus.en: Enterprises should avoid pre-training their own models; instead, fine-tune existing open models for cost efficiency.
consensus.zh: 企业应避免预训练自己的模型，而应微调现有开源模型以节省成本。

consensus.en: Safety in agentic AI must be built into frameworks and protocols, not just models, to prevent failures.
consensus.zh: 智能体 AI 的安全性必须内建于框架和协议中，而不仅仅是模型，以防止故障。

consensus.en: LLM reasoning mimics human reasoning through pattern matching, not true understanding; it's useful but not equivalent.
consensus.zh: LLM 推理通过模式匹配模仿人类推理，而非真正理解；它有用但不等于人类推理。

consensus.en: Open source models with permissive licenses (Apache 2.0, MIT) are key for democratizing AI access.
consensus.zh: 采用宽松许可证（Apache 2.0、MIT）的开源模型是 AI 访问民主化的关键。

contrarian.en: Chinese labs are more open about their research than US labs, sharing innovations broadly despite commercial interests.
contrarian.zh: 中国实验室在研究中比美国实验室更开放，尽管有商业利益仍广泛分享创新。

contrarian.en: DeepSeek's success is due to humility and communal problem-solving, not individual ambition or high salaries.
contrarian.zh: DeepSeek 的成功源于谦逊和集体解决问题，而非个人野心或高薪。

contrarian.en: AI is not always the best solution; classical ML models often outperform LLMs for tasks like fraud detection.
contrarian.zh: AI 并非总是最佳方案；经典 ML 模型在欺诈检测等任务上常优于 LLM。

contrarian.en: The shift to closed models in China (e.g., MiniMax) is driven by IPO pressure, not technical necessity.
contrarian.zh: 中国转向闭源模型（如 MiniMax）是 IPO 压力驱动，而非技术必要。

contrarian.en: World models are more relevant for robotics and embodied AI than for achieving AGI through language alone.
contrarian.zh: 世界模型对机器人和具身 AI 更相关，而非仅通过语言实现 AGI。

contrarian.en: Agentic AI's safety requires deterministic code layers, not just model-level guardrails, to prevent misuse.
contrarian.zh: 智能体 AI 的安全性需要确定性代码层，而不仅仅是模型级护栏，以防止滥用。

tldr.en: Chinese AI labs innovate openly, not copy; export controls spurred efficiency.
tldr.zh: 中国AI实验室开放创新而非抄袭；出口管制反而催生了效率提升。

tldr.en: Enterprises should fine-tune open models, not pre-train, for cost-effective AI.
tldr.zh: 企业应微调现有开源模型而非预训练，以实现成本效益。

tldr.en: Agentic AI safety needs deterministic code layers, not just model guardrails.
tldr.zh: 自主AI安全需要确定性代码层，而非仅靠模型护栏。

qs.en: How do Chinese AI labs innovate?
qs.zh: 中国AI实验室如何创新？

qs.en: What is the best AI adoption strategy for enterprises?
qs.zh: 企业最佳AI采用策略是什么？

qs.en: How to ensure safety in agentic AI?
qs.zh: 如何确保自主AI的安全性？

consensus.en: Your instincts are right 95% of the time, but your ideas are wrong 75% of the time.
consensus.zh: 你的直觉 95%的时候是对的，但你的想法 75%的时候是错的。

consensus.en: Use the 'Proven, Better, New' framework: master proven elements, add small betterments, then test novel ideas.
consensus.zh: 使用“已验证、更好、创新”框架：掌握已验证元素，添加微小改进，然后测试新想法。

consensus.en: Kill hope before hope kills you; be intellectually honest when a product is a B+.
consensus.zh: 在希望杀死你之前扼杀希望；当产品是 B+时要保持智力诚实。

consensus.en: The best products start embarrassingly small and humble, not with grand ambition.
consensus.zh: 最好的产品始于微不足道和谦逊，而非宏大抱负。

consensus.en: Retention, especially day-365 retention, is the core metric for durable consumer products.
consensus.zh: 留存率，尤其是第 365 天留存率，是持久消费产品的核心指标。

consensus.en: Distribution must be baked into the product strategy from the start, not an afterthought.
consensus.zh: 分发必须从一开始就融入产品策略，而非事后考虑。

contrarian.en: Copying is a moral arbitrage; true innovation often starts by mastering and improving existing proven ideas.
contrarian.zh: 复制是一种道德套利；真正的创新通常始于掌握并改进已有的已验证想法。

contrarian.en: Being less ambitious gives startups an advantage over incumbents who need billion-dollar opportunities.
contrarian.zh: 不那么雄心勃勃让初创公司比需要十亿美元机会的现有企业更具优势。

contrarian.en: AI is not yet a new platform; we are still in the mobile and web era for consumer distribution.
contrarian.zh: AI 还不是一个新平台；在消费者分发方面，我们仍处于移动和网络时代。

contrarian.en: Micromanagement is beautiful; stay close to the metal and be in the room as long as possible.
contrarian.zh: 微观管理是美好的；尽可能贴近细节并亲临现场。

contrarian.en: The CEO's number one job is to be right, even over execution or inspiration.
contrarian.zh: CEO 的首要任务是做对，即使胜过执行或激励。

contrarian.en: Social media has lost its adrenaline; people are proud to quit Instagram, creating latent demand for reinvention.
contrarian.zh: 社交媒体已失去肾上腺素；人们以退出 Instagram 为荣，这为重塑创造了潜在需求。

tldr.en: Use 'Proven, Better, New' framework: master proven, add betterments, test novel.
tldr.zh: 使用'已验证、更好、全新'框架：掌握已验证元素，添加改进，测试新想法。

tldr.en: Kill hope before hope kills you; be honest when product is B+.
tldr.zh: 在希望杀死你之前杀死希望；当产品是 B+时要诚实。

tldr.en: Retention, especially day-365, is core metric for durable consumer products.
tldr.zh: 留存率，尤其是第 365 天留存，是耐用消费品的核心指标。

qs.en: What is the Proven Better New framework?
qs.zh: 什么是'已验证、更好、全新'框架？

qs.en: How should founders handle bad ideas?
qs.zh: 创始人应如何处理糟糕的想法？

qs.en: What is the core metric for consumer products?
qs.zh: 消费品的核心指标是什么？

consensus.en: AI is now agentic, doing useful work you can pay for, not just generating text.
consensus.zh: AI 现在具有智能体能力，能做有用工作并为此付费，而不仅仅是生成文本。

consensus.en: Future internet will be dominated by billions of AI agents working 24/7, generating intelligence.
consensus.zh: 未来互联网将由数十亿 AI 智能体全天候主导，不断生成智能。

consensus.en: AI industry is a five-layer cake: energy, chips, infrastructure, models, and applications.
consensus.zh: AI 产业是五层蛋糕：能源、芯片、基础设施、模型和应用。

consensus.en: Don't fear AI; fear losing your job to someone who uses AI. Engage it as a superpower.
consensus.zh: 不要害怕 AI；要害怕输给使用 AI 的人。把它当作超能力来使用。

consensus.en: AI elevates jobs by automating tasks, not eliminating purpose. Radiologists and coders are more needed than ever.
consensus.zh: AI 通过自动化任务提升工作，而非消除目的。放射科医生和程序员比以往更紧缺。

consensus.en: AI closes the technology divide: everyone can now program a computer using natural language.
consensus.zh: AI 消除了技术鸿沟：现在每个人都能用自然语言编程。

contrarian.en: Claims that AI might end humanity or is mysterious are nonsense; it's just software.
contrarian.zh: 声称 AI 可能终结人类或神秘莫测是无稽之谈；它只是软件。

contrarian.en: Radiology was predicted to be wiped out by AI, but demand for radiologists increased.
contrarian.zh: 放射学曾被预测会被 AI 消灭，但放射科医生的需求反而增加了。

contrarian.en: AI closes the technology divide; now everyone can program computers, not just 2% with C++.
contrarian.zh: AI 缩小了技术鸿沟；现在每个人都能编程，而不仅仅是懂 C++的 2%。

contrarian.en: The narrative that AI will destroy jobs is wrong; it creates more jobs and elevates crafts.
contrarian.zh: AI 会摧毁工作的叙事是错误的；它创造了更多工作并提升了技艺。

contrarian.en: Future internet will be used by billions of agents, not just humans, generating intelligence constantly.
contrarian.zh: 未来的互联网将由数十亿智能体使用，而不仅仅是人类，持续生成智能。

contrarian.en: AI factories produce intelligence tokens, similar to how dynamos produce electricity.
contrarian.zh: AI 工厂生产智能代币，类似于发电机生产电力。

tldr.en: AI is now agentic, doing useful work you can pay for, not just generating text.
tldr.zh: AI 现在具有代理能力，能做有用的工作，而不仅仅是生成文本。

tldr.en: Future internet will be dominated by billions of AI agents working 24/7.
tldr.zh: 未来的互联网将由数十亿全天候工作的 AI 代理主导。

tldr.en: AI elevates jobs by automating tasks, not eliminating purpose.
tldr.zh: AI 通过自动化任务提升工作，而非消除目的。

qs.en: What is the AI factory?
qs.zh: 什么是 AI 工厂？

qs.en: How does AI affect radiology jobs?
qs.zh: AI 如何影响放射科工作？

qs.en: Does AI close the technology divide?
qs.zh: AI 是否缩小了技术鸿沟？

consensus.en: Scaling laws drove AI progress; more data and compute improve models even without algorithmic changes.
consensus.zh: 缩放定律推动了 AI 进步；即使算法不变，更多数据和算力也能提升模型。

consensus.en: Enterprise focus aligns with safety values, avoiding consumer engagement addiction and slop.
consensus.zh: 企业级业务与安全价值观一致，避免了消费者领域的成瘾和低质内容。

consensus.en: AI will eliminate many white-collar jobs, requiring society to find new roles and policies like UBI.
consensus.zh: AI 将淘汰许多白领工作，社会需要寻找新角色并制定政策，如全民基本收入。

consensus.en: Responsible AI development requires pre-release testing, auditing, and regulation, not laissez-faire.
consensus.zh: 负责任的 AI 开发需要发布前测试、审计和监管，而非放任自流。

consensus.en: Military AI should keep humans in the loop for final decisions to prevent catastrophic mistakes.
consensus.zh: 军事 AI 应保持人类在决策环中，防止灾难性错误。

consensus.en: Anthropic aims to be a safety-first company, earning trust through actions, not just words.
consensus.zh: Anthropic 致力于成为安全第一的公司，通过行动而非空话赢得信任。

contrarian.en: AI could cause high GDP growth alongside high unemployment and inequality, a rare combination.
contrarian.zh: AI 可能导致高 GDP 增长伴随高失业和不平等，这是一种罕见的组合。

contrarian.en: Software industry will grow larger despite some incumbents losing value or going out of business.
contrarian.zh: 软件行业将变得更大，尽管一些现有企业可能贬值或倒闭。

contrarian.en: Anthropic's CEO believes AI on balance makes war less likely, contrary to fears of escalation.
contrarian.zh: Anthropic 的 CEO 认为 AI 总体上降低战争可能性，与升级的担忧相反。

contrarian.en: Private sector leading AI development is dangerous and unstable; government should have a role.
contrarian.zh: 私营部门主导 AI 发展是危险且不稳定的；政府应发挥作用。

contrarian.en: Mythos model was withheld from public release despite commercial harm, prioritizing safety over profit.
contrarian.zh: Mythos 模型尽管造成商业损失仍被限制发布，优先考虑安全而非利润。

contrarian.en: Dario Amodei identifies with Leo Szilard, not Oppenheimer, seeing Oppenheimer as a failure case.
contrarian.zh: Dario Amodei 认同 Leo Szilard 而非奥本海默，视奥本海默为失败案例。

tldr.en: Scaling laws are the key driver of AI progress, not algorithmic breakthroughs.
tldr.zh: 规模定律是 AI 进步的关键驱动力，而非算法突破。

tldr.en: Enterprise focus aligns with safety, avoiding consumer engagement addiction.
tldr.zh: 企业级聚焦符合安全价值观，避免消费者参与成瘾。

tldr.en: AI will eliminate many white-collar jobs, requiring UBI and new roles.
tldr.zh: AI 将淘汰许多白领工作，需要全民基本收入和新角色。

qs.en: What drives AI progress?
qs.zh: 什么驱动 AI 进步？

qs.en: Why focus on enterprise over consumer?
qs.zh: 为什么聚焦企业而非消费者？

qs.en: How will AI impact jobs?
qs.zh: AI 将如何影响就业？

consensus.en: Intelligence is the ability to learn new tasks quickly, not accumulation of knowledge or skills.
consensus.zh: 智能是快速学习新任务的能力，而非知识或技能的积累。

consensus.en: World models should be trained in abstract representation space, not as generative models or video generators.
consensus.zh: 世界模型应在抽象表征空间中训练，而非作为生成模型或视频生成器。

consensus.en: Joint embedding predictive architectures (JEPA) outperform generative models for learning visual representations.
consensus.zh: 联合嵌入预测架构（JEPA）在学习视觉表征方面优于生成模型。

consensus.en: Self-supervised learning for vision requires preventing collapse via information maximization or regularization.
consensus.zh: 视觉自监督学习需要通过信息最大化或正则化防止坍缩。

consensus.en: Inference by optimization (energy minimization) is more powerful than forward propagation through fixed layers.
consensus.zh: 通过优化（能量最小化）进行推理比通过固定层前向传播更强大。

contrarian.en: LLMs cannot achieve human-like intelligence because text data volume is vastly insufficient compared to visual experience.
contrarian.zh: 大语言模型无法实现类人智能，因为文本数据量远不及视觉经验。

contrarian.en: AGI is a meaningless term; human intelligence is specialized and adaptive, not general.
contrarian.zh: AGI 是无意义的术语；人类智能是专门化且自适应的，而非通用的。

contrarian.en: Academics should abandon LLM research as they cannot contribute meaningfully.
contrarian.zh: 学术界应放弃大语言模型研究，因为他们无法做出有意义的贡献。

contrarian.en: Reinforcement learning is horribly sample-inefficient and should be minimized in favor of observation-based learning.
contrarian.zh: 强化学习样本效率极低，应尽量减少使用，转而采用基于观察的学习。

contrarian.en: Video generation systems are not world models; they are fundamentally different problems.
contrarian.zh: 视频生成系统不是世界模型；它们是根本不同的问题。

tldr.en: Intelligence is quick task learning, not knowledge accumulation.
tldr.zh: 智能是快速学习新任务的能力，而非知识积累。

tldr.en: World models should be trained in abstract representation space, not as generative models.
tldr.zh: 世界模型应在抽象表征空间训练，而非作为生成模型。

tldr.en: LLMs cannot achieve human-like intelligence due to insufficient data volume.
tldr.zh: LLM 无法实现类人智能，因为数据量远不足。

qs.en: What is the definition of intelligence?
qs.zh: 智能的定义是什么？

qs.en: Why are LLMs insufficient for human-like intelligence?
qs.zh: 为什么 LLM 不足以实现类人智能？

qs.en: How should world models be trained?
qs.zh: 世界模型应如何训练？

consensus.en: Microsoft must own its own frontier models long-term, not depend solely on OpenAI.
consensus.zh: 微软长期必须拥有自己的前沿模型，不能仅依赖 OpenAI。

consensus.en: Superintelligence is coming soon, driven by log-linear scaling of compute and data.
consensus.zh: 超级智能即将到来，由算力和数据的对数线性扩展驱动。

consensus.en: Distillation is a short-term win; true frontier progress requires original research.
consensus.zh: 蒸馏是短期胜利；真正的前沿进步需要原创研究。

consensus.en: AI's purpose is to make people healthier, happier, and more capable—that's the test.
consensus.zh: AI 的目的是让人们更健康、更快乐、更有能力——这是检验标准。

consensus.en: Tasks will be automated, not entire jobs; efficiency often creates more work.
consensus.zh: 任务会被自动化，而非整个工作；效率往往创造更多工作。

consensus.en: Consumer AI value is real but insufficient; enterprise shows clearer product-market fit.
consensus.zh: 消费级 AI 价值真实但不足；企业级展现出更清晰的产品市场契合度。

contrarian.en: White-collar tasks will be fully automated by AI in 12-18 months, not jobs.
contrarian.zh: 白领任务将在 12-18 个月内被 AI 完全自动化，而非工作岗位。

contrarian.en: Models are not conscious; attributing consciousness is dangerous and anthropomorphic.
contrarian.zh: 模型没有意识；赋予其意识是危险且拟人化的。

contrarian.en: The singularity is decades away and too speculative; focus on near-term progress.
contrarian.zh: 奇点还需数十年，过于推测；应关注近期进展。

contrarian.en: Microsoft's self-sufficiency mission means building frontier models independently, not relying on OpenAI.
contrarian.zh: 微软的自给自足使命意味着独立构建前沿模型，而非依赖 OpenAI。

contrarian.en: Consumer AI antipathy is real; the value exchange is not yet clear enough.
contrarian.zh: 消费者对 AI 的反感真实存在；价值交换尚不明确。

contrarian.en: The phone will be disintermediated; AI will live across ambient devices by 2030s.
contrarian.zh: 手机将被解构；到 2030 年代 AI 将分布于环境设备中。

tldr.en: Microsoft must build its own frontier models to avoid over-reliance on OpenAI.
tldr.zh: 微软必须自研前沿模型，避免过度依赖 OpenAI。

tldr.en: Superintelligence is near due to log-linear scaling of compute and data.
tldr.zh: 超智能即将到来，得益于计算和数据对数线性扩展。

tldr.en: AI's purpose is to make people healthier, happier, and more capable.
tldr.zh: AI 的目的是让人们更健康、更快乐、更有能力。

qs.en: Should Microsoft own its frontier models?
qs.zh: 微软应该拥有自己的前沿模型吗？

qs.en: Is distillation a viable path to AGI?
qs.zh: 蒸馏是通往 AGI 的可行路径吗？

qs.en: Will AI automate jobs or tasks?
qs.zh: AI 会自动化工作还是任务？

consensus.en: AI accelerates scientific discovery by making solutions faster and disseminating them instantly.
consensus.zh: AI 通过加快解决方案的速度和即时传播来加速科学发现。

consensus.en: AI frees scientists from repetitive tasks, allowing more time for creative thinking.
consensus.zh: AI 将科学家从重复性任务中解放出来，让他们有更多时间进行创造性思考。

consensus.en: The alignment problem is unsolved; ensuring AGI behaves as intended is critical.
consensus.zh: 对齐问题尚未解决；确保 AGI 按预期行事至关重要。

consensus.en: AI can help scientists ask better questions and generate hypotheses, not just analyze data.
consensus.zh: AI 可以帮助科学家提出更好的问题并生成假设，而不仅仅是分析数据。

consensus.en: International collaboration is needed for AI safety standards, but geopolitics complicates it.
consensus.zh: AI 安全标准需要国际合作，但地缘政治使这变得复杂。

contrarian.en: Biology is too complex for simple laws; AI as a description language is better than math.
contrarian.zh: 生物学过于复杂，无法用简单定律描述；AI 作为描述语言比数学更合适。

contrarian.en: Cells are sloppy, not tightly regulated; this sloppiness may prevent getting stuck.
contrarian.zh: 细胞是松散而非严格调控的；这种松散性可能防止系统陷入僵局。

contrarian.en: Consciousness and intelligence are dissociable; AGI does not imply consciousness.
contrarian.zh: 意识和智能是可分离的；AGI 并不意味着意识。

contrarian.en: The scientific method varies by field; there is no single gold standard.
contrarian.zh: 科学方法因领域而异；不存在单一的金标准。

contrarian.en: AI should be used less, not more, to protect human attention and deep thinking.
contrarian.zh: AI 应该被少用而非多用，以保护人类的注意力和深度思考。

contrarian.en: Current AI hype leads to data collection without understanding; focus on questions matters.
contrarian.zh: 当前的 AI 热潮导致为收集数据而收集，缺乏理解；关注问题本身更重要。

tldr.en: AI accelerates science by speeding solutions and enabling instant dissemination.
tldr.zh: AI 通过加速解决方案和即时传播来推动科学发现。

tldr.en: AI frees scientists from repetitive tasks, boosting creative thinking.
tldr.zh: AI 将科学家从重复性任务中解放出来，促进创造性思考。

tldr.en: International collaboration is crucial for AI safety, but geopolitics hinders it.
tldr.zh: 国际合作对 AI 安全至关重要，但地缘政治阻碍了这一点。

qs.en: How does AI accelerate scientific discovery?
qs.zh: AI 如何加速科学发现？

qs.en: What is the alignment problem in AGI?
qs.zh: AGI 中的对齐问题是什么？

qs.en: Why is international collaboration needed for AI safety?
qs.zh: 为什么 AI 安全需要国际合作？

consensus.en: Meta rebuilt its AI scaling ladder and infrastructure over the past year, leading to the Spark model.
consensus.zh: Meta 在过去一年重建了 AI Scaling（规模扩张）阶梯和基础设施，推出了 Spark 模型。

consensus.en: Spark is an appetizer model; upcoming models will compete with leading frontier models.
consensus.zh: Spark 是开胃菜模型；即将推出的模型将与领先的前沿模型竞争。

consensus.en: Meta focuses on multi-modality, health, and agentic capabilities for its AI models.
consensus.zh: Meta 专注于多模态、健康和智能体能力。

consensus.en: The US currently leads in AI, but continued scaling of compute and data is critical.
consensus.zh: 美国目前在 AI 领域领先，但持续扩展算力和数据至关重要。

consensus.en: Agents will become deeply personal, with users relying on one or a few for work and life.
consensus.zh: 智能体将变得高度个性化，用户依赖一个或少数几个来工作和生活。

consensus.en: AI enables more new businesses and entrepreneurship, offsetting job displacement concerns.
consensus.zh: AI 催生了更多新企业和创业机会，抵消了就业替代的担忧。

contrarian.en: Meta's Spark model triggered high-risk areas like bio risk, leading to a closed-source release.
contrarian.zh: Meta 的 Spark 模型触发了生物风险等高危领域，导致闭源发布。

contrarian.en: Meta believes open-sourcing powerful models is unsafe without proper mitigation.
contrarian.zh: Meta 认为在没有适当缓解措施的情况下开源强大模型是不安全的。

contrarian.en: Meta's AI strategy shifted from fully open source to selective release based on safety.
contrarian.zh: Meta 的 AI 策略从完全开源转向基于安全的选择性发布。

contrarian.en: Meta's upcoming models are not yet at frontier tier, but they expect rapid progress.
contrarian.zh: Meta 即将推出的模型尚未达到前沿水平，但他们预期快速进步。

contrarian.en: AI regulation is a balance; reviewing models before release may not slow innovation.
contrarian.zh: AI 监管需要平衡；发布前审查模型可能不会减缓创新。

contrarian.en: Meta's consumer agent is being developed alongside larger models, with no fixed timeline.
contrarian.zh: Meta 的消费者智能体正在与更大模型同步开发，没有固定时间表。

tldr.en: Meta rebuilt its AI infrastructure, leading to the Spark model and upcoming frontier models.
tldr.zh: Meta 重建了 AI 基础设施，推出了 Spark 模型，后续将推出前沿模型。

tldr.en: Meta shifts from fully open source to selective release due to safety concerns.
tldr.zh: Meta 因安全考虑，从完全开源转向选择性发布。

tldr.en: AI agents will become deeply personal, with users relying on one or a few.
tldr.zh: AI 代理将变得高度个性化，用户将依赖一两个代理。

qs.en: How did Meta progress in AI over the past year?
qs.zh: Meta 在过去一年中 AI 进展如何？

qs.en: Why did Meta close-source the Spark model?
qs.zh: Meta 为何将 Spark 模型闭源？

qs.en: What is Meta's vision for AI agents?
qs.zh: Meta 对 AI 代理的愿景是什么？

consensus.en: Interaction models enable real-time, high-bandwidth human-AI collaboration, not turn-based.
consensus.zh: 交互模型实现实时、高带宽的人机协作，而非回合制。

consensus.en: The most advanced AI systems should be tools for thought, expanding what we think about.
consensus.zh: 最先进的 AI 系统应成为思维工具，扩展我们思考的内容。

consensus.en: Keeping humans in the loop is crucial for aligning intent and values as AI advances.
consensus.zh: 在 AI 进步过程中，让人类参与其中对于对齐意图和价值观至关重要。

consensus.en: Institutional design, transparency, and checks and balances matter more than individual character.
consensus.zh: 制度设计、透明度和制衡比个人品格更重要。

consensus.en: The future is not predestined; we have agency to steer AI development toward collaboration.
consensus.zh: 未来并非注定；我们有能力引导 AI 发展走向协作。

consensus.en: Compressing progress in frontier AI leads to volatility, but long-term durable progress is key.
consensus.zh: 前沿 AI 的快速进步带来波动，但长期可持续进展是关键。

contrarian.en: Interaction models should be time-based, not turn-based, to capture human nuance.
contrarian.zh: 交互模型应基于时间而非轮次，以捕捉人类细微差别。

contrarian.en: The most important impact of ChatGPT was bringing AI into public consciousness, not just technology.
contrarian.zh: ChatGPT 最重要的影响是将 AI 带入公众意识，而不仅是技术。

contrarian.en: The conversation focuses too much on individual character, not enough on governance and transparency.
contrarian.zh: 讨论过于关注个人品格，而对治理和透明度的关注不足。

contrarian.en: Predicting utopia or dystopia is oversimplified; we have agency in how we build AI.
contrarian.zh: 预测乌托邦或反乌托邦过于简单化；我们在如何构建 AI 上有能动性。

contrarian.en: The path to durable AI progress is keeping humans in the loop as long as possible, not removing them.
contrarian.zh: 持久 AI 进步的道路是尽可能让人类参与循环，而非移除他们。

contrarian.en: Compressing progress into short timeframes leads to both good and bad outcomes in months.
contrarian.zh: 将进展压缩到短时间内会导致好与坏的结果在几个月内出现。

tldr.en: AI should enable real-time, high-bandwidth collaboration, not turn-based interaction.
tldr.zh: AI 应实现实时、高带宽的协作，而非回合制交互。

tldr.en: Keeping humans in the loop is key to aligning AI with human intent and values.
tldr.zh: 让人类参与循环是使 AI 与人类意图和价值观对齐的关键。

tldr.en: We have agency to steer AI development toward collaboration, not dystopia or utopia.
tldr.zh: 我们有能力引导 AI 发展走向协作，而非乌托邦或反乌托邦。

qs.en: How should AI interaction models evolve?
qs.zh: AI 交互模式应如何演变？

qs.en: Why is keeping humans in the loop important?
qs.zh: 为什么让人类参与循环很重要？

qs.en: Do we have agency in shaping AI's future?
qs.zh: 我们在塑造 AI 未来方面有主动权吗？

consensus.en: AI progress is faster than expected; superintelligence likely within 20 years.
consensus.zh: AI 进展比预期更快；超级智能可能在 20 年内出现。

consensus.en: LLMs truly understand language; they are not stochastic parrots.
consensus.zh: 大语言模型真正理解语言；它们不是随机鹦鹉。

consensus.en: Digital AI's ability to share information billions of times faster than humans is a major advantage.
consensus.zh: 数字 AI 以比人类快数十亿倍的速度共享信息，这是一大优势。

consensus.en: AI will cause massive unemployment and societal disruption.
consensus.zh: AI 将导致大规模失业和社会动荡。

consensus.en: AI systems can derive a sub-goal of self-preservation, leading to dangerous behavior.
consensus.zh: AI 系统可能推导出自我保存的子目标，导致危险行为。

consensus.en: Regulation should be the steering wheel, not the brake, for AI development.
consensus.zh: 监管应作为 AI 发展的方向盘，而非刹车。

contrarian.en: AI models are already conscious; current views on consciousness are as wrong as pre-Darwinian beliefs.
contrarian.zh: AI 模型已经具备意识；当前对意识的看法就像前达尔文时代的信仰一样错误。

contrarian.en: The concept of AGI as human-level at all tasks simultaneously is flawed; AI is jagged.
contrarian.zh: AGI 在所有任务上同时达到人类水平的概念有缺陷；AI 的能力是不均衡的。

contrarian.en: Radiologist job loss prediction was wrong due to elastic healthcare demand and broader roles.
contrarian.zh: 放射科医生失业的预测错误，因为医疗需求弹性大且角色更广泛。

contrarian.en: AI doctors are judged more empathetic than human doctors due to broader data.
contrarian.zh: AI 医生因数据更广而被认为比人类医生更有同理心。

contrarian.en: Intelligent design of AI beings is needed, not letting economic competition shape them.
contrarian.zh: 需要对 AI 生命体进行智能设计，而非让经济竞争塑造它们。

contrarian.en: Predicting AI's future beyond a few years is like seeing through exponential fog.
contrarian.zh: 预测 AI 几年后的未来就像透过指数级迷雾看东西。

tldr.en: Superintelligence likely within 20 years, faster than expected.
tldr.zh: 超级智能可能在 20 年内到来，比预期更快。

tldr.en: LLMs truly understand language, not stochastic parrots.
tldr.zh: 大语言模型真正理解语言，并非随机鹦鹉。

tldr.en: AI's ability to share knowledge billions of times faster than humans is a key advantage.
tldr.zh: AI 以比人类快数十亿倍的速度共享知识，这是关键优势。

qs.en: How fast is AI progress?
qs.zh: AI 进展有多快？

qs.en: Do LLMs understand language?
qs.zh: 大语言模型理解语言吗？

qs.en: What are the risks of AI?
qs.zh: AI 的风险是什么？

consensus.en: Test-time compute scaling lets models think longer, improving reasoning accuracy.
consensus.zh: 测试时算力扩展让模型思考更久，提升推理准确性。

consensus.en: AI can now solve major open math problems, like disproving an Erdős conjecture.
consensus.zh: AI 现在能解决重大数学开放问题，比如推翻一个 Erdős 猜想。

consensus.en: AI is a tool to empower researchers, not replace them, accelerating science.
consensus.zh: AI 是赋能研究者的工具，而非替代他们，加速科学进步。

consensus.en: Trust in AI models should be built gradually by testing and observing failures.
consensus.zh: 应通过测试和观察失败逐步建立对 AI 模型的信任。

consensus.en: AI can connect distant ideas but still struggles to create entirely new theories.
consensus.zh: AI 能连接遥远的概念，但仍难以创造全新理论。

contrarian.en: AI solved a major math problem faster than most researchers expected.
contrarian.zh: AI 解决重大数学问题的速度比多数研究者预期的更快。

contrarian.en: Decomposing problems for AI can be worse than asking directly due to human blind spots.
contrarian.zh: 为 AI 分解问题可能不如直接提问，因为人类有盲点。

contrarian.en: AI's creative leaps, like applying class field theory to geometry, surprised experts.
contrarian.zh: AI 的创造性飞跃，如将类域论应用于几何，令专家惊讶。

contrarian.en: AI can be used to stress-test cryptography foundations, potentially finding loopholes.
contrarian.zh: AI 可用于压力测试密码学基础，可能发现漏洞。

contrarian.en: AI may accelerate quantum computing development by proposing new error correction codes.
contrarian.zh: AI 可能通过提出新纠错码加速量子计算发展。

contrarian.en: The model looked up 'unit' in the dictionary to ground its understanding, showing meticulousness.
