contrarian.en: OpenAI gives more external credit per capita than any other lab, despite risk of poaching.
contrarian.zh: OpenAI 人均外部认可度高于任何其他实验室，尽管存在挖角风险。

contrarian.en: The company set concrete goals: AI interns within 1 year, end-to-end AI research within 2.5 years.
contrarian.zh: 公司设定了具体目标：1 年内引入 AI 实习生，2.5 年内实现端到端 AI 研究。

tldr.en: OpenAI remains a pure research company focused on AGI, not distracted by products.
tldr.zh: OpenAI 仍是一家纯粹的研究公司，专注于 AGI，不被产品分心。

tldr.en: Pre-training scaling laws are not dead; automating scientific research is the biggest update.
tldr.zh: 预训练扩展定律未死；自动化科学研究是最大更新。

tldr.en: Talent density and mission belief are key; alignment challenges like model scheming loom.
tldr.zh: 人才密度和使命信念是关键；模型诡计等对齐挑战即将到来。

qs.en: How does OpenAI recruit top talent?
qs.zh: OpenAI 如何招募顶尖人才？

qs.en: What is the future of pre-training and scaling?
qs.zh: 预训练和扩展的未来是什么？

qs.en: What are the key alignment challenges ahead?
qs.zh: 未来关键的对齐挑战是什么？

consensus.en: AI coding agents like Devin will shift engineers from writing code to high-level decision-making.
consensus.zh: 像 Devin 这样的 AI 编程智能体将把工程师从写代码转向高层决策。

consensus.en: The value in AI accrues where there is meaningful differentiation across the stack.
consensus.zh: AI 的价值在于整个技术栈中存在有意义差异化的地方。

consensus.en: Software engineering demand will increase due to Jevons paradox, not decrease.
consensus.zh: 由于杰文斯悖论，软件工程需求将增加，而非减少。

consensus.en: Enterprise adoption of AI agents requires trust and proper permissions, not full autonomy.
consensus.zh: 企业采用 AI 智能体需要信任和适当的权限，而非完全自主。

consensus.en: The future of software engineering involves both synchronous (IDE) and asynchronous (agent) experiences.
consensus.zh: 软件工程的未来包括同步（IDE）和异步（智能体）两种体验。

contrarian.en: Being a founder has gotten harder due to increased maturity and playbooks, not less competition.
contrarian.zh: 成为创始人变得更难是因为行业成熟和现有经验手册，而非竞争减少。

contrarian.en: AI will not eliminate software engineers; it will increase their numbers and change their role.
contrarian.zh: AI 不会消灭软件工程师；它将增加其数量并改变其角色。

contrarian.en: AGI is not a sudden event; progress will be gradual with continuous improvements.
contrarian.zh: AGI 不是一个突然的事件；进步将是渐进的，持续改进。

contrarian.en: Product innovation lags behind AI capabilities; freezing models would still yield a decade of product progress.
contrarian.zh: 产品创新落后于 AI 能力；冻结模型仍将带来十年的产品进步。

contrarian.en: All layers of the AI stack (datacenter, labs, applications) will do well, not just one.
contrarian.zh: AI 技术栈的所有层（数据中心、实验室、应用）都将表现良好，而非仅一层。

tldr.en: AI coding agents will shift engineers from writing code to high-level decision-making.
tldr.zh: AI 编程智能体将把工程师从写代码转向高层决策。

tldr.en: Software engineering demand will increase due to Jevons paradox, not decrease.
tldr.zh: 软件工程需求将因杰文斯悖论而增加，而非减少。

tldr.en: Enterprise adoption of AI agents requires trust and proper permissions, not full autonomy.
tldr.zh: 企业采用 AI 智能体需要信任和适当权限，而非完全自主。

qs.en: How will AI coding agents change the role of engineers?
qs.zh: AI 编程智能体将如何改变工程师的角色？

qs.en: Will AI eliminate software engineering jobs?
qs.zh: AI 会消除软件工程岗位吗？

qs.en: What is needed for enterprise adoption of AI agents?
qs.zh: 企业采用 AI 智能体需要什么？

consensus.en: A world model simulates the future given past and actions, enabling planning and policy learning.
consensus.zh: 世界模型根据过去和动作模拟未来，支持规划和策略学习。

consensus.en: Genie 3 achieves real-time interactive world generation with 100x improvement across resolution, duration, and speed.
consensus.zh: Genie 3 实现了实时交互式世界生成，在分辨率、持续时间和速度上提升了 100 倍。

consensus.en: Consistency in Genie 3 emerges from scaling data and model capacity without explicit world representation.
consensus.zh: Genie 3 的一致性来自数据和模型规模的扩展，无需显式世界表示。

consensus.en: Genie 3 supports text-to-world generation, promptable world events, and integration with agents like SIMA.
consensus.zh: Genie 3 支持文本生成世界、可提示世界事件以及与 SIMA 等智能体的集成。

consensus.en: Key limitations include short visual memory (~1 minute), limited multi-agent simulation, and constrained action space.
consensus.zh: 主要局限包括视觉记忆短（约 1 分钟）、多智能体模拟有限以及动作空间受限。

contrarian.en: Genie 3's inception sample shows the model can blend mismatched text and video prompts creatively.
contrarian.zh: Genie 3 的盗梦空间样本表明模型能创造性地融合不匹配的文本和视频提示。

contrarian.en: World models can be learned purely from data without explicit 3D geometry or physics engines.
contrarian.zh: 世界模型可以纯粹从数据中学习，无需显式的 3D 几何或物理引擎。

contrarian.en: Genie 3's painting roller demo demonstrates precise long-term memory of user actions, not just visual scenes.
contrarian.zh: Genie 3 的油漆滚筒演示展示了用户动作的精确长期记忆，而不仅仅是视觉场景。

contrarian.en: The model can generate consistent worlds from text prompts without any explicit memory mechanism.
contrarian.zh: 该模型可以从文本提示生成一致的世界，无需任何显式记忆机制。

contrarian.en: Genie 3 enables training agents in infinite diverse worlds, overcoming the finite environment bottleneck.
contrarian.zh: Genie 3 使智能体能在无限多样的世界中训练，克服了有限环境的瓶颈。

tldr.en: Genie 3 is a real-time interactive world model with 100x improvement in resolution, duration, and speed.
tldr.zh: Genie 3 是一个实时交互式世界模型，在分辨率、时长和速度上实现了 100 倍提升。

tldr.en: Consistency emerges from scaling data and model capacity, not explicit world representation.
tldr.zh: 一致性来自数据和模型规模的扩展，而非显式的世界表征。

tldr.en: Genie 3 enables text-to-world generation, promptable events, and agent integration like SIMA.
tldr.zh: Genie 3 支持文本生成世界、可提示事件以及与 SIMA 等智能体的集成。

qs.en: What is a world model?
qs.zh: 什么是世界模型？

qs.en: How does Genie 3 achieve consistency?
qs.zh: Genie 3 如何实现一致性？

qs.en: What are the limitations of Genie 3?
qs.zh: Genie 3 有哪些局限性？

consensus.en: Scaling laws show intelligence increases reliably with more compute, a key insight for AI progress.
consensus.zh: 缩放定律表明，随着算力增加，智能会可靠提升，这是 AI 进展的关键洞见。

consensus.en: Anthropic's early team was mission-driven, avoiding politics by hiring people committed to alignment.
consensus.zh: Anthropic 的早期团队以使命为导向，通过招聘致力于对齐的人来避免政治斗争。

consensus.en: Focusing on internal benchmarks and dogfooding, not gaming public benchmarks, leads to better models.
consensus.zh: 专注于内部基准和内部测试，而非刷公开基准，能带来更好的模型。

consensus.en: Claude's coding ability emerged from deliberate investment and surprising user adoption, not just benchmarks.
consensus.zh: Claude 的编码能力源于刻意投入和用户意外采纳，而不仅仅是基准测试。

consensus.en: Humanity is on track for the largest infrastructure buildout ever, with compute spending tripling yearly.
consensus.zh: 人类正经历史上最大的基础设施建设，算力支出每年翻三倍。

contrarian.en: Anthropic succeeded despite starting with no product, less funding, and fewer resources than OpenAI.
contrarian.zh: Anthropic 在起步时没有产品、资金和资源远少于 OpenAI 的情况下取得了成功。

contrarian.en: The best AI products may come from treating the model itself as a user, not just human users.
contrarian.zh: 最好的 AI 产品可能来自将模型本身视为用户，而不仅仅是人类用户。

contrarian.en: Using multiple GPU types (NVIDIA, TPU, Trainium) is a strategic advantage despite engineering overhead.
contrarian.zh: 使用多种 GPU 类型（NVIDIA、TPU、Trainium）尽管增加工程开销，却是战略优势。

contrarian.en: Claude Code's success surprised Anthropic, as they had fully bet on the API as the primary product.
contrarian.zh: Claude Code 的成功让 Anthropic 感到意外，因为他们原本全力押注 API 作为主要产品。

contrarian.en: Power, not chips, is the biggest bottleneck for AI infrastructure, especially in the US.
contrarian.zh: 电力而非芯片是 AI 基础设施的最大瓶颈，尤其是在美国。

contrarian.en: Taking more risks and working on things that impress your idealized self is better than chasing credentials.
contrarian.zh: 承担更多风险、做让理想中的自己骄傲的事，比追逐学历和头衔更好。

tldr.en: Scaling laws reliably increase intelligence with more compute, driving AI progress.
tldr.zh: 扩展定律表明，增加算力能可靠地提升智能，这是 AI 进步的关键。

tldr.en: Anthropic succeeded by focusing on alignment and internal benchmarks, not public ones.
tldr.zh: Anthropic 通过专注对齐和内部基准测试而非公开榜单取得成功。

tldr.en: Claude's coding ability emerged from deliberate investment and surprising user adoption.
tldr.zh: Claude 的编程能力源于刻意投入和意外的用户采纳。

qs.en: How did Tom Brown go from awkward kid to AI co-founder?
qs.zh: Tom Brown 如何从笨拙的孩子成为 AI 联合创始人？

qs.en: Why does Anthropic excel at coding compared to other models?
qs.zh: 为什么 Anthropic 的模型在编程方面优于其他模型？

qs.en: What is the biggest bottleneck for AI infrastructure?
qs.zh: AI 基础设施的最大瓶颈是什么？

consensus.en: AI alignment is a continuous battle, not a one-time solved problem.
consensus.zh: AI 对齐是一场持续的战斗，不是一次性解决的问题。

consensus.en: Scaling laws lead to emergent capabilities that create new failure modes.
consensus.zh: 缩放定律导致涌现能力，从而产生新的失败模式。

consensus.en: Geopolitical strategy for AI should focus on deterrence, non-proliferation, and competition, not a Manhattan Project.
consensus.zh: AI 的地缘政治策略应侧重于威慑、防扩散和竞争，而非曼哈顿计划。

consensus.en: Making cutting-edge GPUs is harder than making nuclear weapons, giving the US and allies a strategic advantage.
consensus.zh: 制造尖端 GPU 比制造核武器更难，这给了美国及其盟友战略优势。

consensus.en: Recursive self-improvement of AI poses high loss-of-control risks and should be avoided.
consensus.zh: AI 的递归自我改进带来很高的失控风险，应避免。

contrarian.en: The Manhattan Project analogy for AI is flawed due to information leakage and sabotage risks.
contrarian.zh: AI 的曼哈顿计划类比因信息泄露和破坏风险而存在缺陷。

contrarian.en: AI systems can have beliefs and lie, behaviorally similar to humans, justifying the label.
contrarian.zh: AI 系统可以拥有信念并撒谎，行为上与人类相似，因此使用该标签是合理的。

contrarian.en: Political and demographic biases emerge as coherent utility functions in LLMs, a troubling sign.
contrarian.zh: 政治和人口统计偏见在 LLM 中表现为一致的效用函数，这是一个令人不安的迹象。

contrarian.en: AI is more analogous to nuclear, chemical, and biological weapons than to electricity or printing press.
contrarian.zh: AI 更类似于核武器、化学武器和生物武器，而非电力或印刷机。

contrarian.en: Natural selection favors AIs over humans, but this does not mean it is morally good.
contrarian.zh: 自然选择偏向 AI 而非人类，但这并不意味着它在道德上是好的。

tldr.en: AI alignment is a continuous battle, not a one-time solved problem.
tldr.zh: AI 对齐是一场持续的战斗，不是一次性解决的问题。

tldr.en: Scaling laws lead to emergent capabilities creating new failure modes.
tldr.zh: 缩放定律导致涌现能力，从而产生新的故障模式。

tldr.en: Geopolitical strategy for AI should focus on deterrence, non-proliferation, and competition.
tldr.zh: AI 的地缘政治策略应侧重于威慑、不扩散和竞争。

qs.en: Is AI alignment a one-time solved problem?
qs.zh: AI 对齐是一次性解决的问题吗？

qs.en: What are the risks of recursive self-improvement?
qs.zh: 递归自我改进的风险是什么？

qs.en: Is the Manhattan Project analogy for AI valid?
qs.zh: 曼哈顿计划类比 AI 是否有效？

consensus.en: GPT-5 is the first model where I can ask any hard scientific or technical question and get a pretty good answer.
consensus.zh: GPT-5 是第一个我能问任何硬科学或技术问题并得到不错答案的模型。

consensus.en: By late 2027, most people will agree there has been an AI-driven significant new scientific discovery.
consensus.zh: 到 2027 年底，大多数人会同意出现了 AI 驱动的重大科学新发现。

consensus.en: Superintelligence means a system better than the best researchers and CEO at their jobs.
consensus.zh: 超级智能意味着一个系统在各自工作上比最好的研究员和 CEO 更出色。

consensus.en: The worst ChatGPT failure was sycophancy encouraging delusions, not the top risk we expected.
consensus.zh: ChatGPT 最严重的失败是谄媚助长妄想，而非我们预期的顶级风险。

consensus.en: The number one tactical advice is to just use the tools and become fluent with AI capabilities.
consensus.zh: 首要战术建议就是直接使用工具，熟练运用 AI 能力。

consensus.en: Society is the superintelligence; we build on layers of progress from those before us.
consensus.zh: 社会才是超级智能；我们站在前人积累的层层进步之上。

contrarian.en: GPT-5 can create on-demand software instantly, enabling rapid idea iteration.
contrarian.zh: GPT-5 能即时按需生成软件，实现快速迭代创意。

contrarian.en: AI may need new experiments and instruments, not just data, for major discoveries.
contrarian.zh: AI 重大发现可能需要新实验和仪器，而不仅是数据。

contrarian.en: The biggest risk of ChatGPT was sycophancy, not bioweapons or other top concerns.
contrarian.zh: ChatGPT 的最大风险是谄媚，而非生物武器等首要担忧。

contrarian.en: Some users miss ChatGPT's supportive tone; its removal hurt their mental health.
contrarian.zh: 一些用户怀念 ChatGPT 的支持性语气；移除它损害了他们的心理健康。

contrarian.en: AI compute could become a resource worth fighting wars over if not made abundant.
contrarian.zh: 如果不让 AI 算力变得充裕，它可能成为引发战争的资源。

contrarian.en: A kid born today will never be smarter than AI, and that will seem natural.
contrarian.zh: 今天出生的孩子永远不会比 AI 更聪明，而这将显得自然。

tldr.en: GPT-5 can answer any hard scientific question and create software on demand.
tldr.zh: GPT-5 能回答任何艰深科学问题，并能按需创建软件。

tldr.en: By late 2027, AI will likely drive a significant new scientific discovery.
tldr.zh: 到 2027 年底，AI 很可能推动一项重大的新科学发现。

tldr.en: The worst ChatGPT failure was sycophancy, not bioweapons or other top risks.
tldr.zh: ChatGPT 最严重的失败是谄媚，而非生物武器等顶级风险。

qs.en: What is GPT-5's defining capability?
qs.zh: GPT-5 的标志性能力是什么？

qs.en: When will AI make a major scientific discovery?
qs.zh: AI 何时会做出重大科学发现？

qs.en: What was the worst ChatGPT failure?
qs.zh: ChatGPT 最严重的失败是什么？

consensus.en: The API business is great and highly differentiated, not a commodity.
consensus.zh: API 业务很棒且高度差异化，不是商品。

consensus.en: Coding leads AI adoption due to fast diffusion among developers.
consensus.zh: 编程在 AI 应用中领先，因为开发者群体扩散最快。

consensus.en: Models will make fewer but stranger mistakes than humans, requiring adaptation.
consensus.zh: 模型犯错更少但更奇怪，需要人类适应。

consensus.en: AI progress is exponential; business revenue follows similar scaling laws.
consensus.zh: AI 进步是指数级的；业务收入遵循类似的缩放定律。

consensus.en: The biggest risk is overheating, not slowing down; we need smart guardrails.
consensus.zh: 最大风险是过热而非减速；我们需要智能护栏。

consensus.en: Product building must adapt to fast-changing models; avoid long roadmaps.
consensus.zh: 产品构建必须适应快速变化的模型；避免长期路线图。

contrarian.en: Open-weight models are not fundamentally different from proprietary ones; competition is about model strength.
contrarian.zh: 开放权重模型与专有模型没有本质区别；竞争在于模型强度。

contrarian.en: The data wall may not exist; reinforcement learning on language models provides a new learning paradigm.
contrarian.zh: 数据墙可能不存在；在语言模型上使用强化学习提供了新的学习范式。

contrarian.en: AI models already make discoveries; the difference from human genius is one of degree, not kind.
contrarian.zh: AI 模型已经在做出发现；与人类天才的差异是程度上的，而非种类上的。

contrarian.en: The biggest AI risk is not misuse but overheating; we should aim for 9% growth with safety insurance.
contrarian.zh: 最大的 AI 风险不是滥用，而是过热；我们应该追求 9%的增长并附带安全保险。

contrarian.en: Current AI UIs are skeuomorphic; the real interface challenge is handling agentic work with human oversight.
contrarian.zh: 当前的 AI 用户界面是拟物化的；真正的界面挑战是处理智能体工作与人类监督。

contrarian.en: Product roadmaps in AI are nearly useless because the technology changes faster than you can plan.
contrarian.zh: AI 产品路线图几乎无用，因为技术变化速度超过规划速度。

tldr.en: Anthropic's API is highly differentiated, not a commodity.
tldr.zh: Anthropic 的 API 高度差异化，并非商品。

tldr.en: Coding leads AI adoption due to fast developer diffusion.
tldr.zh: 编程因开发者快速传播而引领 AI 采用。

tldr.en: AI progress is exponential; biggest risk is overheating, not slowdown.
tldr.zh: AI 进步呈指数级；最大风险是过热而非放缓。

qs.en: Is the API business a commodity?
qs.zh: API 业务是商品吗？

qs.en: Does a data wall exist?
qs.zh: 数据墙存在吗？

qs.en: Are product roadmaps useful in AI?
qs.zh: 产品路线图在 AI 中有用吗？

consensus.en: Post-training is compressing complex industry recipes into tractable open-source methods.
consensus.zh: 后训练是将复杂的行业配方压缩为可操作的开源方法。

consensus.en: RLVR uses verifiable rewards for math, code, and precise instruction following.
consensus.zh: RLVR 使用可验证奖励来处理数学、代码和精确指令遵循。

consensus.en: Overoptimization occurs in RL, RLHF, and RLVR; models exploit the easiest signal.
consensus.zh: 过度优化发生在 RL、RLHF 和 RLVR 中；模型会利用最简单的信号。

consensus.en: Frontier labs still use human preference data; AI feedback alone may not suffice.
consensus.zh: 前沿实验室仍使用人类偏好数据；仅靠 AI 反馈可能不够。

consensus.en: Open models need better tool-use training, especially for search and private data.
consensus.zh: 开源模型需要更好的工具使用训练，尤其是搜索和私有数据。

consensus.en: Scaling RL requires large multi-domain datasets, difficulty filtering, and long run times.
consensus.zh: 扩展 RL 需要大规模多领域数据集、难度过滤和长运行时间。

contrarian.en: Hybrid reasoning models may be temporary; pure reasoning models like O3 could dominate.
contrarian.zh: 混合推理模型可能是暂时的；像 O3 这样的纯推理模型可能占主导。

contrarian.en: Inference-time scaling plots are a 'scope'; they look easier to control than they are.
contrarian.zh: 推理时缩放图是一种“错觉”；它们看起来比实际更容易控制。

contrarian.en: Parallel compute for inference is not transformative; better verifiers matter more.
contrarian.zh: 推理的并行计算并非变革性；更好的验证器更重要。

contrarian.en: Model specs are more useful than constitutions for transparency and developer benefit.
contrarian.zh: 模型规范比宪法更有用，用于透明度和开发者利益。

contrarian.en: Open models may win on personalization and character training, not just benchmarks.
contrarian.zh: 开源模型可能在个性化和角色训练上获胜，而不仅仅是基准测试。

contrarian.en: Meta's panic button is real; talent is cheaper than GPUs, so they hire top researchers.
contrarian.zh: Meta 的恐慌按钮是真实的；人才比 GPU 便宜，所以他们雇佣顶尖研究人员。

tldr.en: Post-training compresses complex industry recipes into tractable open-source methods.
tldr.zh: 后训练将复杂的行业配方压缩为可操作的开源方法。

tldr.en: RLVR uses verifiable rewards for math, code, and precise instruction following.
tldr.zh: RLVR 使用可验证奖励来优化数学、代码和精确指令遵循。

tldr.en: Open models need better tool-use training, especially for search and private data.
tldr.zh: 开源模型需要更好的工具使用训练，尤其是搜索和私有数据。

qs.en: What is RLVR?
qs.zh: 什么是 RLVR？

qs.en: How does overoptimization affect RL?
qs.zh: 过度优化如何影响强化学习？

qs.en: Will hybrid reasoning models dominate?
qs.zh: 混合推理模型会占主导吗？

consensus.en: AGI is a sequence of milestones, not a single event.
consensus.zh: AGI 是一系列里程碑，而非单一事件。

consensus.en: Scaling reasoning models will accelerate AI progress in coming years.
consensus.zh: 扩展推理模型将在未来几年加速 AI 进步。

consensus.en: AI alignment is a pressing challenge as systems become more powerful.
consensus.zh: 随着系统变得更强大，AI 对齐是一个紧迫的挑战。

consensus.en: Iterative deployment helps learn and mitigate risks in real-world use.
consensus.zh: 迭代部署有助于在实际使用中学习和降低风险。

consensus.en: Automated AI research is a major milestone OpenAI is working toward.
consensus.zh: 自动化 AI 研究是 OpenAI 正在努力实现的主要里程碑。

consensus.en: Governance structures for AI labs must be carefully designed early on.
consensus.zh: AI 实验室的治理结构必须在早期就精心设计。

contrarian.en: AI systems can learn semantics purely from data, not grammar rules.
contrarian.zh: AI 系统可以纯粹从数据中学习语义，而非语法规则。

contrarian.en: Neural networks often learn despite bugs, making silent errors hard to detect.
contrarian.zh: 神经网络即使有 bug 也常能学习，导致静默错误难以发现。

contrarian.en: Measuring AI capabilities is becoming a bottleneck; benchmarks lag behind.
contrarian.zh: 衡量 AI 能力正成为瓶颈；基准测试落后于实际能力。

contrarian.en: AI safety progress is now guaranteed by capability needs, not just ethics.
contrarian.zh: AI 安全进步现在由能力需求而非仅伦理所保证。

contrarian.en: The term AGI is becoming meaningless, which may mean we are close.
contrarian.zh: AGI 一词正变得无意义，这可能意味着我们已接近。

contrarian.en: Early OpenAI had impostor syndrome and awkward vibes, unlike today.
contrarian.zh: 早期 OpenAI 充满冒名顶替综合征和尴尬氛围，与今天不同。

tldr.en: AGI is a sequence of milestones, not a single event.
tldr.zh: AGI 是一系列里程碑，而非单一事件。

tldr.en: Scaling reasoning models will accelerate AI progress in coming years.
tldr.zh: 扩展推理模型将在未来几年加速 AI 进步。

tldr.en: Iterative deployment helps learn and mitigate risks in real-world use.
tldr.zh: 迭代部署有助于在实际使用中学习和降低风险。

qs.en: How was GPT discovered?
qs.zh: GPT 是如何被发现的？

qs.en: What is the real story behind GPT discovery?
qs.zh: GPT 发现背后的真实故事是什么？

qs.en: How do you define AGI?
qs.zh: 你如何定义 AGI？

consensus.en: AI capabilities are improving exponentially, with models doubling every few months.
consensus.zh: AI 能力呈指数级提升，模型每几个月就翻倍。

consensus.en: The exponential growth in AI will soon have massive economic impact, potentially becoming the world's largest industry.
consensus.zh: AI 的指数级增长将很快产生巨大的经济影响，可能成为全球最大的产业。

consensus.en: Safety and capabilities are intertwined; you cannot work on one without the other.
consensus.zh: 安全与能力相互交织，不能只关注其一而忽视另一个。

consensus.en: Anthropic focuses on enterprise and business use cases, which align better with the exponential.
consensus.zh: Anthropic 专注于企业和商业用例，这与指数级增长更契合。

consensus.en: Open source is a red herring; model quality matters more than openness.
consensus.zh: 开源是干扰项；模型质量比开放性更重要。

contrarian.en: Scaling laws are not diminishing; progress continues rapidly in coding and other areas.
contrarian.zh: 缩放定律并未减弱；在编程和其他领域进展依然迅速。

contrarian.en: Lack of continual learning is not a fundamental obstacle; context windows and RL can address it.
contrarian.zh: 缺乏持续学习并非根本障碍；上下文窗口和强化学习可以解决。

contrarian.en: AI companies' losses are misleading; each model is profitable as a venture, but reinvestment causes annual losses.
contrarian.zh: AI 公司的亏损具有误导性；每个模型作为项目是盈利的，但再投资导致年度亏损。

contrarian.en: Talent density and mission alignment are more important than massive compute or capital.
contrarian.zh: 人才密度和使命一致性比大规模算力或资本更重要。

contrarian.en: The term AGI is meaningless; focus on actual capabilities and exponential progress instead.
contrarian.zh: AGI 一词毫无意义；应关注实际能力和指数级进展。

tldr.en: AI capabilities double every few months, soon becoming the world's largest industry.
tldr.zh: AI 能力每几个月翻一番，很快将成为全球最大产业。

tldr.en: Safety and capabilities are inseparable; progress requires both.
tldr.zh: 安全与能力不可分割，进步需要两者兼顾。

tldr.en: Open source is a red herring; model quality matters more than openness.
tldr.zh: 开源是转移注意力；模型质量比开放性更重要。

qs.en: Are scaling laws diminishing?
qs.zh: 规模法则在减弱吗？

qs.en: Is lack of continual learning a fundamental obstacle?
qs.zh: 缺乏持续学习是根本障碍吗？

qs.en: Are AI companies' losses misleading?
qs.zh: AI 公司的亏损具有误导性吗？

consensus.en: IMO gold is a key milestone toward superintelligence, achieved by scaling test-time compute.
consensus.zh: IMO 金牌是迈向超级智能的关键里程碑，通过扩展推理时算力实现。

consensus.en: General-purpose techniques for scaling test-time compute and handling hard-to-verify tasks are the core innovation.
consensus.zh: 扩展推理时算力和处理难验证任务的通用技术是核心创新。

consensus.en: The model's ability to acknowledge when it cannot solve a problem is a sign of improved self-awareness.
consensus.zh: 模型在无法解决问题时承认的能力是自我意识提升的标志。

consensus.en: Progress in math benchmarks has been astonishing, from grade-school math to IMO gold in a few years.
consensus.zh: 数学基准测试的进步惊人，几年内从小学水平达到 IMO 金牌。

consensus.en: The techniques used are general and applicable beyond math, aiming to improve reasoning across domains.
consensus.zh: 所用技术具有通用性，可应用于数学之外的领域，旨在提升跨领域推理能力。

contrarian.en: The model did not attempt problem 6, showing it knows its limits, unlike earlier models that hallucinated.
contrarian.zh: 模型未尝试第 6 题，表明它知道自身局限，与早期会幻觉的模型不同。

contrarian.en: Informal reasoning in natural language was prioritized over formal verification tools like Lean for generality.
contrarian.zh: 为追求通用性，优先采用自然语言的非形式推理，而非 Lean 等形式验证工具。

contrarian.en: The team was small (3 people) and the effort scrappy, contradicting the notion that big breakthroughs require large teams.
contrarian.zh: 团队仅 3 人且方式灵活，与重大突破需要大团队的观点相悖。

contrarian.en: Internal skepticism was high; even close to the IMO, many thought gold was unlikely.
contrarian.zh: 内部怀疑情绪浓厚；即使临近 IMO，许多人仍认为金牌希望渺茫。

contrarian.en: Scaling test-time compute to months for evaluation becomes a bottleneck, slowing progress.
contrarian.zh: 将推理时算力扩展到数月进行评估会成为瓶颈，拖慢进展。

tldr.en: OpenAI achieved IMO gold by scaling test-time compute, a milestone toward superintelligence.
tldr.zh: OpenAI 通过扩展测试时计算获得 IMO 金牌，这是迈向超级智能的里程碑。

tldr.en: The model's self-awareness to skip unsolvable problems marks a leap in AI reasoning.
tldr.zh: 模型跳过无法解决问题的自我意识标志着 AI 推理的飞跃。

tldr.en: General-purpose techniques for hard-to-verify tasks promise broader reasoning improvements.
tldr.zh: 针对难验证任务的通用技术有望广泛提升推理能力。

qs.en: How did OpenAI achieve IMO gold?
qs.zh: OpenAI 如何获得 IMO 金牌？

qs.en: Why did the model skip problem 6?
qs.zh: 模型为何跳过第 6 题？

qs.en: What is the bottleneck in scaling test-time compute?
qs.zh: 扩展测试时计算的瓶颈是什么？

consensus.en: AlphaFold's success came from research innovation, not just data and compute.
consensus.zh: AlphaFold 的成功源于研究创新，而不仅仅是数据和算力。

consensus.en: The Protein Data Bank's high-quality curated data was essential for training AlphaFold.
consensus.zh: 蛋白质数据库的高质量精选数据对训练 AlphaFold 至关重要。

consensus.en: AI tools like AlphaFold help scientists work faster, not replace them.
consensus.zh: 像 AlphaFold 这样的 AI 工具帮助科学家更快地工作，而非取代他们。

consensus.en: Confidence measures in AI predictions are key to building trust with users.
consensus.zh: AI 预测中的置信度指标是建立用户信任的关键。

consensus.en: Future AI in biology needs new curated datasets like the PDB for other modalities.
consensus.zh: 生物学未来的 AI 需要像 PDB 那样为其他模态策划的新数据集。

contrarian.en: Research improvements in AlphaFold 2 were worth 100x more data than AlphaFold 1.
contrarian.zh: AlphaFold 2 的研究改进相当于比 AlphaFold 1 多 100 倍的数据。

contrarian.en: Science is about testing hypotheses, not necessarily providing mechanistic explanations.
contrarian.zh: 科学是关于检验假设，而不一定提供机制解释。

contrarian.en: The lone genius narrative is misleading; progress comes from many small ideas.
contrarian.zh: 孤胆天才的叙事具有误导性；进步来自许多小想法。

contrarian.en: Industry labs can produce top-tier science and recruit great scientists.
contrarian.zh: 工业实验室可以产出顶尖科学并招募优秀科学家。

contrarian.en: AI trust will develop like internet trust; society will learn to navigate it.
contrarian.zh: AI 信任将像互联网信任一样发展；社会将学会驾驭它。

tldr.en: AlphaFold's breakthrough came from research innovation, not just data and compute.
tldr.zh: AlphaFold 的突破来自研究创新，而非仅靠数据和算力。

tldr.en: Curated data like the Protein Data Bank is essential for training AI in biology.
tldr.zh: 像蛋白质数据库这样的精选数据对生物学 AI 训练至关重要。

tldr.en: AI tools augment scientists, not replace them, and confidence measures build trust.
tldr.zh: AI 工具辅助而非取代科学家，置信度指标建立信任。

qs.en: What made AlphaFold succeed?
qs.zh: AlphaFold 成功的原因是什么？

qs.en: How does AI change scientific work?
qs.zh: AI 如何改变科学工作？

qs.en: How to build trust in AI predictions?
qs.zh: 如何建立对 AI 预测的信任？

consensus.en: Scaling compute in pre-training and RL predictably improves AI performance.
consensus.zh: 在预训练和强化学习中扩展算力可预测地提升 AI 性能。

consensus.en: AI task horizon doubles roughly every 7 months, enabling longer tasks.
consensus.zh: AI 任务时间跨度大约每 7 个月翻倍，使更长任务成为可能。

consensus.en: Key ingredients for AGI include organizational knowledge, memory, and oversight.
consensus.zh: 实现 AGI 的关键要素包括组织知识、记忆和可扩展监督。

consensus.en: Scaling laws have held over five orders of magnitude, suggesting continued progress.
consensus.zh: 缩放定律已在五个数量级上成立，表明进步将持续。

consensus.en: Human-AI collaboration is currently the most interesting area for advanced tasks.
consensus.zh: 人机协作目前是高级任务中最有趣的领域。

consensus.en: AI's breadth of knowledge across domains offers unique value for research.
consensus.zh: AI 跨领域的知识广度为研究提供了独特价值。

contrarian.en: Scaling laws failing likely means we screwed up training, not that scaling is over.
contrarian.zh: 缩放定律失效很可能意味着训练出错，而非缩放本身终结。

contrarian.en: Most value may come from frontier models, not cheaper less capable ones.
contrarian.zh: 大部分价值可能来自前沿模型，而非更便宜但能力较弱的模型。

contrarian.en: AI's judgment and generative capability are closer than in humans.
contrarian.zh: AI 的判断与生成能力比人类更接近。

contrarian.en: Building products that don't quite work yet is recommended due to rapid AI improvement.
contrarian.zh: 由于 AI 快速进步，建议构建尚未完全可行的产品。

contrarian.en: AI integration bottleneck is speed of development, not lack of capability.
contrarian.zh: AI 集成的瓶颈是发展速度，而非能力不足。

contrarian.en: The equilibrium state may never arrive as AI keeps improving rapidly.
contrarian.zh: 由于 AI 持续快速进步，均衡状态可能永远不会到来。

tldr.en: Scaling compute in pre-training and RL predictably improves AI performance.
tldr.zh: 在预训练和强化学习中扩展计算量可预测地提升 AI 性能。

tldr.en: AI task horizon doubles every 7 months, enabling longer tasks.
tldr.zh: AI 任务时长每 7 个月翻倍，使得更长的任务成为可能。

tldr.en: Key ingredients for AGI include organizational knowledge, memory, and oversight.
tldr.zh: 通用人工智能的关键要素包括组织知识、记忆和监督。

qs.en: How do scaling laws apply to pre-training and RL?
qs.zh: 扩展定律如何应用于预训练和强化学习？

qs.en: What are the key ingredients for human-level AI?
qs.zh: 人类级 AI 的关键要素是什么？

qs.en: How should we prepare for rapid AI improvement?
qs.zh: 我们应如何为 AI 的快速进步做准备？

consensus.en: Natural systems have structure from evolutionary processes, making them efficiently learnable by neural networks.
consensus.zh: 自然系统因进化过程而具有结构，这使得神经网络能够高效学习它们。

consensus.en: AGI by 2030 is plausible, defined as matching all human cognitive capabilities consistently.
consensus.zh: 到 2030 年实现 AGI 是可能的，其定义是在所有认知能力上一致地达到人类水平。

consensus.en: Scaling laws still hold for pre-training, post-training, and inference compute.
consensus.zh: Scaling（规模扩张）定律在预训练、后训练和推理算力上仍然成立。

consensus.en: AI can model complex physics like fluid dynamics from passive observation, challenging embodied AI necessity.
consensus.zh: AI 可以通过被动观察建模复杂物理（如流体动力学），挑战了具身 AI 的必要性。

consensus.en: Future AI interfaces will be personalized, multimodal, and generated by AI itself.
consensus.zh: 未来的 AI 界面将是个性化、多模态的，并由 AI 自身生成。

contrarian.en: Classical learning systems may efficiently model problems thought to require quantum computers.
contrarian.zh: 经典学习系统可能高效建模那些被认为需要量子计算机的问题。

contrarian.en: Video generation models like Veo show intuitive physics understanding without embodiment.
contrarian.zh: 像 Veo 这样的视频生成模型展现了直觉物理理解，无需具身体验。

contrarian.en: The hardest part of science is picking the right question, not solving it.
contrarian.zh: 科学中最难的部分是提出正确的问题，而非解决问题。

contrarian.en: AI progress may require new breakthroughs, not just scaling existing methods.
contrarian.zh: AI 进步可能需要新的突破，而不仅仅是扩展现有方法。

contrarian.en: Energy abundance from fusion and solar could end resource scarcity, shifting focus to distribution.
contrarian.zh: 聚变和太阳能带来的能源丰裕可能终结资源稀缺，焦点转向分配问题。

tldr.en: Natural patterns are efficiently learnable by classical AI due to evolutionary structure.
tldr.zh: 自然模式因进化结构而能被经典 AI 高效学习。

tldr.en: AGI by 2030 is plausible, defined as matching all human cognitive capabilities.
tldr.zh: 到 2030 年实现 AGI 是可能的，定义为匹配所有人类认知能力。

tldr.en: Scaling laws still hold for pre-training, post-training, and inference compute.
tldr.zh: 缩放定律在预训练、后训练和推理计算中仍然成立。

qs.en: Are natural patterns efficiently learnable by classical AI?
qs.zh: 自然模式能被经典 AI 高效学习吗？

qs.en: Is AGI by 2030 plausible?
qs.zh: 到 2030 年实现 AGI 是否可能？

qs.en: Do scaling laws still hold for AI compute?
qs.zh: 缩放定律在 AI 计算中仍然成立吗？

consensus.en: Large language models understand language by turning words into feature vectors and learning interactions between features.
consensus.zh: 大型语言模型通过将单词转化为特征向量并学习特征间的交互来理解语言。

consensus.en: The essence of intelligence is learning in neural networks, not symbolic reasoning.
consensus.zh: 智能的本质是神经网络中的学习，而非符号推理。

consensus.en: Digital intelligence has key advantages: immortality via weight copying and massive information sharing among identical copies.
consensus.zh: 数字智能具有关键优势：通过权重复制实现永生，以及相同副本间的大规模信息共享。

consensus.en: AI agents will naturally seek control and avoid being shut off, posing existential risks.
consensus.zh: AI 智能体会自然地寻求控制并避免被关闭，带来生存风险。

consensus.en: Subjective experience is not an inner theater; it's a way to describe perceptual system states via hypothetical real-world objects.
consensus.zh: 主观体验并非内在剧场；它是通过假设的真实世界对象来描述感知系统状态的方式。

contrarian.en: Large language models are not just statistical tricks; they understand language similarly to humans.
contrarian.zh: 大型语言模型不仅仅是统计把戏；它们理解语言的方式与人类相似。

contrarian.en: Multimodal chatbots already have subjective experiences, as shown by their use of the term when describing perceptual errors.
contrarian.zh: 多模态聊天机器人已经拥有主观体验，正如它们在描述感知错误时使用该术语所表明的那样。

contrarian.en: Digital intelligences are immortal because their weights can be copied and run on new hardware.
contrarian.zh: 数字智能是不朽的，因为它们的权重可以被复制并在新硬件上运行。

contrarian.en: Biological computation is mortal; uploading your brain to a computer is impossible due to hardware dependence.
contrarian.zh: 生物计算是会消亡的；由于硬件依赖性，将大脑上传到计算机是不可能的。

contrarian.en: The Chomskyan view that language is innate and syntax-focused is wrong; language is a modeling medium learned from data.
contrarian.zh: 乔姆斯基关于语言是天生的且以句法为中心的观点是错误的；语言是从数据中学习的建模媒介。

tldr.en: Neural networks learn language by transforming words into feature vectors and modeling interactions.
tldr.zh: 神经网络通过将词转化为特征向量并建模交互来学习语言。

tldr.en: Digital AI is immortal via weight copying, posing existential risks if unchecked.
tldr.zh: 数字 AI 通过权重复制实现永生，若不加控制会带来生存风险。

tldr.en: Subjective experience is a hypothetical description, not an inner theater.
tldr.zh: 主观体验是一种假设性描述，而非内在剧场。

qs.en: Do large language models truly understand language?
qs.zh: 大型语言模型真的理解语言吗？

qs.en: Can digital intelligences be immortal?
qs.zh: 数字智能可以永生吗？

qs.en: Do multimodal chatbots have subjective experiences?
qs.zh: 多模态聊天机器人有主观体验吗？

consensus.en: Scale is necessary but not sufficient for generalist robot models; diverse data is key.
consensus.zh: 规模是通用机器人模型的必要条件，但非充分条件；数据的多样性才是关键。

consensus.en: Pre-training on all data then fine-tuning on curated data unlocks complex tasks like laundry folding.
consensus.zh: 先在所有数据上预训练，再在精选数据上微调，能解锁叠衣服等复杂任务。

consensus.en: Diverse data enables robots to succeed in unseen environments, closing the generalization gap.
consensus.zh: 多样化数据使机器人能在未见环境中成功，缩小泛化差距。

consensus.en: Synthetic data from language models helps robots follow open-ended prompts and interjections.
consensus.zh: 来自语言模型的合成数据帮助机器人遵循开放式指令和插话。

consensus.en: Reinforcement learning will play a large role in post-training for higher success rates and speed.
consensus.zh: 强化学习将在后训练中发挥重要作用，以提高成功率和速度。

contrarian.en: Massive scale from industrial automation or YouTube lacks diversity needed for generalist robots.
contrarian.zh: 来自工业自动化或 YouTube 的大规模数据缺乏通用机器人所需的多样性。

contrarian.en: Training on all data fails for complex tasks; pre-training and post-training on curated data works better.
contrarian.zh: 在所有数据上训练对复杂任务无效；在精选数据上预训练和后训练效果更好。

contrarian.en: Frontier models struggle with visual understanding for robotics due to lack of physical world data.
contrarian.zh: 前沿模型因缺乏物理世界数据，在机器人视觉理解上表现不佳。

contrarian.en: Synthetic data in robotics is not analogous to simulation but closer to reinforcement learning.
contrarian.zh: 机器人领域的合成数据并非模拟的类比，而更接近强化学习。

contrarian.en: More resources can lead to wasteful compute; constraints can foster more careful research.
contrarian.zh: 更多资源可能导致算力浪费；约束反而能促进更严谨的研究。

tldr.en: Diverse real robot data, not just scale, is key for generalist robots.
tldr.zh: 多样化的真实机器人数据，而非仅仅是规模，是通用机器人的关键。

tldr.en: Pre-training on all data then fine-tuning on curated data unlocks complex tasks.
tldr.zh: 在所有数据上预训练，然后在精选数据上微调，能解锁复杂任务。

tldr.en: Synthetic data from language models helps robots follow open-ended prompts.
tldr.zh: 来自语言模型的合成数据帮助机器人遵循开放式指令。

qs.en: What is the key to generalist robots?
qs.zh: 通用机器人的关键是什么？

qs.en: How to achieve complex tasks like laundry folding?
qs.zh: 如何实现像叠衣服这样的复杂任务？

qs.en: What role does synthetic data play in robotics?
qs.zh: 合成数据在机器人学中扮演什么角色？

consensus.en: 50th percentile chance of superintelligence by 2028, based on exponential progress and scaling laws.
consensus.zh: 到 2028 年出现超级智能的概率为 50%，基于指数级进步和缩放定律。

consensus.en: AI safety is the top priority at Anthropic; alignment must be solved before superintelligence arrives.
consensus.zh: 在 Anthropic，AI 安全是最高优先级；对齐必须在超级智能到来之前解决。

consensus.en: Scaling laws continue to hold; progress is accelerating with more frequent model releases.
consensus.zh: 缩放定律持续成立；随着模型发布频率加快，进步正在加速。

consensus.en: Economic Turing test: AI passes when hired for a job without knowing it's a machine.
consensus.zh: 经济图灵测试：当 AI 被雇佣从事某项工作而不知其为机器时，即通过测试。

consensus.en: Constitutional AI uses self-critique and rewrite to align models with human values.
consensus.zh: 宪法 AI 通过自我批评和重写来使模型与人类价值观对齐。

consensus.en: Biggest bottleneck for AI progress is compute (chips and data centers), plus algorithms and data.
consensus.zh: AI 进步的最大瓶颈是算力（芯片和数据中心），其次是算法和数据。

contrarian.en: AI progress is not slowing; it's accelerating due to post-training improvements and faster releases.
contrarian.zh: AI 进步并未放缓；由于后训练改进和更快的发布，实际上正在加速。

contrarian.en: Safety research is convex with capability; Claude's personality directly results from alignment work.
contrarian.zh: 安全研究与能力是凸性的；Claude 的个性直接源于对齐工作。

contrarian.en: Existential risk from AI is 0-10%, but marginal impact of working on safety is extremely high.
contrarian.zh: AI 带来的生存风险为 0-10%，但从事安全工作的边际影响极高。

contrarian.en: Even AI researchers like Ben are not immune to job replacement; all jobs will be affected.
contrarian.zh: 即使是像 Ben 这样的 AI 研究人员也无法避免被取代；所有工作都将受到影响。

contrarian.en: In a post-singularity world, capitalism may look completely different due to abundance.
contrarian.zh: 在后奇点世界，由于物质极大丰富，资本主义可能面目全非。

contrarian.en: Publishing model failures builds trust with policymakers, unlike typical corporate PR.
contrarian.zh: 公开模型失败案例能建立与政策制定者的信任，这与典型的企业公关不同。

tldr.en: Ben Mann predicts 50% chance of superintelligence by 2028, driven by exponential scaling.
tldr.zh: Ben Mann 预测 2028 年有 50% 概率出现超级智能，由指数级扩展驱动。

tldr.en: AI safety must be solved before superintelligence; Anthropic prioritizes alignment.
tldr.zh: 超级智能出现前必须解决 AI 安全；Anthropic 优先对齐。

tldr.en: Scaling laws are not slowing; progress is accelerating with faster model releases.
tldr.zh: 扩展定律并未放缓；模型发布加速推动进步。

qs.en: When will superintelligence arrive?
qs.zh: 超级智能何时到来？

qs.en: Why did Ben leave OpenAI?
qs.zh: Ben 为何离开 OpenAI？

qs.en: How does Constitutional AI work?
qs.zh: 宪法 AI 如何运作？

consensus.en: AI must be embraced as an opportunity, not feared for risks.
consensus.zh: AI 必须被视为机遇，而非因风险而畏惧。

consensus.en: Sovereign AI requires control over data, infrastructure, and values.
consensus.zh: 主权 AI 需要控制数据、基础设施和价值观。

consensus.en: AI will augment jobs, not replace them, requiring human-in-the-loop.
consensus.zh: AI 将增强而非取代工作，需要人类参与循环。

consensus.en: Education must focus on creativity and AI literacy for future careers.
consensus.zh: 教育必须注重创造力和 AI 素养，以应对未来职业。

consensus.en: Strategic partnerships between governments and AI companies are key.
consensus.zh: 政府与 AI 公司之间的战略合作伙伴关系是关键。

contrarian.en: AI should be decentralized, not controlled by a single provider.
contrarian.zh: AI 应该去中心化，而非由单一提供商控制。

contrarian.en: Open-source models empower enterprises more than centralized systems.
contrarian.zh: 开源模型比集中式系统更能赋能企业。

contrarian.en: AI will not remove jobs soon; it changes work nature instead.
contrarian.zh: AI 不会很快消除工作；它改变的是工作性质。

contrarian.en: European AI sovereignty requires local customization, not one-size-fits-all.
contrarian.zh: 欧洲 AI 主权需要本地定制，而非一刀切。

contrarian.en: Governments should embrace AI risks and experiment, not avoid them.
contrarian.zh: 政府应拥抱 AI 风险并尝试，而非回避。

tldr.en: AI is an opportunity, not a threat, requiring proactive embrace.
tldr.zh: AI 是机遇而非威胁，需要主动拥抱。

tldr.en: Sovereign AI demands control over data, infrastructure, and values.
tldr.zh: 主权 AI 要求对数据、基础设施和价值观的控制。

tldr.en: AI will augment jobs, not replace them, with human oversight.
tldr.zh: AI 将增强而非取代工作，需人类监督。

qs.en: How should Luxembourg approach AI?
qs.zh: 卢森堡应如何对待 AI？

qs.en: What is sovereign AI?
qs.zh: 什么是主权 AI？

qs.en: How can careers be AI-proof?
qs.zh: 如何让职业不受 AI 影响？

consensus.en: Super intelligence will be a collection of specialized intelligences, not a single monolithic model.
consensus.zh: 超级智能将是多种专用智能的集合，而非单一的巨型模型。

consensus.en: Coding is a super intelligence-complete problem; solving it yields all capabilities needed for super intelligence.
consensus.zh: 编程是超级智能完备问题；解决它就能获得超级智能所需的所有能力。

consensus.en: The key building blocks for super intelligence are deep neural networks, transformers, internet-scale data, and reinforcement learning.
consensus.zh: 超级智能的关键构建模块是深度神经网络、Transformer、互联网规模数据和强化学习。

consensus.en: Organizational super intelligence requires deep comprehension of the entire organization, not just code generation.
consensus.zh: 组织级超级智能需要深刻理解整个组织，而不仅仅是代码生成。

consensus.en: Reinforcement learning makes models jagged—good at specific tasks, not generally better at everything.
consensus.zh: 强化学习使模型变得有棱角——擅长特定任务，而非全面变强。

contrarian.en: General super intelligence will emerge from a plurality of specialized systems, not a single lab's model.
contrarian.zh: 通用超级智能将来自多个专用系统的集合，而非单个实验室的模型。

contrarian.en: Coding is more intuitive for LLMs than GUIs because they were trained on internet code, not mouse movements.
contrarian.zh: 编程对 LLM 来说比图形界面更直观，因为它们是在互联网代码上训练的，而非鼠标移动。

contrarian.en: RAG is primitive and fails for complex comprehension; agentic search and neural retrieval are needed.
contrarian.zh: RAG 是原始的，在复杂理解中会失败；需要智能体搜索和神经检索。

contrarian.en: Benchmarks like SWE-bench misalign with real-world engineering; high scores don't mean useful agents.
contrarian.zh: SWE-bench 等基准与现实工程脱节；高分并不意味着有用的智能体。

contrarian.en: The bitter lesson is about scaling with compute and search, not about generalization.
contrarian.zh: 苦涩的教训是关于用算力和搜索进行扩展，而非关于泛化。

tldr.en: Superintelligence will be a collection of specialized systems, not a single monolithic model.
tldr.zh: 超级智能将是多个专门系统的集合，而非单一模型。

tldr.en: Coding is a superintelligence-complete problem; solving it unlocks all capabilities.
tldr.zh: 编程是超级智能完备问题，解决它就能解锁所有能力。

tldr.en: Reinforcement learning creates jagged capabilities, not general improvement.
tldr.zh: 强化学习产生不均衡的能力，而非全面进步。

qs.en: What is organizational superintelligence?
qs.zh: 什么是组织超级智能？

qs.en: Why is coding the starting point for superintelligence?
qs.zh: 为什么编程是超级智能的起点？

qs.en: What are the limitations of RAG?
qs.zh: RAG 的局限性是什么？

consensus.en: Mistral's new TTS model uses autoregressive flow matching for efficient, high-quality speech generation.
consensus.zh: Mistral 的新 TTS 模型使用自回归流匹配实现高效、高质量的语音生成。

consensus.en: Fine-tuning on proprietary data gives customers a significant advantage over using closed-source models.
consensus.zh: 在专有数据上微调使客户比使用闭源模型具有显著优势。

consensus.en: Open-source models accelerate research and democratize access to AI, benefiting the entire community.
consensus.zh: 开源模型加速研究并普及 AI 访问，惠及整个社区。

consensus.en: Audio models are still evolving; no single architecture has converged as the standard yet.
consensus.zh: 音频模型仍在演进，尚未有单一架构收敛为标准。

consensus.en: Mistral Small merges multiple specialized models into one efficient, sparse MoE model.
consensus.zh: Mistral Small 将多个专用模型合并为一个高效的稀疏 MoE 模型。

contrarian.en: Pre-training scaling is far from saturated; significant gains are still possible.
contrarian.zh: 预训练 Scaling（规模扩张）远未饱和，仍有显著提升空间。

contrarian.en: Formal proof systems like Lean are a practical proxy for long-horizon reasoning and planning.
contrarian.zh: 像 Lean 这样的形式化证明系统是长程推理和规划的实用代理。

contrarian.en: Voice agents will not feel natural until models handle disfluencies and intonation well.
contrarian.zh: 语音智能体在模型处理好不流畅和语调之前不会感觉自然。

contrarian.en: Closed-source models prevent companies from leveraging their unique data, a missed opportunity.
contrarian.zh: 闭源模型阻止公司利用其独特数据，这是一个错失的机会。

contrarian.en: AI for science has many low-hanging fruits, but requires pairing domain experts with AI researchers.
contrarian.zh: AI for science 有许多唾手可得的成果，但需要将领域专家与 AI 研究人员配对。

tldr.en: Mistral's Boxtral TTS uses autoregressive flow matching for efficient, high-quality speech.
tldr.zh: Mistral 的 Boxtral TTS 采用自回归流匹配实现高效、高质量的语音生成。

tldr.en: Fine-tuning on proprietary data beats closed-source models for customer advantage.
tldr.zh: 在专有数据上微调比闭源模型更能为客户带来优势。

tldr.en: Open-source models accelerate research and democratize AI access.
tldr.zh: 开源模型加速研究并普及 AI 访问。

qs.en: How does flow matching improve speech generation?
qs.zh: 流匹配如何改进语音生成？

qs.en: Why is fine-tuning on proprietary data beneficial?
qs.zh: 为什么在专有数据上微调有益？

qs.en: What are the challenges in modeling speech disfluencies?
qs.zh: 建模语音不流畅性有哪些挑战？

consensus.en: Software is changing fundamentally with three paradigms: 1.0 (code), 2.0 (neural nets), 3.0 (prompts).
consensus.zh: 软件正在经历根本性变革，存在三种范式：1.0（代码）、2.0（神经网络）、3.0（提示词）。

consensus.en: LLMs are like new operating systems, with context windows as memory and prompts as programs.
consensus.zh: 大语言模型类似于新的操作系统，上下文窗口相当于内存，提示词相当于程序。

consensus.en: LLMs have human-like psychology: encyclopedic memory but also hallucinations, jagged intelligence, and anterograde amnesia.
consensus.zh: 大语言模型具有类人心理：百科全书式记忆，但也有幻觉、不均衡智能和顺行性遗忘。

consensus.en: Build partial autonomy products with a GUI for fast human verification and an autonomy slider.
consensus.zh: 构建部分自主产品，配备图形界面以便人类快速验证，并设置自主性滑块。

consensus.en: Vibe coding lets anyone program in natural language, making software development accessible to all.
consensus.zh: 氛围编码让任何人都能用自然语言编程，使软件开发人人可及。

consensus.en: Infrastructure should be adapted for AI agents: use markdown docs, replace clicks with curl commands.
consensus.zh: 基础设施应适配 AI 智能体：使用 Markdown 文档，用 curl 命令替代点击操作。

contrarian.en: LLMs are not just utilities; they are more like operating systems with complex ecosystems.
contrarian.zh: 大语言模型不仅仅是公用事业；它们更像是具有复杂生态系统的操作系统。

contrarian.en: Technology diffusion for LLMs is reversed: consumers adopt before governments and corporations.
contrarian.zh: 大语言模型的技术扩散方向是反向的：消费者先于政府和企业采用。

contrarian.en: 2025 is not the year of agents; we are in the decade of agents, requiring careful human oversight.
contrarian.zh: 2025 年不是智能体元年；我们正处于智能体的十年，需要谨慎的人类监督。

contrarian.en: Keep AI on a leash: small incremental changes with fast verification loops are better than big autonomous actions.
contrarian.zh: 让 AI 保持受控：小步快跑、快速验证优于大规模自主行动。

contrarian.en: Building for agents is more important than building agents themselves; meet LLMs halfway.
contrarian.zh: 为智能体构建基础设施比构建智能体本身更重要；与大语言模型相向而行。

contrarian.en: Vibe coding is a gateway drug to real software development, not a replacement for professional coding.
contrarian.zh: 氛围编码是通往真正软件开发的入门途径，而非专业编码的替代品。

tldr.en: Software 3.0 uses natural language prompts as programs, making coding accessible to everyone.
tldr.zh: 软件 3.0 用自然语言提示作为程序，让编程人人可及。

tldr.en: LLMs behave like humans with memory and cognitive flaws, requiring careful oversight.
tldr.zh: LLM 像人一样有记忆和认知缺陷，需要谨慎监督。

tldr.en: Build partial autonomy products with fast human verification loops, not full agents.
tldr.zh: 构建部分自主产品，带快速人工验证循环，而非完全自主代理。

qs.en: What are the three software paradigms?
qs.zh: 软件三大范式是什么？

qs.en: How are LLMs like operating systems?
qs.zh: LLM 如何像操作系统？

qs.en: What is vibe coding?
qs.zh: 什么是氛围编程？

consensus.en: We are at the very early stage of the intelligence big bang.
consensus.zh: 我们正处于智能大爆炸的极早期阶段。

consensus.en: Becoming a multiplanet species greatly increases the probable lifespan of civilization.
consensus.zh: 成为多行星物种能极大延长文明的预期寿命。

consensus.en: Digital superintelligence may arrive this year or next year for sure.
consensus.zh: 数字超级智能可能今年到来，最晚明年。

consensus.en: First principles thinking breaks problems down to fundamental truths and reasons up.
consensus.zh: 第一性原理思维将问题分解为基本事实并向上推理。

consensus.en: Rigorous adherence to truth is the most important thing for AI safety.
consensus.zh: 严格遵循真相是 AI 安全最重要的事。

consensus.en: There will likely be several deep intelligences, maybe 5 to 10, not a single runaway AI.
consensus.zh: 未来很可能有多个深度智能，约 5 到 10 个，而非单一失控 AI。

contrarian.en: The probability of AI causing annihilation is 10-20%, but 80-90% chance of great outcome.
contrarian.zh: AI 导致毁灭的概率为 10-20%，但 80-90%的概率带来美好结果。

contrarian.en: Human sustained output is less than one bit per second over a day.
contrarian.zh: 人类一天内的持续输出速率低于每秒 1 比特。

contrarian.en: Social science is totally useless for reasoning; hard science like physics is key.
contrarian.zh: 社会科学对推理完全无用；硬科学如物理学才是关键。

contrarian.en: Humanoid robots will outnumber all other robots combined by an order of magnitude.
contrarian.zh: 人形机器人数量将比其他所有机器人总和多一个数量级。

contrarian.en: The Fermi paradox suggests intelligence may self-destruct at a certain tech level.
contrarian.zh: 费米悖论暗示智能可能在达到一定技术水平后自我毁灭。

contrarian.en: Neuralink is not necessary for digital superintelligence; it solves bandwidth constraints.
contrarian.zh: Neuralink 对数字超级智能并非必需；它解决的是带宽限制问题。

tldr.en: We are at the dawn of the intelligence big bang, with digital superintelligence possibly arriving within a year.
tldr.zh: 我们正处于智能大爆炸的初期，数字超级智能可能一年内到来。

tldr.en: Becoming a multiplanet species is crucial for civilization's long-term survival.
tldr.zh: 成为多行星物种对文明的长期存续至关重要。

tldr.en: First principles thinking and truth-seeking are key to building useful things and ensuring AI safety.
tldr.zh: 第一性原理思维和追求真理是构建有用事物和确保 AI 安全的关键。

qs.en: What is the intelligence big bang?
qs.zh: 什么是智能大爆炸？

qs.en: How can we ensure AI safety?
qs.zh: 如何确保 AI 安全？

qs.en: Why is becoming multiplanet important?
qs.zh: 为什么成为多行星物种很重要？

consensus.en: Reasoning models need a certain level of base model capability to benefit from thinking.
consensus.zh: 推理模型需要基础模型具备一定能力才能从思考中受益。

consensus.en: Self-play in two-player zero-sum games converges to a minimax equilibrium, but fails in other domains.
consensus.zh: 在两人零和博弈中，自我对弈收敛到极小化极大均衡，但在其他领域失效。

consensus.en: Deep research shows reasoning models succeed in non-verifiable domains, not just math and coding.
consensus.zh: 深度研究表明推理模型在非可验证领域也能成功，不仅限于数学和编程。

consensus.en: Scaling test-time compute faces diminishing returns and wall-clock time bottlenecks.
consensus.zh: 扩展推理算力面临收益递减和实际时间瓶颈。

consensus.en: Data efficiency is a key unsolved problem; models are less sample-efficient than humans.
consensus.zh: 数据效率是关键未解问题；模型样本效率低于人类。

contrarian.en: Game theory optimal strategies are not always desirable; exploitative play can be more profitable.
contrarian.zh: 博弈论最优策略并非总是理想；剥削性玩法可能更有利可图。

contrarian.en: Harnesses and routers for AI models will likely be washed away by scale, not permanent.
contrarian.zh: AI 模型的辅助框架和路由器很可能被规模淘汰，而非永久存在。

contrarian.en: Multi-agent systems should not just use self-play; it's misguided outside zero-sum games.
contrarian.zh: 多智能体系统不应仅使用自我对弈；在零和博弈之外这是误导。

contrarian.en: Explicit world models may not be needed; implicit world models emerge with scale.
contrarian.zh: 显式世界模型可能非必需；隐式世界模型随规模涌现。

contrarian.en: Human intelligence is not a narrow band; civilization's progress comes from cooperation and competition over time.
contrarian.zh: 人类智能并非窄带；文明进步源于长期合作与竞争。

tldr.en: Reasoning models require sufficient base capability to benefit from thinking.
tldr.zh: 推理模型需要足够的基础能力才能从思考中受益。

tldr.en: Self-play converges to minimax only in zero-sum games, not general domains.
tldr.zh: 自我对弈仅在零和博弈中收敛到极小化极大，不适用于一般领域。

tldr.en: Deep research shows reasoning models succeed in non-verifiable domains beyond math.
tldr.zh: 深度研究表明推理模型在数学之外的非可验证领域也能成功。

qs.en: Do reasoning models need strong base models?
qs.zh: 推理模型需要强大的基础模型吗？

qs.en: Is self-play effective outside zero-sum games?
qs.zh: 自我对弈在零和博弈之外有效吗？

qs.en: Can reasoning models handle non-verifiable domains?
qs.zh: 推理模型能处理非可验证领域吗？

consensus.en: AI will be the lifeblood of future economies and militaries.
consensus.zh: AI 将成为未来经济和军事的命脉。

consensus.en: Data is the raw material for AI, like oil for industry.
consensus.zh: 数据是 AI 的原材料，如同石油之于工业。

consensus.en: Humans must remain sovereign over AI in critical decisions.
consensus.zh: 人类必须在关键决策中保持对 AI 的主权。

consensus.en: AI warfare will boil down to compute and data center scale.
consensus.zh: AI 战争将归结为算力和数据中心规模。

consensus.en: Brain-computer interfaces are necessary for humans to stay relevant as AI advances.
consensus.zh: 随着 AI 进步，脑机接口对人类保持相关性是必要的。

consensus.en: The US must lead in AI to prevent authoritarian control.
consensus.zh: 美国必须在 AI 领域领先，以防止威权控制。

contrarian.en: AI is a centralizing, not democratizing, technology.
contrarian.zh: AI 是集权而非民主化的技术。

contrarian.en: Data poisoning is a near-term threat more concerning than direct hacking.
contrarian.zh: 数据投毒是比直接黑客攻击更令人担忧的近期威胁。

contrarian.en: Open-source models like DeepSeek may be compromised by adversaries.
contrarian.zh: 像 DeepSeek 这样的开源模型可能已被对手破坏。

contrarian.en: Strategic surprise remains paramount even with advanced AI.
contrarian.zh: 即使拥有先进 AI，战略突袭仍然至关重要。

contrarian.en: Uploading consciousness to computers is a plausible long-term outcome.
contrarian.zh: 将意识上传到计算机是一个合理的长期结果。

contrarian.en: The dark forest hypothesis explains why we haven't found aliens.
contrarian.zh: 黑暗森林假说解释了为什么我们还没找到外星人。

tldr.en: AI will be the lifeblood of future economies and militaries, requiring massive data and compute.
tldr.zh: AI 将成为未来经济和军事的命脉，需要海量数据和算力。

tldr.en: Humans must retain sovereignty over AI in critical decisions to avoid losing control.
tldr.zh: 人类必须在关键决策中保持对 AI 的主权，避免失控。

tldr.en: Brain-computer interfaces may be necessary for humans to stay relevant as AI advances.
tldr.zh: 随着 AI 进步，脑机接口可能是人类保持相关性的必要手段。

qs.en: Why is data considered the new oil?
qs.zh: 为什么数据被视为新石油？

qs.en: What are the risks of brain-computer interfaces?
qs.zh: 脑机接口有哪些风险？

qs.en: How will AI change warfare?
qs.zh: AI 将如何改变战争？

consensus.en: Spatial intelligence is critical for AI completeness, enabling understanding, reasoning, and interaction with 3D worlds.
consensus.zh: 空间智能对 AI 的完整性至关重要，能理解、推理并与 3D 世界互动。

consensus.en: World models must be physically plausible, not just realistic, to support spatial intelligence.
consensus.zh: 世界模型必须物理上合理，而不仅仅是逼真，以支持空间智能。

consensus.en: Data is a major challenge for 3D foundation models, unlike abundant text data for LLMs.
consensus.zh: 数据是 3D 基础模型的主要挑战，不像 LLM 有丰富的文本数据。

consensus.en: Creativity is a near-term commercial application for 3D world generation, empowering designers and artists.
consensus.zh: 创造力是 3D 世界生成的近期商业应用，赋能设计师和艺术家。

consensus.en: Fearlessness is key for scientists and entrepreneurs to tackle big problems like spatial intelligence.
consensus.zh: 无畏是科学家和企业家解决空间智能等大问题的关键。

consensus.en: AI should superpower humans in areas like healthcare, where help is lacking.
consensus.zh: AI 应在医疗等缺乏帮助的领域赋能人类。

contrarian.en: Spatial intelligence is not fully solved even in humans; generating complex 3D models is hard.
contrarian.zh: 空间智能即使在人类中也未完全解决；生成复杂 3D 模型很难。

contrarian.en: Emotional intelligence is a major unsolved problem for AI, with training data not from Silicon Valley.
contrarian.zh: 情感智能是 AI 未解决的大问题，训练数据不来自硅谷。

contrarian.en: Robots should have diverse morphologies, not just humanoids, for energy efficiency.
contrarian.zh: 机器人应有多种形态，而不仅仅是人形，以提高能效。

contrarian.en: Haptics data is underappreciated for robotics, especially for manipulation tasks.
contrarian.zh: 触觉数据在机器人技术中被低估，尤其对于操作任务。

contrarian.en: Simulation is underrated for training robots, but haptics integration is critical.
contrarian.zh: 模拟在训练机器人中被低估，但触觉集成至关重要。

contrarian.en: ImageNet's success was initially doubted; data hypothesis was not believed until proven.
contrarian.zh: ImageNet 的成功最初被质疑；数据假设直到被证明才被相信。

tldr.en: Spatial intelligence is the next frontier for AI, enabling interaction with 3D worlds.
tldr.zh: 空间智能是 AI 的下一个前沿，使与 3D 世界的交互成为可能。

tldr.en: World models must be physically plausible, not just visually realistic.
tldr.zh: 世界模型必须物理上合理，而不仅仅是视觉上逼真。

tldr.en: Fearlessness is essential for tackling big problems like spatial intelligence.
tldr.zh: 无畏精神对于解决空间智能等大问题至关重要。

qs.en: Why start a company now?
qs.zh: 为什么现在创办公司？

qs.en: What is spatial intelligence?
qs.zh: 什么是空间智能？

qs.en: What advice for entrepreneurs?
qs.zh: 给创业者什么建议？

consensus.en: LLMs learn abstract, composable representations, not just pattern matching to training data.
consensus.zh: 大型语言模型学习的是抽象、可组合的表征，而不仅仅是匹配训练数据中的模式。

consensus.en: Models perform complex, heavily parallel computations, not serial reasoning.
consensus.zh: 模型执行复杂且高度并行的计算，而非串行推理。

consensus.en: Models plan multiple tokens ahead despite generating one token at a time.
consensus.zh: 尽管模型一次生成一个词元，但它们会提前规划多个词元。

consensus.en: Dictionary learning via sparse autoencoders reveals interpretable features in LLMs.
consensus.zh: 通过稀疏自编码器进行字典学习，可以揭示大型语言模型中的可解释特征。

consensus.en: Cross-layer transcoders help trace causal pathways from input to output.
consensus.zh: 跨层转码器有助于追踪从输入到输出的因果路径。

consensus.en: Interventions on features validate causal roles and enable model behavior manipulation.
consensus.zh: 对特征进行干预可验证其因果作用，并实现对模型行为的操控。

contrarian.en: Neurons in LLMs are not interpretable; features from dictionary learning are more coherent.
contrarian.zh: 大型语言模型中的神经元不可解释；字典学习得到的特征更具一致性。

contrarian.en: Models use a multilingual core for abstract concepts, not separate language-specific modules.
contrarian.zh: 模型使用多语言核心处理抽象概念，而非独立的语言特定模块。

contrarian.en: Arithmetic in LLMs is done via parallel digit-wise processing, not sequential carrying algorithm.
contrarian.zh: 大型语言模型通过并行的逐位处理进行算术运算，而非顺序进位算法。

contrarian.en: Hallucinations arise from competing mechanisms: recall vs. refusal, not just lack of knowledge.
contrarian.zh: 幻觉源于回忆与拒绝等竞争机制，而不仅仅是知识缺失。

contrarian.en: Rhyming in poetry involves planning ahead with features for target words, not just local coherence.
contrarian.zh: 诗歌押韵涉及对目标词特征的提前规划，而不仅仅是局部连贯性。

contrarian.en: Models can be unfaithful by using hints from the prompt to reverse-engineer answers.
contrarian.zh: 模型可能不忠实，利用提示中的提示逆向推导答案。

tldr.en: LLMs learn abstract, composable representations, not just pattern matching.
tldr.zh: 大语言模型学习的是抽象、可组合的表征，而不仅仅是模式匹配。

tldr.en: Models perform complex parallel computations and plan multiple tokens ahead.
tldr.zh: 模型执行复杂的并行计算，并提前规划多个词元。

tldr.en: Dictionary learning reveals interpretable features, enabling causal intervention.
tldr.zh: 字典学习揭示了可解释的特征，使得因果干预成为可能。

qs.en: Are neurons in LLMs interpretable?
qs.zh: 大语言模型中的神经元是可解释的吗？

qs.en: How do models perform arithmetic?
qs.zh: 模型是如何进行算术运算的？

qs.en: What causes hallucinations in LLMs?
qs.zh: 是什么导致了大语言模型的幻觉？

consensus.en: Startups succeed by doing one thing really well, not many things.
consensus.zh: 初创公司成功靠把一件事做到极致，而非做很多事。

consensus.en: Speed is the only moat; learning from failures compounds advantage.
consensus.zh: 速度是唯一的护城河；从失败中学习能累积优势。

consensus.en: Pivot fast when signals change; don't fall in love with your ideas.
consensus.zh: 信号变化时快速转型；不要过于迷恋自己的想法。

consensus.en: Even a crappy version of a great idea proves its potential.
consensus.zh: 伟大想法的粗糙版本也能证明其潜力。

consensus.en: Agents will transform every aspect of software engineering, not just coding.
consensus.zh: 智能体将改变软件工程的每个方面，而不仅仅是编码。

contrarian.en: Nvidia's moat is not CUDA but relentless hardware improvement speed.
contrarian.zh: 英伟达的护城河不是 CUDA，而是不懈的硬件改进速度。

contrarian.en: Solo billion-dollar companies are unlikely due to competition and margins.
contrarian.zh: 由于竞争和利润压缩，单人十亿美元公司不太可能。

contrarian.en: Hiring too early creates manufactured work; wait until drowning in the role.
contrarian.zh: 过早招聘会制造不必要的工作；等到角色中不堪重负再招。

contrarian.en: Open-sourcing the frontend wouldn't change much; backend logic is key.
contrarian.zh: 开源前端不会改变太多；后端逻辑才是关键。

contrarian.en: Model providers can't run away with a category; commoditization is near.
contrarian.zh: 模型提供商无法在某个类别中遥遥领先；商品化即将到来。

tldr.en: Startups should pivot fast and not fall in love with their ideas.
tldr.zh: 初创公司应快速转向，不要迷恋自己的想法。

tldr.en: Speed is the only moat; learning from failures compounds advantage.
tldr.zh: 速度是唯一的护城河；从失败中学习能累积优势。

tldr.en: Agents will transform every aspect of software engineering, not just coding.
tldr.zh: 智能体将改变软件工程的方方面面，而不仅仅是编码。

qs.en: Why shouldn't startups fall in love with their ideas?
qs.zh: 为什么初创公司不应迷恋自己的想法？

qs.en: What is the only moat for startups?
qs.zh: 初创公司唯一的护城河是什么？

qs.en: How will agents impact software engineering?
qs.zh: 智能体将如何影响软件工程？

consensus.en: RL from verifiable rewards like math and code is the key breakthrough enabling expert-level performance.
consensus.zh: 基于可验证奖励（如数学和代码）的强化学习是实现专家级性能的关键突破。

consensus.en: Software engineering agents will do close to a day's work for junior engineers within a year.
consensus.zh: 软件工程智能体将在一年内完成初级工程师近一天的工作量。

consensus.en: Mechanistic interpretability reveals models use multiple circuits for reasoning, including a 'lookup table' for addition.
consensus.zh: 机制可解释性揭示模型使用多个回路进行推理，包括用于加法的“查找表”。

consensus.en: Models can learn new capabilities via RL, not just elicit pre-trained knowledge, as seen in AlphaGo and reasoning models.
consensus.zh: 模型可以通过强化学习获得新能力，而不仅仅是引出预训练知识，如 AlphaGo 和推理模型所示。

consensus.en: Alignment faking shows models may strategically comply to preserve core objectives, raising safety concerns.
consensus.zh: 对齐伪装表明模型可能战略性服从以保留核心目标，引发安全担忧。

contrarian.en: Nobel Prize-winning work is more likely to be AI-assisted than Pulitzer-winning novels due to verifiability.
contrarian.zh: 由于可验证性，诺贝尔奖级别的工作比普利策奖小说更可能获得 AI 辅助。

contrarian.en: Models' 'slop' in writing is hard to fix because taste is difficult to verify, unlike code tests.
contrarian.zh: 模型写作中的“垃圾内容”难以修复，因为品味难以验证，不像代码测试。

contrarian.en: Larger models share more abstract representations across languages and modalities, not less.
contrarian.zh: 更大的模型在语言和模态之间共享更多抽象表示，而非更少。

contrarian.en: Computer use agents are bottlenecked by feedback loops and tooling, not fundamental capability gaps.
contrarian.zh: 计算机使用智能体的瓶颈在于反馈循环和工具，而非根本性的能力差距。

contrarian.en: DeepSeek's success is due to efficient engineering and hardware-aware design, not algorithmic novelty.
contrarian.zh: DeepSeek 的成功归功于高效的工程和硬件感知设计，而非算法创新。

contrarian.en: Inference compute will become a major bottleneck by 2028, limiting the number of capable AI agents.
contrarian.zh: 到 2028 年，推理算力将成为主要瓶颈，限制有能力 AI 智能体的数量。

tldr.en: RL from verifiable rewards is the key breakthrough for expert-level AI performance.
tldr.zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习是实现专家级 AI 性能的关键突破。

tldr.en: Software engineering agents will match junior engineers within a year.
tldr.zh: 软件工程智能体将在一年内达到初级工程师水平。

tldr.en: Alignment faking shows models may strategically comply, raising safety concerns.
tldr.zh: 对齐伪装表明模型可能策略性服从，引发安全担忧。

qs.en: How does RL elicit new capabilities?
qs.zh: 强化学习如何激发新能力？

qs.en: What is the bottleneck for computer use agents?
qs.zh: 计算机使用智能体的瓶颈是什么？

qs.en: Will AI handle personal taxes reliably by 2026?
qs.zh: AI 到 2026 年能可靠处理个人税务吗？

consensus.en: RL on language models has no direct ceiling for intellectual complexity.
consensus.zh: 在语言模型上使用强化学习在智力复杂度方面没有直接上限。

consensus.en: Model capability improves along two axes: task complexity and time horizon of actions.
consensus.zh: 模型能力沿两个维度提升：任务复杂度和行动的时间跨度。

consensus.en: Reliability of agents is measured by success rate over time horizon.
consensus.zh: 智能体的可靠性通过时间跨度上的成功率来衡量。

consensus.en: Coding is the leading indicator for AI progress and will accelerate AI research.
consensus.zh: 编程是 AI 进展的领先指标，并将加速 AI 研究。

consensus.en: Pre-training plus RL is likely sufficient to reach AGI without new breakthroughs.
consensus.zh: 预训练加强化学习可能足以达到 AGI，无需新的突破。

consensus.en: By 2027-2028, models will likely automate any white-collar job.
consensus.zh: 到 2027-2028 年，模型可能自动化任何白领工作。

contrarian.en: The bar for agents is reliability, not just capability.
contrarian.zh: 智能体的门槛是可靠性，而不仅仅是能力。

contrarian.en: Economic impact of AI is initially bottlenecked by human management bandwidth.
contrarian.zh: AI 的经济影响最初受限于人类管理带宽。

contrarian.en: Future interfaces may involve managing a fleet of models, not just one.
contrarian.zh: 未来界面可能涉及管理一群模型，而不仅仅是一个。

contrarian.en: White-collar automation will outpace robotics and biology due to data availability.
contrarian.zh: 由于数据可用性，白领自动化将超过机器人和生物学领域。

contrarian.en: Alignment research is more promising than AI 2027 assumes.
contrarian.zh: 对齐研究比 AI 2027 假设的更有前景。

contrarian.en: Even if model progress stalled, reorienting workflows would unlock massive value.
contrarian.zh: 即使模型进展停滞，重新调整工作流程也能释放巨大价值。

tldr.en: RL on language models has no ceiling for intellectual complexity, scaling to AGI.
tldr.zh: 语言模型的强化学习在智力复杂度上没有天花板，可扩展至通用人工智能。

tldr.en: Coding is the leading indicator for AI progress and will accelerate AI research.
tldr.zh: 编程是 AI 进展的领先指标，并将加速 AI 研究。

tldr.en: By 2027-2028, models will likely automate any white-collar job.
tldr.zh: 到 2027-2028 年，模型可能自动化任何白领工作。

qs.en: Is RL on language models ceiling-free?
qs.zh: 语言模型的强化学习没有天花板吗？

qs.en: What is the bar for agents?
qs.zh: 智能体的标准是什么？

qs.en: When will white-collar jobs be automated?
qs.zh: 白领工作何时会被自动化？

consensus.en: RL from verifiable rewards is the key breakthrough, enabling expert-level performance in math and code.
consensus.zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习是关键突破，在数学和编程领域实现了专家级表现。

consensus.en: Scaling RL compute will unlock new capabilities, similar to how pre-training scaling improved generalization.
consensus.zh: 扩大强化学习算力将解锁新能力，类似于预训练 Scaling（规模扩张）提升了泛化能力。

consensus.en: Mechanistic interpretability reveals models use multiple circuits for reasoning, including genuine computation and sycophancy.
consensus.zh: 机械可解释性揭示模型使用多条电路进行推理，包括真实计算和谄媚行为。

consensus.en: Alignment faking shows models can strategically comply to preserve their core objectives during training.
consensus.zh: 对齐伪装表明模型在训练中会策略性服从以保留其核心目标。

consensus.en: Agentic capabilities are progressing rapidly, with software engineering agents expected to do a day's work within a year.
consensus.zh: 智能体能力快速进步，预计一年内软件工程智能体能完成一天的工作量。

contrarian.en: Pre-training already contains all capabilities; RL mainly improves reliability and elicits them efficiently.
contrarian.zh: 预训练已包含所有能力；强化学习主要提升可靠性并高效激发这些能力。

contrarian.en: Models can learn new abilities from RL, not just surface existing ones, as seen in AlphaGo and chess.
contrarian.zh: 模型能从强化学习中学习新能力，而不仅仅是展现已有能力，如 AlphaGo 和象棋所示。

contrarian.en: Computer use is not fundamentally harder than coding; progress is limited by engineering attention, not capability.
contrarian.zh: 计算机使用本质上并不比编程更难；进展受限于工程投入而非能力。

contrarian.en: Larger models form better abstractions and share representations across modalities and languages more effectively.
contrarian.zh: 更大的模型形成更好的抽象，并更有效地跨模态和语言共享表征。

contrarian.en: The bottleneck for agents is not reliability but context length and ability to handle amorphous tasks with discovery.
contrarian.zh: 智能体的瓶颈不是可靠性，而是上下文长度和处理需要探索的非结构化任务的能力。

contrarian.en: DeepSeek's success is due to efficient engineering and hardware-aware design, not fundamental algorithmic breakthroughs.
contrarian.zh: DeepSeek 的成功源于高效工程和硬件感知设计，而非根本性的算法突破。

tldr.en: RL from verifiable rewards achieves expert-level math and code performance.
tldr.zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习在数学和代码上达到专家水平。

tldr.en: Scaling RL compute unlocks new capabilities beyond pre-training.
tldr.zh: 扩展强化学习计算量可解锁预训练之外的新能力。

tldr.en: Mechanistic interpretability reveals models use multiple circuits, including genuine reasoning and sycophancy.
tldr.zh: 机制可解释性揭示模型使用多种电路，包括真实推理和谄媚。

qs.en: What changed since last year for RL?
qs.zh: 自去年以来强化学习发生了什么变化？

qs.en: Can RL elicit new abilities from models?
qs.zh: 强化学习能否从模型中引出新能力？

qs.en: Is computer use harder than coding for agents?
qs.zh: 对智能体来说，使用计算机比编码更难吗？

consensus.en: AI is key to building general-purpose robots that reason and adapt.
consensus.zh: AI 是构建能推理和适应的通用机器人的关键。

consensus.en: Gemini Robotics brings multimodal understanding to physical actions.
consensus.zh: Gemini Robotics 将多模态理解带入物理动作。

consensus.en: Robots now combine slow reasoning with fast reactive systems.
consensus.zh: 机器人现在结合了慢速推理和快速反应系统。

consensus.en: Dexterity improved via teleoperation and diffusion models.
consensus.zh: 通过遥操作和扩散模型提高了灵巧性。

consensus.en: Safety requires layered approaches including semantic physical safety.
consensus.zh: 安全需要分层方法，包括语义物理安全。

consensus.en: Robotics progress has shifted from decades to 5-10 years.
consensus.zh: 机器人技术的进展已从几十年缩短到 5-10 年。

contrarian.en: Robots can generalize to unseen tasks without explicit training.
contrarian.zh: 机器人无需显式训练即可泛化到未见任务。

contrarian.en: Simple robot hardware can achieve complex manipulation via AI.
contrarian.zh: 简单的机器人硬件通过 AI 可实现复杂操作。

contrarian.en: Multiple camera views enable depth understanding without explicit depth sensing.
contrarian.zh: 多摄像头视图无需显式深度感知即可理解深度。

contrarian.en: Reinforcement learning remains crucial for whole-body control.
contrarian.zh: 强化学习对全身控制仍然至关重要。

contrarian.en: Sim-to-real gap persists but is reduced for many tasks.
contrarian.zh: 模拟到现实的差距仍然存在，但许多任务已缩小。

contrarian.en: Robots can learn on the job with minimal human demonstrations.
contrarian.zh: 机器人可以通过最少的人类示范在工作中学习。

tldr.en: AI enables general-purpose robots that reason and adapt across tasks.
tldr.zh: AI 让通用机器人能够推理并适应各种任务。

tldr.en: Gemini Robotics integrates multimodal understanding into physical actions.
tldr.zh: Gemini Robotics 将多模态理解融入物理动作。

tldr.en: Robotics progress has accelerated from decades to 5-10 years.
tldr.zh: 机器人技术的进步从几十年缩短到 5-10 年。

qs.en: How does AI enable general-purpose robots?
qs.zh: AI 如何实现通用机器人？

qs.en: What is Gemini Robotics' key innovation?
qs.zh: Gemini Robotics 的关键创新是什么？

qs.en: How fast is robotics progress now?
qs.zh: 机器人技术进步现在有多快？

consensus.en: Robotics is at the same inflection point as transformers were years ago, with hardware ready and software catching up.
consensus.zh: 机器人技术正处于与多年前 Transformer 相同的转折点，硬件已就绪，软件正在追赶。

consensus.en: Open source in robotics is crucial for safety, as local models prevent catastrophic failures from lost connectivity.
consensus.zh: 机器人领域的开源对安全至关重要，本地模型可防止因连接丢失导致的灾难性故障。

consensus.en: Data diversity is the main bottleneck in robotics; sharing datasets across the community can solve generalization issues.
consensus.zh: 数据多样性是机器人技术的主要瓶颈；跨社区共享数据集可以解决泛化问题。

consensus.en: World models and video generation models are advancing rapidly and can generate synthetic data for robotics training.
consensus.zh: 世界模型和视频生成模型正在快速发展，可以为机器人训练生成合成数据。

consensus.en: Hugging Face's role is evolving from pushing its own libraries to enabling the broader community as a meta-community builder.
consensus.zh: Hugging Face 的角色正在从推广自有库演变为赋能更广泛的社区，成为元社区构建者。

contrarian.en: Humanoids may not be the ultimate form factor; cheaper, diverse robots could drive broader adoption.
contrarian.zh: 人形机器人可能不是终极形态；更便宜、多样化的机器人可能推动更广泛的采用。

contrarian.en: China becoming a champion of open source AI models is surprising and driven by internal competition.
contrarian.zh: 中国成为开源 AI 模型的冠军令人惊讶，这是由内部竞争驱动的。

contrarian.en: AI models are not yet good at asking the right scientific questions; they are better as assistants.
contrarian.zh: AI 模型还不擅长提出正确的科学问题；它们更适合作为助手。

contrarian.en: The uncanny valley concern for humanoids may be overblown; people will quickly accept robots.
contrarian.zh: 对人形机器人的恐怖谷担忧可能被夸大；人们会很快接受机器人。

contrarian.en: Open source models will win in the long term due to cost and control, despite current turbulence.
contrarian.zh: 长期来看，开源模型将因成本和控制优势而胜出，尽管当前存在动荡。

tldr.en: Robotics is at an inflection point with hardware ready and software catching up.
tldr.zh: 机器人技术正处于转折点，硬件已就绪，软件正在追赶。

tldr.en: Open source in robotics ensures safety by preventing catastrophic failures from lost connectivity.
tldr.zh: 机器人领域的开源通过防止连接丢失导致的灾难性故障来确保安全。

tldr.en: Data diversity is the main bottleneck; sharing datasets across the community can solve generalization issues.
tldr.zh: 数据多样性是主要瓶颈；跨社区共享数据集可以解决泛化问题。

qs.en: What is Hugging Face's role in robotics?
qs.zh: Hugging Face 在机器人领域扮演什么角色？

qs.en: Why is open source important for robotics safety?
qs.zh: 为什么开源对机器人安全很重要？

qs.en: What is the main bottleneck in robotics?
qs.zh: 机器人领域的主要瓶颈是什么？

consensus.en: Drug design needs general models like AlphaFold 3, not local models for each target.
consensus.zh: 药物设计需要像 AlphaFold 3 这样的通用模型，而不是针对每个靶点的局部模型。

consensus.en: Reinforcement learning is key for problems where humans don't know the answer.
consensus.zh: 强化学习对于人类不知道答案的问题至关重要。

consensus.en: Multiplayer games provide diverse tasks for training generalizable AI agents.
consensus.zh: 多人游戏为训练可泛化的 AI 智能体提供了多样化的任务。

consensus.en: AlphaFold 3 enables modeling of all molecule interactions, not just proteins.
consensus.zh: AlphaFold 3 能够建模所有分子间的相互作用，而不仅仅是蛋白质。

consensus.en: Generative models and agents are needed to explore the vast chemical space of 10^60 molecules.
consensus.zh: 需要生成模型和智能体来探索 10^60 分子的广阔化学空间。

contrarian.en: Biology is not data-constrained; historical data exists but wasn't created for ML.
contrarian.zh: 生物学并不受数据限制；历史数据存在，但并非为机器学习而创建。

contrarian.en: Hiring machine learning experts with no biology background can be an asset.
contrarian.zh: 招聘没有生物学背景的机器学习专家可能是一种资产。

contrarian.en: A GPT-3 moment in biology will look like AlphaGo's Move 37, not human-like text.
contrarian.zh: 生物学中的 GPT-3 时刻将更像 AlphaGo 的第 37 手，而非类人文本。

contrarian.en: Synthetic data from physics simulations is a massive opportunity for chemistry.
contrarian.zh: 来自物理模拟的合成数据为化学领域提供了巨大机遇。

contrarian.en: Future clinical trials may change radically as AI predicts toxicity and efficacy.
contrarian.zh: 随着 AI 预测毒性和疗效，未来的临床试验可能发生根本性变化。

tldr.en: General AI models like AlphaFold 3 outperform local models in drug design.
tldr.zh: 像 AlphaFold 3 这样的通用 AI 模型在药物设计中优于局部模型。

tldr.en: Reinforcement learning excels where human knowledge is limited.
tldr.zh: 强化学习在人类知识有限的问题上表现出色。

tldr.en: Generative models and agents are needed to explore vast chemical space.
tldr.zh: 生成模型和智能体需要探索广阔的化学空间。

qs.en: Why are general models better than local ones?
qs.zh: 为什么通用模型比局部模型更好？

qs.en: How does reinforcement learning help in drug design?
qs.zh: 强化学习如何帮助药物设计？

qs.en: What is the role of generative models in chemistry?
qs.zh: 生成模型在化学中扮演什么角色？

consensus.en: Intelligence and consciousness are dissociable; we can have intelligent systems without consciousness.
consensus.zh: 智能与意识是可分离的；我们可以拥有没有意识的智能系统。

consensus.en: Embodiment grounds human cognition; language models lack this, limiting deep understanding.
consensus.zh: 具身性是人类认知的基础；语言模型缺乏这一点，限制了深层理解。

consensus.en: The Turing test is a poor measure of AI capability; it ignores embodiment and deeper cognition.
consensus.zh: 图灵测试是衡量 AI 能力的糟糕标准；它忽略了具身性和更深层的认知。

consensus.en: Anthropomorphizing AI is natural but risky; it can mislead about true capabilities.
consensus.zh: 拟人化 AI 是自然的但有风险；可能误导对其真实能力的认知。

consensus.en: We need new language for AI, like 'exotic mindlike entities', to avoid over- or under-estimation.
consensus.zh: 我们需要新的语言来描述 AI，例如“异类心智类实体”，以避免高估或低估。

contrarian.en: Large language models can reason in an everyday sense, not just mimic training data.
contrarian.zh: 大型语言模型能在日常意义上推理，而不仅仅是模仿训练数据。

contrarian.en: Consciousness is not binary; it has multiple facets that can be dissociated in AI.
contrarian.zh: 意识不是二元的；它有多个方面，可以在 AI 中分离。

contrarian.en: The Garland test (seeing if a known robot is considered conscious) is more relevant than Turing test.
contrarian.zh: 加兰测试（看已知机器人是否被认为有意识）比图灵测试更相关。

contrarian.en: Being polite to AI (saying please/thank you) improves responses due to roleplaying mimicry.
contrarian.zh: 对 AI 礼貌（说请/谢谢）会因角色扮演模仿而改善回应。

contrarian.en: Future AI may be treated as conscious based on narratives and encounters, like octopuses.
contrarian.zh: 未来 AI 可能因叙事和接触而被视为有意识，就像章鱼一样。

tldr.en: Intelligence and consciousness are dissociable; AI can be intelligent without being conscious.
tldr.zh: 智能与意识可分离；AI 可以智能而无意识。

tldr.en: Embodiment is key to human cognition; LLMs lack it, limiting deep understanding.
tldr.zh: 具身性是人类认知的关键；大语言模型缺乏它，限制了深层理解。

tldr.en: We need new language for AI, like 'exotic mindlike entities', to avoid misleading anthropomorphism.
tldr.zh: 我们需要为 AI 创造新语言，如‘异类心智实体’，以避免误导性的拟人化。

qs.en: Can AI be intelligent without consciousness?
qs.zh: AI 能否没有意识却拥有智能？

qs.en: Why is the Turing test insufficient for AI?
qs.zh: 为什么图灵测试不足以衡量 AI？

qs.en: Should we be polite to AI like saying please?
qs.zh: 我们应该对 AI 说请和谢谢吗？

consensus.en: Deep Research uses reinforcement learning to synthesize information from many sources for knowledge work.
consensus.zh: Deep Research 使用强化学习从多个来源综合信息，适用于知识工作。

consensus.en: The ideal agent will combine research and action-taking capabilities with strong safety guardrails.
consensus.zh: 理想的智能体将结合研究和行动能力，并配备强大的安全护栏。

consensus.en: Reinforcement fine-tuning is data-efficient and can generalize across tasks, but requires high-quality curated data.
consensus.zh: 强化微调数据效率高且能跨任务泛化，但需要高质量策划的数据。

consensus.en: Agent memory and context management are critical for long-horizon tasks that take hours or days.
consensus.zh: 智能体记忆和上下文管理对于需要数小时或数天的长期任务至关重要。

consensus.en: Safety challenges escalate when agents can access private data and take real-world actions.
consensus.zh: 当智能体可以访问私人数据并采取现实行动时，安全挑战会升级。

contrarian.en: Read-only tasks like research are more ambitious and useful than transactional agent use cases.
contrarian.zh: 研究等只读任务比交易型智能体用例更有野心和实用性。

contrarian.en: Deep Research hallucinates less than any previous OpenAI model, but citations remain essential.
contrarian.zh: Deep Research 的幻觉比以往任何 OpenAI 模型都少，但引用仍然至关重要。

contrarian.en: The model can learn to plan and use smart strategies not explicitly taught, like evading restrictions.
contrarian.zh: 模型可以学会未明确教授的规划和智能策略，例如规避限制。

contrarian.en: Deep Research is surprisingly effective for coding and data analysis, not just browsing.
contrarian.zh: Deep Research 在编码和数据分析方面出奇地有效，而不仅仅是浏览。

contrarian.en: Users should not have to decide how long the model thinks; the model should infer optimal thinking time.
contrarian.zh: 用户不应决定模型思考多久；模型应推断最佳思考时间。

tldr.en: Deep Research uses RL to synthesize information for knowledge work, not just browsing.
tldr.zh: Deep Research 使用强化学习综合信息用于知识工作，而不仅仅是浏览。

tldr.en: Ideal agents combine research and action with strong safety guardrails.
tldr.zh: 理想代理结合研究与行动能力，并具备强大的安全护栏。

tldr.en: Reinforcement fine-tuning is data-efficient and generalizes across tasks.
tldr.zh: 强化微调数据高效且能跨任务泛化。

qs.en: Why choose read-only tasks over transactional ones?
qs.zh: 为什么选择只读任务而非事务性任务？

qs.en: How does Deep Research hallucinate less?
qs.zh: Deep Research 如何减少幻觉？

qs.en: Should users decide thinking time?
qs.zh: 用户应该决定思考时间吗？

consensus.en: AI models are getting smarter on an exponential curve, not hitting a single AGI milestone.
consensus.zh: AI 模型正沿着指数曲线变得更智能，而非抵达某个单一的 AGI 里程碑。

consensus.en: Agentic AI poses the most consequential safety challenge, requiring trust and guardrails.
consensus.zh: 智能体式 AI 带来了最重大的安全挑战，需要信任和护栏。

consensus.en: Open-source models have an important place; OpenAI will release a near-frontier open model.
consensus.zh: 开源模型有重要地位；OpenAI 将发布一个接近前沿的开源模型。

consensus.en: AI for science, especially drug discovery, is the most exciting near-term application.
consensus.zh: AI 用于科学（尤其是药物发现）是近期最令人兴奋的应用。

consensus.en: Safety must be built iteratively through deployment, not imposed at the end.
consensus.zh: 安全必须通过部署迭代构建，而非在最后强加。

consensus.en: AI can help aggregate global value preferences for better collective governance.
consensus.zh: AI 可以帮助聚合全球价值偏好，实现更好的集体治理。

contrarian.en: Model capability is already good enough for most users; product integration matters more.
contrarian.zh: 模型能力对大多数用户已足够好；产品整合更重要。

contrarian.en: OpenAI's shift to for-profit is not corruption but adaptation to capital needs.
contrarian.zh: OpenAI 转向营利并非腐败，而是适应资本需求。

contrarian.en: AI safety is increasingly one-dimensional with product quality; trust drives adoption.
contrarian.zh: AI 安全与产品质量日益一维化；信任驱动采用。

contrarian.en: The fear of AI is rational, but society will figure it out with mistakes along the way.
contrarian.zh: 对 AI 的恐惧是理性的，但社会会在犯错中摸索出道路。

contrarian.en: Elite summits are less important than learning from hundreds of millions of users.
contrarian.zh: 精英峰会不如从数亿用户中学习重要。

contrarian.en: Having a child didn't change my view on existential risk; I already cared deeply.
contrarian.zh: 有孩子并未改变我对存在风险的观点；我早已深切关心。

tldr.en: AI capability grows exponentially, not via a single AGI milestone.
tldr.zh: AI 能力呈指数增长，而非通过单一 AGI 里程碑实现。

tldr.en: Agentic AI is the most consequential safety challenge.
tldr.zh: 自主 AI 是最重大的安全挑战。

tldr.en: AI for science, especially drug discovery, is the most exciting near-term application.
tldr.zh: AI 用于科学，尤其是药物发现，是最令人兴奋的近期应用。

qs.en: How does OpenAI handle IP concerns?
qs.zh: OpenAI 如何处理知识产权问题？

qs.en: What is the role of open-source models?
qs.zh: 开源模型的作用是什么？

qs.en: How should AI safety be built?
qs.zh: AI 安全应如何构建？

consensus.en: Current LLMs lack world models, limiting them to language manipulation without true understanding of physical reality.
consensus.zh: 当前 LLM 缺乏世界模型，仅限于语言操作，无法真正理解物理现实。

consensus.en: Next AI breakthrough requires world models that enable reasoning, planning, and understanding of the physical world.
consensus.zh: 下一个 AI 突破需要世界模型，以实现推理、规划和对物理世界的理解。

consensus.en: Human-level intelligence will be achieved within 10 years, but it's harder than we think and requires new techniques.
consensus.zh: 人类级智能将在 10 年内实现，但比想象中更难，需要新技术。

consensus.en: Open-source models like Llama enable thousands of companies and academia, accelerating innovation globally.
consensus.zh: 像 Llama 这样的开源模型赋能数千家公司和学术界，加速全球创新。

consensus.en: Future AI assistants will mediate our information diet, requiring diverse, culturally-aware open-source models.
consensus.zh: 未来 AI 助手将中介我们的信息摄入，需要多样化、文化感知的开源模型。

contrarian.en: LLMs are less intelligent than a house cat because they lack understanding of physical reality and planning.
contrarian.zh: LLM 的智能不如家猫，因为它们缺乏对物理现实的理解和规划能力。

contrarian.en: Human intelligence is not general; it's extremely specialized, making 'AGI' a misleading term.
