tldr.en: True AI value is measured by unique user outcomes, not benchmarks.
tldr.zh: AI的真正价值在于用户获得的独特成果，而非基准分数。

tldr.en: Private evals are key IP for companies to improve frontier models.
tldr.zh: 私有评估是企业改进前沿模型的关键知识产权。

tldr.en: Microsoft's platform promise enables every company to operate at the frontier.
tldr.zh: 微软的平台承诺让每家公司都能在前沿运营。

qs.en: How should companies evaluate frontier models?
qs.zh: 公司应如何评估前沿模型？

qs.en: What is Microsoft's platform promise?
qs.zh: 微软的平台承诺是什么？

qs.en: How will AI change business models?
qs.zh: AI将如何改变商业模式？

consensus.en: Fast inference is critical for AI adoption; slow AI has zero market.
consensus.zh: 快速推理对AI采用至关重要；慢速AI没有市场。

consensus.en: New AI workloads require radically different architectures, not GPU derivatives.
consensus.zh: 新的AI工作负载需要根本不同的架构，而非GPU的衍生品。

consensus.en: Hardware startups must love being David against Goliath like Nvidia.
consensus.zh: 硬件初创公司必须热爱扮演大卫对抗像英伟达这样的歌利亚。

consensus.en: Speed in AI will enable entirely new business models, not just incremental improvements.
consensus.zh: AI的速度将催生全新商业模式，而不仅仅是渐进式改进。

consensus.en: Open-source ecosystem fuels market growth and pushes closed-source innovation.
consensus.zh: 开源生态系统推动市场增长并促进闭源创新。

contrarian.en: Cerebras built a dinner-plate-sized chip when everyone said it was impossible.
contrarian.zh: Cerebras在所有人都说不可能时，制造了餐盘大小的芯片。

contrarian.en: Being radically faster than GPUs was ignored until AI became useful in 2025.
contrarian.zh: 比GPU快得多曾被忽视，直到2025年AI变得有用。

contrarian.en: AI coding agents can turn 10x engineers into 100x engineers, but only for some.
contrarian.zh: AI编码智能体可将10倍工程师变为100倍，但仅适用于部分人。

contrarian.en: Going public trades professional investors for retail investors, reducing capital cost.
contrarian.zh: 上市是用专业投资者换取散户，降低资本成本。

contrarian.en: The OpenAI deal worth $20B+ was signed in just 4.5 weeks, defying conventional speed.
contrarian.zh: 价值200亿美元以上的OpenAI交易仅用4.5周签署，打破常规速度。

tldr.en: Fast inference is critical for AI adoption; slow AI has zero market.
tldr.zh: 快速推理对AI采用至关重要；慢速AI没有市场。

tldr.en: New AI workloads require radically different architectures, not GPU derivatives.
tldr.zh: 新的AI工作负载需要根本不同的架构，而非GPU衍生品。

tldr.en: Speed in AI will enable entirely new business models, not just incremental improvements.
tldr.zh: AI的速度将催生全新商业模式，而不仅是渐进式改进。

qs.en: Why is fast inference critical for AI?
qs.zh: 为什么快速推理对AI至关重要？

qs.en: What architecture do new AI workloads need?
qs.zh: 新的AI工作负载需要什么架构？

qs.en: How did Cerebras sign a $20B deal in 4.5 weeks?
qs.zh: Cerebras如何在4.5周内签下200亿美元交易？

consensus.en: AI models improve at about 60x per year in cost for a given quality level.
consensus.zh: AI模型在给定质量水平下每年成本降低约60倍。

consensus.en: Memory demand is soaring due to reasoning models and agentic workflows, causing a multi-year shortage.
consensus.zh: 由于推理模型和智能体工作流，内存需求激增，导致多年短缺。

consensus.en: CPU demand is inflecting because of reinforcement learning and agentic workflows requiring more CPU interaction.
consensus.zh: 由于强化学习和智能体工作流需要更多CPU交互，CPU需求正在激增。

consensus.en: Co-packaged optics (CPO) will not ramp until late 2028 or 2029 due to manufacturing challenges.
consensus.zh: 由于制造挑战，共封装光学（CPO）要到2028年底或2029年才能大规模部署。

consensus.en: Behind-the-meter power generation for data centers is soaring, with gas engines and solar+battery becoming key.
consensus.zh: 数据中心的自发自用发电正在激增，燃气发动机和太阳能+电池成为关键。

contrarian.en: Using the smartest model is often cheaper due to token efficiency, not more expensive.
contrarian.zh: 由于词元效率，使用最智能的模型通常更便宜，而不是更贵。

contrarian.en: Memory prices will soar so high that smartphones and laptops will be priced out of the market.
contrarian.zh: 内存价格将飙升到智能手机和笔记本电脑被挤出市场的程度。

contrarian.en: Copper will outperform CPO in the medium term due to CPO delays and copper innovation.
contrarian.zh: 由于CPO延迟和铜缆创新，铜缆在中短期内将优于CPO。

contrarian.en: CPU demand spike is a catch-up effect; steady-state ratio to GPUs is much smaller than current hype.
contrarian.zh: CPU需求激增是追赶效应；与GPU的稳态比率远小于当前炒作。

contrarian.en: Diesel truck engines converted to gas are a viable solution for data center power generation.
contrarian.zh: 将柴油卡车发动机改装为燃气发动机是数据中心发电的可行方案。

tldr.en: AI model cost drops 60x yearly for same quality, reshaping infrastructure demand.
tldr.zh: AI模型成本每年下降60倍，重塑基础设施需求。

tldr.en: Memory faces multi-year shortage due to reasoning models and agents.
tldr.zh: 推理模型和智能体导致内存多年短缺。

tldr.en: CPU demand spikes from RL and agents, but steady-state ratio to GPUs is lower.
tldr.zh: 强化学习和智能体推高CPU需求，但稳态GPU比更低。

qs.en: How fast do AI model costs drop?
qs.zh: AI模型成本下降多快？

qs.en: Why is memory demand soaring?
qs.zh: 内存需求为何飙升？

qs.en: Will CPO replace copper soon?
qs.zh: CPO会很快取代铜吗？
